playStoreReviews.text: Great app I love it. It does almost everything I need and what it doesn't the developer has informed me he can tweak. I am using it as a trial between myself and my boss and so far, we think the only change we would make is instead of labour cost an employee start finish would be more beneficial to our operation.

awesome but a bit pricey. also it would be nice if there is a resource sheet creation option so for the next report you dont have to start all over again. it would also make it easy if it was possible to copy an existing report and be able to edit it as new. most daily reports carry information from previous. failed to attach documents if possible give us option to customize headings

playStoreReviews.text: I have been working in bars nightclubs and strip clubs for almost 25 years and in doing inventory in every possible way from corporate bars to hole in the wall bars it is typically one of the most aggravating experiences of any and all my jobs. The current company I work for has been doing it on paper and then manually entering it into a spreadsheet for over 10 years. Since switching to partender, it has become far less time-consuming and a far more accurate.

I really appreciate the usability of Partender. It saves us so much time on inventory each month. (adjusting the levels of bottles is also just kind of fun!) Adding new products is easy & I love that you're able to add your own photos of products. I think any bar or restaurant would benefit from utilizing Partender! Simplifies everything. - Liz, Copper Whiskey Bar

I couldn't believe how fast and easy this is and how much it gives us in terms of insights. I'm having all my bartenders inventory their own stations each day ans they are getting more organized. I realized much time we were losing when serving guests bc we didn't have consistency for foh or boh. Now we have both. I should add we were lucky enough to go through the VIP training and I highly recommend it. Since inventory is your biggest driver of sales this helps us make more

I am a Manager at the Celtic Cowboy. I had an issue that I reported to partender through their help services. I immediately got contacted, and then received a phone call from one of their service agents, Erwin. He helped me sign up for their training program. It has so greatly benefited me and my business. Not only reduced time in inventory, but also in helping with analytics and pinpointing product loss. 10 out of 10 recommended the app and the training program to anyone with a bar!

Partender has been a great addition for us. It makes inventory a breeze and allows us to track our costs accurately. We have also been able to greatly reduce what we have on hand with the reporting it offers. We are able to directly place orders to our distributors through the app which also saves a ton of time. Customer service has been great. Any questions we have had were answered promptly and follow up calls were made to ensure that were still on the right path.

For someone like me who isn't very tech savvy, setting up my bar on Partender was so easy! I was hesitant to transition to something new after decades of paper/pen/Excel. But realizing how much dead stock we were stuck w/ during Covid closures made us realize how much we were overordering! Partender not only saved us time spent during inventory, it also increased our bottomline by 8% within a few months! The customer service rep, Alexa, was so friendly & truly excited about helping us succeed!

Massive timesaver, more time w guests. Very easy to use. Smooth, can track your inventory + locations. Shows you exactly where items are. so organized & accurate. I love the images and how you can use the label to be exact. Also anyone can learn about our bar program while doing inventory. At Valley-low club in Glenview, inventory took so long and was on pen paper. so much time saving. important for a GM running F&B in a busy club. And the best onboarding. they help general tech support 2😅

This app has been helping me save so much time! I've been training in my position to do beverage inventory, and a few weeks ago we switched to Partender. The change has made things so much easier and quicker. The parts of inventory I was previously struggling with are a breeze now.

Partender has made inventory counts so much easier than old school eyeballing measurements. Takes the guesswork out and minimizes mistakes made. Working at multiple different venues and using different methods over the years, this program makes it so much easier. My team doesn't grumble at the dreaded 'inventory day'. It's cut the time it takes to complete by hours! As an FEC it's important to get things done swiftly and with accuracy and Partender does that!

My inventory was easy after I got it. Ordering was easier, taking inventory was way quicker. I could tell who was over pouring from home, with the info from my POS. I have told other businesses about you and have had nothing but great help with customer service. I would definitely recommend this service.

shakia B. D&B baltimore. Partender is an amazing service and app. In the past, I've normally done inventory by hand, and now using this app has shortened the time needed to do inventory in half. functionally, it's easy to navigate and has been such a great help. if you have a full service bar with a lot of inventory, this would be great tool to have. Amber was great.

Duane Jackson Sr 3 5 7 Club Before Partender, our weekly liquor orders ran $1,800-$2,200 and I couldn't tell you exactly why. Now we're consistently under $800, with some weeks as low as $500. Our on-hand wholesale value dropped from $13,000 to $8,700 while the bar stayed fully stocked. What changed: we could finally see what was actually happening. Overpouring, missed sales, wrong POS entries, product going out untracked. Partender put numbers to all of it, which made it a lot easier

Dont do it! Neat app, terrible company. Notified them of the sale of our business via email a year ago and they just charged me the auto renew and wont refund. Even though they were notified and KNOW that the app was not being used the whole time. Three months in of going around and around... oh yeah and the platforms they say are going to integrate with have been "coming" for two years for me.

Partender has been a lifesaver and the training is top-notch! As a first time bar owner, I have learned so much about how important accurate inventory and reporting means to ensuring our business remains successful and profitable. Partender is user friendly and the app makes doing inventory take a fraction of the time. Highly recommend!!!

Partender has been such a helping hand for us when we're completing inventory here at work. It's a relief to switch over from a messy folder of spreadsheet files to a streamlined, well-designed app! It has helped me free up time to focus on other tasks that need to be completed here at the bar.

I've work at T's Bar, and we have used Partender in the past to help manage our inventory to a new level. I love the amount of time it saves us, and the accuracy it has. Our ROI has increased tremendously since using Partender. It has helped our entire team not worry so much about inventory accountability now. Thank you Partender -Tristen, T's Bar

Such a shame that the system still does not allow products to be measured by weight or bag or box, etc. Otherwise it would be a good app. Update after reply: Users have been asking for this feature for years. We've been equating 1kg = 1 bottle. As someone who has been involved in system development for many years, I can't believe that there would be a huge amount of work to achieve it. Despite reassurances, I don't really expect that the feature will ever be added.

I have utilized the Partender app with a number of different concepts in the past. I would recommend to specific concepts to maximize time with counting inventory. Partender also seems to be integrating their resources more now than I've previously experienced.

This app has been very useful and accurate with my store. Makes ordering and inventory very easy, less stressful, and most importantly organized where I can keep tract of all my inventory. Not only that but Sam was very helpful and explaining into detail about the application ad well as the website. Love this application.

Never done bar inventory before but it's so easy with Partender. I loved learning about it! They couldn’t have a better spokesperson. This kept my attention! Can’t wait to use it regularly! Christianver did inventory before but this is so easy Did food inventory before. Never done beverage. I loved learning about it! They couldn’t have a better spokesperson. This kept my attention! Can’t wait to use it regularly! Christian from the Chase Sapphire Lounge

"With decades of management experience, I've done inventory the old way-paper, pen, spreadsheets-and it took 5+ hours. Now with Partender, I'm done in 2 hours, and I know it'll get even faster as I organize more. The slider and bottle visuals are game-changing, the web portal makes tracking orders and updating data effortless, and the Beverage Cost Calculator saves me from doing manual math. It's efficient, accurate, and exactly what I need to run operations smoothly. - Antonio, Director of Op.

This App has saved us countless hours on counting and tracking inventory, and is so user friendly it makes using and teaching it so easy! The Team running it are very helpful when any issues arise, amd get to resolving it very quickly. Honestly this app is a must have when running a bar or restaurant!

Been in the industry 30 yrs, including 12 Hotel & D Concourse at ATL, doing it all from bartending to inventory. Used to the old school inventory until we got Partender at AMEX (I know they used it at STK too). I just learned how to use it in 90 SECONDS. Anyone can do it. So simple/quick. Love the organization. The app gets your team able to find bottles and serve guests, especially with efficiency & speed. Makes inventory and training a breeze, plus we're ordering smarter now. Game changer 💥

I'm a bartender at Amex Centurion Lounge and this app has been a life saver. We can see exactly what was poured out so we don't run out of stock or over order. And it's keeping us organized and I can always find bottles now. Must have for bartenders who want to best serve their guests and make more tips

Been in the bar and restaurant industry for about 26 years and have done or helped with inventory at several different places. In the past it's mostly been the "call and respond" system where one person holds the inventory sheet and calls a product and the other person tracks it down and counts full items and uses the 10 point system for opened items. Anyone who has done this understands how tedious and time consuming it can be. Partender has made our lives so much easier. Patrick, coclubs

Overall its an extremely impressive app. Has helped my business's bottom line from a loss standpoint and separates theft from actual spillage due to the accuracy and ordering for inventory ease. Would highly recommend any F&B company implement Patender into their policies and procedures. 10/10

We have had an excellent experience working with Partender. We use Partender to efficiently and effectively count our entire beverage inventory. The app is extremely easy to use, easy to personalize, and they are very responsive if we have any questions. We save hours every week counting inventory so we can focus on the bigger picture of our program and better guest experience. What used to be 10+ hours are now much shorter and I know my team is extremely happy to have this time back.

It's got a killer feature; the graphical method of measuring bottle contents. The rest of it is very average, sometimes incompetent. And the team responds to suggestions as if they are already working on it but actually they did nothing new for 2 years.

We work with Partender at the Amex lounge in ATL and they are a lifesaver. The support is incredible and we actually do inventory daily so we know exactly how much we go through daily-we can do the whole lounge in literally 15 minutes with our bar team. It's also nice having one place to send and track all our orders.and anyone can do inventory on Partender since it's image based. Ive never worked in food & beverage! Partender is a no-brainer

I used to work for united lounge (IAH) and now I work for centurion lounge (LAX) and the Partender is a great app to keep up with inventory and get rid of dead stock.. made it super easy to reorder liquors because it stores every inventory list and order in addition to 15 min turn-around time to send information to vendors ....Major reduction in paper usage and brain power to calculate tenths of every liquors!! Highly recommend ^Paisley

The app is amazing I love all the features on how to do inventory. I wish I had used this app in my previous bartending jobs it would have saved me a lot of Time. This will make our jobs more easy and accurate. Thank you Anjali for training us. My name is Miguel I've worked at the Virgin Atlantic lounge and now currently working at the Centurion lounge at LAX.

I actually served the founder and the team that put the app together. Talking to them is an eye opener they really take consideration in the work that is put as a bartender/bar manager. The app shaves so much time in the process and I have to say I appreciate them for that I get to go home early to my dog. Lol so thank you for that.

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ I had an excellent experience with professional training from Erwin at Partender. Erwin is extremely knowledgeable, patient, and thorough. He explains concepts clearly and makes sure everything is understood, not just learned mechanically. The training was practical, efficient, and immediately applicable. I highly recommend Erwin and Partender to anyone looking for top-level professional training and support in successfully managing the bar business.

0 STARS.....Super bad first impression. Download the app. Enrolled and it takes 15 minutes to load or set up inventory sections. After those 15 minutes I get a sales call from them. I requested to do the demo online or by video and the sales rep HUNG UP THE PHONE. Disappointing as a new business owner.

I am unable to get my reports. The guy I am dealing with isn't listening to my issues. Seriously upset that he and app have made me look very bad at work. I do not recommend their service. Looks neat. Doesn't work. Keep moving.
very helpful for doing inventory at my job, makes keeping track of multiple bars, walk-ins, and liquor rooms an easier and more convenient task.

After installing and starting to add items get a sales email to say how to save $ after the trial. No home use allowed and account removed. Needs to be clear on the download page that it is a trial and home use will be removed.

Learn from ad is not exactly what l got through trial testing. No email support contact or any kind. No report after input my testing inventory... What a shame it seems like a good app,. Seems like waste of time.

I've worked in fine dining at Le Papillon in San Jose, California. The app is user-friendly and intuitive, making it easy to use even for those who aren't tech-savvy. The app has a wide range of features that allow you to track your inventory levels in real time and I love that future teams at our chain will have historical data. This such a great marketing and usage tool. It helps empowers us to give teams comps & while them accountable accountable.

I am owner of Fireplace Bar in St. Louis, Missouri. We've been using partender for a couple months now and I wished I would have known of it sooner. Before this, I didn't feel confident in our numbers or costs, our total beverage cost dropped from 36% to 19% and we've kept it consistent. Reporting makes it easy to see where we have loss. A theft issue was caught just by tracking our numbers week to week. As an owner, I recommend this to anyone needing less stress while managing inventory.

As AGM @ Punch Bowl Social PDX, we were tired taking 32 labor hrs/month—just counting on Compeat! Now, everything takes 45 min. We not only get time back, but we get consistent COGS% and smart orders + reduced beverage cost by 3-4% and beat target. You don’t even need integrations to get these wins. Easy to use, learn, train. I’d pay for it myself if I had to. Can’t wait to use their online ordering since RNDC/Southern SGWS accept their POs + we can get price increase alerts. Highly recommend!

This is William from Dave and Busters Capitol Heights MD. We love Partender! We do a top 20 inventory daily. We've reduced waste, lowered on hand inventory and increased overall efficiency. Thanks for your support Anjali!

This time we finished in 15 minutes per outlet. The app works great - just select the storage location, set the level on the picture of the bottle and swipe next. Highly recommended for any beverage outlet.

There is an option to allow this in the original inventory app but no option in this one.

It's really annoying that there's no way to see if products are saved online in Google Cloud. Fix the not-so-good system for deleting products and signing in. And show related products like Google does when searching. There's no option to delete contacts. Please enable the delete feature by selecting all products and contacts at once.

Great app. I love how easy it is to use and the ability to back up and restore on different phones and tablets. I highly recommend this app. It's simple but has all the elements needed. All the formulas integrated and a database to save all your ingredients. I spent 2 years doing costings for college using my own Excel template, which is great but is not designed for that sort of thing. You can introduce the formulas but you have to convert every unit measure and type in every ingredient and price by hand, every time!😌 This is such a timesaver! Once you add an ingredient, it's there for all your recipes!

A very useful app, although i do feel that recipes must have a category and ingredients use should not be a fixed amount because the same ingredient can be used for another recipe witha smaller or larger quantity. 2023/03/27 three years ago I made a simple request. 3 years later and the developer has still not done it. Makes you wonder why the app is still here?

Not a bad app, all things considered. I find it quite annoying that when entering volumes such as teaspoons, all I see is four little dots rather than tsp. Also frustrating that I need to convert very small volumes such as ¼ teaspoon to grammes in order to get a fairly correct pricing, ie. salt is bought by the kilo, but used by the teaspoon. However I do appreciate that this would be almost impossible to do on the app. A teaspoon of salt is very different in weight from a teaspoon of herbs!

For example in the UK we have to add 20% VAT, and I add 20% wastage.

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Really a good app! It makes life so much easier—calculating food cost has become much faster and more accurate. Very user-friendly and efficient. Thank you to the developer for creating such a helpful tool!

Its a great app, it will be better if you add space for recipe instructions and along with it if scaling of the recipee is available too it will become a complete package, hope you take this feedback pisitively and add those featyres as well
I enjoy using this app. I use it often to cost my recipe and price my baked good. Thank you for the app. However, I wish there was an area for notes and other relevant baking info.
Liked it a lot until I realize it only lets you input whole numbers for purchase costs. Weird.
It's a great app but I uninstalled it because it kept shutting off in between whenever I tried to edit my ingredients.
Excellent app. Please make it possible to add pics and add recipe sharing function as well.
all of my recipes beeakdowns and ingredients disappeared.. as a business...that was vital info for pricing. have to start over.. im another app..deleting this one
This is exactly what I'm looking for, but it's a bit buggy, it crashes and it's missing the change currency functionality.
An awesome app just would be perfect if i can add ingredients by percentage and then calculate the desirable amount of recipe
still waiting for the copy function for recipes long time / function to multiply the ingredients of a recipe for the actual number of servings / archive function not useable at the moment
Works great to calculate the price of meals. I would love a daily food diary to calculate my weeks cost of food.
Is the $4.99 a one time purchase or a monthly subscription? Love the app so far but I'm wanting to log in so I can use the app on my PC and phone
Not user friendly. Cannot delete Ingredients. Despite the creatirs response on another review there is no delete button for Ingredients. Useless
Its a great app , it would be better if we are able to copy all and compound into a whole list Ive purchased unlock back up but i couldnt find where it back up to
Horrible lost all of my recipes I spent so much time on. Just one day, they were gone.
I love this app. The only thing that I would add is a way to add the recipe instead of just the ingredients.
I love this app. Making my busy life easier during this pandemic we're having. Kudos! 😊
Thank you for this great app.. a real time and money saver. Can you allow us to have duplicate recipe option?
Charges once to remove ads. Charges even more for a separate feature to backup data
I have paid for removing ads. But the app still show ads!!!
I paid to remove ads twice but still see the ads please assist me in this issue
Great app, but haves a small gap when you are trying to edit recipe
I can't edit the recipe Need help, whenever I try to edit it always crash
i like this apps.. but i cant backup all my data if i change my handphone.. can u make it for free for backup?
Useless app. Who measures stuff in only ounces or grams? Cups and teaspoons are needed.
works great, but i can't move it to my sd card, and now my phone is sluggish as heck. why does it need to read the contents of my sd card if it doesn't write there? gotta delete.
It is a Great App, I cannot change the currency. Please advise.
Paid for backup...can't backup, always shows error message.
Hi, please add copy recipes or duplicate features, thanks
If you are looking for something simple to use and helpful like no other, you got it now.
Best app for costing products fast and easy
Very useful app. Developer should keep adding new useful features periodically.
I love this app but I can't archive my recipe with the costing
All good. But now edit option not working.
Maybe it is just me but I keep on loading wrong stock at resepys
Please add a save or save to cloud feature for backup
Already purchased 2 time. Still can't use. Already emailed but no response.
Like it. Don't love it yet. Why cant I figure out how to delete an ingredient from a recipe? Am I missing something here??
i couldnt add a price under 1 Euro..
Simple to use very handy .
I cant restore my data i sent many many mails
Good app. I need Philippines pesos currency tho.
I download alredy but still cannot backup. Please help
the best app. simple to use. well done!!! can I purchase this app?
I still see ads after paying to take them away
Why should purchase the back up on my new phone when I have purchased it on my old one?
I like the app but why is the PC version different.
Real Quick Fix and Accurate
Thank you very much for your great and helpful app
Basic features... perfect
I like it 👍, keep moving
Great tool to work out COGS
Easiest food costing app
clear & concise a big
So love this App, easy to use
Everything is good in this app.. Excellent
Love this app had it for years.
I enjoy the simpleness of this app
no share feature
Its a spam...dont download it

playStoreApps.name: RB Flight Crew Duty Roster App

playStoreReviews.text: When the app is working, it is good. However, I've had it for about a year and a half and have had 3 different times when I couldn't update/download my roster. Previously, the team was pretty quick about fixing the problem. However, I'm now at 2 full weeks without being able to upload a roster, including entering a new bid period. The only response I've received from the tech support team is "Sorry, we're trying to fix it" and blaming the problem on a change at my airline. Not helpful at all!

Update: Trying it again but this time it doesn't download my roster. It just gives a server error even tho I'm connected to the Internet. Doesn't even let me create an account. Only thing it says is to "check the details". All my info is correct, tried from scratch several times. No information on what is actually wrong. No links or contact information to get help setting up an account.

This app used to be handy. Over the last month, though, most functionality has stopped working, even with a premium sub. Now you have to manually log into your crew portal, get to your roster, and hit save for updates. Google Calendar integration has been broken as well. They cite EU privacy laws as the reason but we're all using the app voluntarily so not sure what the issue is. Maybe the info of other crew or something on your roster, but either way the app is fairly useless now.

Buggy app in the last 3 months. Latest Jan update refuses to open the app (automatic crash), and I have found that the app is more difficult to use since the Dec update as it no longer directly links automatically to my airline's sign in page and the our airline sign in page is wrong as well as it does not acknowledge the correct page it so I have to go to a web browser instead. Sometimes it will not update the new information after it has been "saved"and the old roster will still be shown.

App has gotten worse over time. You now have to manually email your schedule for it to be added. I have been unable to see next month's schedules even though I've sent it several times and it shows up as the "Latest Roster". Also, I periodically get logged out and have to re-enter my credentials and redo my setting. Was a decent app before, now almost useless. Won't be renewing my subscription.

I was a Premium subscriber last year. There were some outages / connection problems (sometimes for a week or more), but when the app worked, it worked well, and support was OK. I liked the auto roster downloads and calendar export, and found the customization options helpful. At $11 last year, the subscription was a little spendy, but I was prepared to renew. I've just found that the price has doubled (now $22!) however, and I can't justify that expense for my use. I'm sadly headed elsewhere.

I've been a premium subscriber for three years and have loved the app until recently. My biggest problem is that you can't set a start date when downloading aims. It always shows the whole month. Sometimes I want to see back a couple of months or forward since my airline does 60 day lines. Rosterbuster used to do this! Please go back to that!

Only shows the number of sequences, not the number of flights. If I wanted to count those up manually I wouldn't have paid for the app. Underwhelming. To the developer: Hey, thanks for answering! It shows that I've only flown 29 flights all time and 6 for this year, which is absolutely incorrect. How do you see the complete number?

Unusable. I unfortunately updated the app recently and now I can't upload my schedule to rosterbuster and I now need to manually add all my flights. The way we need to upload is by settings, download schedule, Open Crew portal, Login, pull up the monthly schedule, PDF viewer, and hit save. Now it doesn't save the schedules anymore.

Latest update made app unusable. Tried reaching out to support (ticket 257384), but no response at all. Seems like they didn't bother testing before releasing update. Would be better just to roll back to the previous version. I paid for 1 year subscription and really only got to use it for a month, and now it's broken. I feel like they stole my money.

I've emailed customer service 3x over the last four months regarding flight times only displaying correctly as UTC times. Meaning, I have a flight at 5pm locL, but the only way for it to show 1700 is for it to show as 1700zulu. Otherwise the app converts the local time from Zulu and does not display the time correctly. I'm a long time premium user. I've reinstalled the app. No luck. And customer service always replys back they they will look into it. And they never do. Figure it's a bot.

Cannot automatically sync. I have gone back and forth numerous times with customer service for the past 3 days. In order to upload my schedule, I need to download the roster to my phone, and then upload it to the app. In this industry with cancellations and delays,I will manually have to do that to my roster everytime. I also wish there was a chat with customer service. Been trying to clear this issue up and I sometimes have to wait hours for a response. I would like my money back at this point

I've subscribed to rosterbuster for over 5 years now. I have this on my android phone and on my ipad. It no longer downloads latest roster on either device. It will not download next months roster. I have contacted support multiple times yet they don't care to fix the issue. Don't pay for this service. I'm canceling and not renewing again.

I wrote a teview two years ago explaining the uploading to RB issues and the syncing with google calendar. I'm unable to upload my roster and i ha e not received a solution from the team. I'm canceling my subscription. In my airline there are two scheduling apps built by pilots, that blow this out of the water

Doesn't work anymore, raised a ticket over three months ago, same copy paste reply always sent. Seems like no one cares. Shame because it was a great app once. Would give 0 stars for customer support if I could, Just don't bother, find an alternative.

Good app when it works. But it consistently does not. I've had the same issue for two months now, app unusable, and contacted support multiple times about a resolution. They haven't provided any meaningful information and just give you automated responses. Pretty subpar considering I'm paying for it. And watch them reply to this review telling me to contact the support email, which I already have, multiple times. Edit: Took 4 months to resolve and now it's broken again
Good, when it works. Recent repeated breaking/fixing/breaking again of external syncing (Google calendar and webcal). Has been reported with no response.

Have used roster buster for years and am getting tired of the app either crashing or just not working in general. Havent been able to download my roster for 5 days now. Have deleted and re-installed but still doesn't work

I have not been able to sync the roster with flica for 4 months. I have communicated this problem with the support team. All they say is that they are working on it. FLICA, as well as RosterBuster, is a CAE probuct, 4 months for a resolution is unacceptable. RosterBuster is required for some of the features of RB Logbook, which is a paid service.

Awful roster import, plenty of mistakes and even Check in events imported as Unknown. Reported for almost a year and no fixes! Difficulty in modifying what's been imported (if the system think one import is a flight, you can't change it to GT or the opposite) Useful only to export to Google Calendar, is that worthy paying subscription? After more than a year, absolutely nothing has changed

I understand the need to update an app every now and then but it is getting really annoying that every little "scheet in een fles" requires an immediate update that is forced down your throat with the "update now or close the app!" messages. We are crew, we like to look at our roster at a glance, usually in-between duties, when it suits us, not at the peril of yet another tiny bux-fix update.

As a family user, this is quite basic. Widgets are useless, as they seem to show only flights if you're the aircrew, can't select another person to show their flights. Airport information is utter garbage, looks like AI-generated "trivia" about the airport / city (why do I want to know which airport is the farthest from the one I selected???). App could be more streamlined for family users, as we always need to select the user before seeing the schedule, even if there's only a single one there.

It worked fine until March, after an app update I can no longer select the date from which I want my schedule or for how many days. Meaning that at the end of the month you cant see what happens the next month because you can only get a schedule for the month you are in. Making the app absolutely useless!!! On top of that after more than 2 weeks of "support" they have not once actually helped or even acknowledged the problem.in short, useless app now

This app is becoming more and more unusable. I am unable to login to my FLICA account (which is also a CAE product) through the app to sync my schedule. I have to log in through the web portal to do a manual sync. Additionally a bunch of codes are labeled as "unknown" with no way of editing them (the info online is wrong and outdated). I will not be renewing my subscription in a couple months.

When prompted to upgrade to the premium version I paid via the playstore for a year subscription. When the premium features did not unlock I thought it failed and tried again, this time with a monthly subscription. After this the premium functionality was again not unlocked. To my surprise however both payments did go through so I paid twice now but still don't have the premium features unlocked. I made a ticket (#326967) but days later still no reply. I feel scammed.

Probably between 3 and 4, the app is good and so are the ideas behind it, unfortunately it's quite buggy and considering it has quite a high one time price or a decent subscription cost that shouldn't happen. Developer team is helpful most of the time, that's why I decided for the 4 stars instead of 3.

Terrible service. I'm a paid customer and I've informed them about my calendar export not working. Their response is to tell me they will eventually work on it and refuse to give me even a time frame to get it done! The only reason I use the app is for the Google calendar export. Why am I even paying for this app if you can't get the feature to work?!

Appalling customer service. My subscription had '"auto renewed" via PayPal, not Google store. Very sneaky. I emailed 2 weeks ago saying I didn't want to renew and wanted a refund. They've ignored me . Very annoyed. App is absolute rubbish now. Used to be a great app, but trying to get your roster imported is way too hit and miss these days. Shame really

Getting an error when I try to access my schedule through the app. Have emailed them multiple times and shared phone type, OS, Android build, etc... They said to try using Safari on my iPhone. Not impressed, and I don't think they're interested in keeping the Android business. It's been WEEKS with no fix. What gives? UPDATE - No response whatsoever, now have to use my work ipad for RB. Inconvenient and annoying. WTG CAE. Still no opinion?
Since the latest update, the download roster function goes to a blank screen. Please fix! App is useless to me without this.. Samsung S23 Ultra

Every time I try and refresh my roster, there is some problem or the other. This time, it tries to log in, keeps trying for quite a while and is unable to do so. I tried logging out, re installing the app, nothing works. This app is very unreliable and I unfortunately bought the fully paid version. AVOID AVOID AVOID!

Used to be a good app, but now you have to log in to your portal each time you want to save your roster. No auto download. Some options previously avaliable on the website are no longer there since changed to new design and you have to contact support to change them in the background (removing emoji from calendar export). Previous version I would recommend this app but now, don't waste your money its gone backwards.

A well organized app. It combines a lot of useful functions. E.g. flight information, detailed airport information including hotels, leisure activities, weather forecast. You can also get in contact with your colleagues or find out if you have shared flights. The only thing I miss a little bit is a live tracking possibility so that you can see where your A.C. is at the moment and/or if it's on tome or not. Pricing for membership is absolutely fine. Another good thing about it is that if you have any question or problem, you will get an answer by return and they'll come also back to you in order to find out if there is still a problem or if it has been solved. I can really recommend it.

I have been using RosterBuster for nearly a year now and it worked fine up until this last week or so. I uploaded my latest schedule and for some reason it has days doubled up. For instance where I have a day off it will also have the next days work all mushed together. Its glitched or something. Please fix. ♡

Roster import and calendar export is accurate and highly customizable. This saves me so much time that was previously wasted manually creating calendar entries. Update: Roster upload is inaccurate ever since we switched to crew access. Some of the dates were populated erroneously by a day. Don't trust this app blindly.

Stay away from this application. Wrong calculations on block hours and duty hours. Company roster cannot be uploaded correctly or not uploaded at all. Wrong layovers and wrong longest flights with airports not visited at all have been uploaded. Have this issue for 10 months and they just cannot fix it. Please dont ask me to contact roster buster team again. I did it 10 times. Waste of money and time.

I have contacted Rosterbuster/CAE several times over the last several months and they just keep sending me canned replies that they are working on a solution and it will be resolved in the next few weeks. The last few messages I received from Aquib were literally cut and paste copies of each other. For now, the app does not work with Lufthansa IADP Netline Crew. I'm glad I didn't pay for the upgraded version of the software, and I highly recommend you do not pay for it either.

I've had no use of the app for over a month. It won't update my schedule, there are no metars or tafs provided as there used to be. I've sent multiple requests for support and there has been zero help. I've paid for my subscription for years and I am no longer receiving the product or service I paid for. Used to be a good product but now they are stealing my money. Been months now and they haven't done a thing except take my money. No fix, no email response no explanation. Money back now please

stopped updating my logbook automatically, doesn't notify you. now it's failing to login to flica. they own both pieces of software but somehow can't integrate the two. was way better before CAE got ahold of it.

Great app. I have suggestions that would make it better. Roster download easier.... When manually adding flights when you search airport codes it shows the "nearby airports" and "all airports" I would much rather see "Home Airport" and/or "Frequent Airports" Also same as able to see how many times we have been to an airport. I would love to see my "AIRCRAFT LIST" show my top aircraft and least aircraft. Just suggestions that I would love to see. Been premium for years and 2 airlines.

I have been using this app for years because it is so easy to use. I am not technical at all and this app just takes all the stress away for me. I love it because I can just click on the app and know straight away what time i’m working and where I am going, I can see the other crew and I can see flight times and time changes. You can set the times to local or utc which i find really helpful. It’s so much easier for me to go to this app rather than have to log in constantly to my work roster online and it’s really quick and easy to update if I have any changes, highly recommend this for any flight or cabin crew.

Exceptionally useful and essential app for any commercial aircrew. Particularly useful for sharing my roster with family members using Google calendars, once setup very little work is required to keep them in the picture. The ability to connect to company rostering systems is also a big time saver, and makes keeping up with roster changes simple. I also find the ability to export rosters to Jeppesen CrewAlert really helpful, particularly if you have a fatiguing roster.

Too many discrepancies The app seems good but they are charging a subscription while still having lots of bugs. I've contacted support several times and they're always helpful but I shouldn't be paying for a subscription when I gotta contact them twice a week to fix a bug. Most common bug is a duty being saved as unknown in my calendar.

Everything worked fine until the last update, then I started having problems with my Galaxy A5 smartphone ("Unfortunately RosterBuster has stopped") & my Tab S ("Internal error occurred, please try later"). I've removed myself from being a Beta user, reinstalled the basic app & so far, it's working again. Tip: don't join the Beta group!

Junk. 3 months and they can't fix any of my problems the biggest being my inability to download flights on my roster. I can't even get a refund. Edit thank you for your quick reply to my review, if only you could fix the problem as quickly. Double edit still not working...

Very useful app, I've been using it for a couple of years BUT it always seems to bug in certain things everytime. Like now it's not connecting and updating with Google calendar which is a problem also my friends are facing. Edit 17/Apr/2021: Now it's syncing with Google Calander. Edit 28/Apr/2021: 1 star because the roster is not updating anymore, this is frustrating!

I'm not going slate this... If you work for certain places and the integration reads your rostering system correctly then this is a great tool. At my last company it worked great. But... Working for United. It fails to read the roster miserably. Not even close so I'm giving up

I have been using RosterBuster since 2016 haven't had any problems with app, other than 3yrs ago I switched to smaller cargo airline which isn't on their list. But website sync with use Google Chrome Extension of RosterBuster works perfectly fine. And I don't know why so many bad reviews off late...... Hey RosterBuster Ladies/Gents if you are still working just say something about your reviews

It worked for 2 weeks to a month. Then it just shows "404 Forbidden" with the free version. FCview is a much better app for your schedule. Update, it seems to be working better now. I am able to sign in and it updates daily. Shows me who I am working with only if they have the app too.

Used to be great but now the app gives me an error when trying to sync my roster and the company ignores my support tickets. They answered the first one saying uninstall and reinstall but that didn't fix anything. Haven't heard anything since.

Filled with add and popups on paid subscription product: participate to win, use our logbook etc. Make these go away, otherwise canceling subscription. Also, compared to competition (crew connect, becrew), 10 step roster download procedure instead of competitors 1-click download. Do better!

Having used RB for many years, my airline at tge time endorsed RB and my data was integrated into a corporate account. Having left that airline, all of my data was kept within the corporate RB account and cannot be transferred back to my personal RB account (where most of it was added originally anyway!). GDPR failings.

Doesn't work with Raido, staff unable to answer queries. App is now lacking basic functionality and is unable to correctly display roster. Entire duty days are omitted as it rest days are ignored and not displayed. Crew names duplicated, times do not update, and sometimes it displays 3 different report times.

Worst app with worst customer service, i have issues going on with downloading roster from couple months and sent couple emails to support team and opened couple tickets but no help till now...only response i get "we are looking into it" and no solution...feels like I'm being robbed ...don't waste your money....worst app for Android

It was a nice app when it worked. The last few times when I tired to save my schedule, it would not. Manual input is a nightmare. Now I've lost track of my hours. And trying to stop the premium payment is just as tedious. Never again.

The support team is very nice and helpful, I was surprized to see that they are acting so efficient. The app works very good. If your roster is on the pdf and it is difficult to read, you can upload it manualy in the ics format. The app interface is very friendly.

When I try to log into my crew portal / roster it tells me authorisation has failed. I have tried 3 different ways to upload my roster & nothing is working. also tried contacting customer service with no response. Annoying as paying for the full version but its not working!!

I have an active subscription that is paid and visable on play store. However in App it keeps saying go premium. When I click it says I already have an active subscription and says I must manage the account on play store. This also does nothing. I contacted them twice for support but there is nothing.

Horrible!!!!! App hasn't worked since Jul 2023 paid for premium acct. At $30 for premium service, I feel this is stolen money. Not only isn't it working as of Mar 2024, I've emailed the problem to them. They responded with a prescriptive answer and didn't try to fix the problem. Only, we'll get back to you. I can't even take back the one star.

Ease of use was the initial reason for selection #rosterbuster as my app of choice to sync my roster and the connectivity to other friends in the aviation industry... but what strikes me now is customer support and continuous upgrading of the app... keep at it and thank you!

Just as I wrote a great review everything has been going wrong..havent used the app since October 2019 as it never uploads my roster correctly, giving empty days when i have flights..or giving me layovers when I dont do them..Or the best was destinations like australia where my airline doenst even fly too. They say they are trying to fix the issue since Oct 2019 and will get back to me but havent heard from them since and would now like a refund for the months I havent used it....

It used to be great. For the last two weeks, it won't login anymore. Not just me but most of my airline colleagues have the same issue. I have contacted customer support, and I'm being ignored. I have paid the subscription for an app that I can't even login.

This new update doesnt allow me to ever open a pdf doc without exporting it to RB! I can't even open any pdf file anymore. Also: my pick-up times are not loaded in RB anymore and they used to be there in the previous version. So please fix this if you want airline crew to keep using your applictation.

The latest update only allows integration with a single calendar via a webcal link which doesn't sync with Google calenday when I update my roster. Previous versions allowed integration with Google Calendar, Webcal and Ios calendars simultaneously. With the latest update, it renders the whole point of RB - seemless integration of my roster into my calendars pointless. Dissapointing given the subscription was paid annuallya and features are removed during the year. Tech support arent helpful.

RosterBuster is awesome. I can check my flight schedule, see who I'm flying with, message my crew (if they are on RosterBuster), see if there is KCM at the overnight airport, view my hotel information and so much more that I haven't even gotten to try yet. AMAZINGLY easy to use.

This app is not fit for purpose. Probably one of the weakest roster integration solutions. I paid for premium and the ability to import contacts doesn't work, and the feature to link Facebook friends is completely missing . Tech support unresponsive after 10 days and counting.

Used to be a great app. For the last few weeks it won't allow me to export my calendar which is pain for when I want to check my schedule and can't sync it with my life!!! Support telling me there's nothing wrong when this literally changed overnight....clearly by no fault of my own?!

Urgent help needed. Don't know what happened, seems it no longer able to get logged in and download my latest roster. Unable to get hold of you through the support tab. I am now have no intention to renew my subscription of RosterBuster. Please cancel my auto renew if there is any.

The only thing they update all the time is the payment method. Reported fee bugs for months never fixed. Now uploading schedule from ecrew is not working unless you manually download to your mobile then manually upload. To do that, i can keep the schedule on my mobile as a screenshot or pdf . Why waste money on premium. Customers support never responding on time or giving updates. I regret paying for it.

I have a full subscription paid until march 2020 but since my airline changed how to display the roster I can't use the app, even now if I download the roster I just get half the flight and most of them are messed up. Very disappointed.

Downloading the latest roster keeps giving fail, Reply: it's still giving authorization fail from the option (download the latest roster) red color, at home page. I am sure about the password and all but I think it's technical problem.

Not bad, not amazing. Too expensive tho. $4 per month for a few kinda handy but not amazing features. No one I know keeps it beyond the free trial based on its silly price. $5 a year and so many people would actually buy that.

Last 3 weeks, I have been receiving the "Forbidden 403" error message every time I try to download the roster from Flica. The ticket has been submitted. I've uninstalled/reinstalled, etc. Hope there's a fix.

Loving this app. I am slightly dyslexic which is no fun at all as flight crew, Rosterbuster lays it all out in a really user friendly format. Very easy to import your roster - loads of extras - check out the current weather in the city's you'll be going to, distance covered etc. Cheers RB, keep adding cool stuff :)

The app was initially good, it now doesn't download my roster in any format, which is the entire point of the app. I've contacted customer support numerous times and get a word salad response with no substance. The app continues to effectively be useless.

Most of the time the app worked flawlessly until recently it will only download my schedule from January and nothing else. There needs to be an option to set the date for when you want to download your schedule.

Dear RB! I'm begging you to ADD FEATURE for real-time notification when your roster is changed and option to acknowledge changes. Also FIX a bug that the app keeps sending notifications WHILE I'M ON DUTY that "your roster has been updated with changes" just because we arrived at a different time than what was planned in AIMS. This makes the app a nuisance. Only send notification if the roster is changed BEFORE the duty and NOT DURING the duty due to delay! Fix these and u will be the best app
A pretty good app. I use it as a quick way to view my roster without having to log in to my airline roster system. It is also great to see when I am on an overnight with another crewmember

Was working well until suddenly inhave problem with renewing the subscription thru playstore. It just doesn't work. I am still able to process other payments/subscription with the same means except roster buster. Pls help.

playStoreReviews.text: From a trainee perspective, the updates are awesome. I love being able to track my lifting progress and look back at how much I've lifted in the exercises the week before. The issue is that this feature doesn't work for some of the exercises, which is frustrating because the important exercises are what I need to look back at and I have to go back to using a notepad, making this feature still ineffective. Please fix it so ALL EXERCISES are capable of saving history and I'll change my rating.

Trainerfu has certainly been a solid piece of equipment in my excercise routine. Staff is helpful, responds quickly and motivated to help me achieve my fitness goals. As far as the app; user face is very friendly, ability to keep up with past/present sessions helps to track progress, ease to connect to myfitnesspal and many other features makes this a useful tool to continue in my fitness goals.

My wife and I have been using TrainerFU for a few years now. It was a positive and good experience for our businesses and clients. However this past year we both have had issues where our client list would disappear. We had no access to open, update, our run a professional business. Each time we had to reach out to Apple support to get the app fixed. The owner didn't take the time or effort to respond. Also we have been billed differently each month. One month its$30 then next its $48.

Love the way it helps you keep in touch with your progress and your coach! It's been very helpful. Just had it 3 weeks and I've been able to see myself transform with my trainer's challenge. Only thing I couldn't figure out was changing the workouts. Otherwise great app to use!

I'm enjoying the app. TrainerFu has help me keep my clients on track and relay information between us. Everything is in one spot. I have introduced this app to other trainers in my gym and they all are amazed on the functionality of TrainerFu.

Bug finally fixed. Initially great, but ... I now have only one visible workout on my android device, but my ipad shows one for everyday of the week. My trainer says it is a problem with android devices and he has other clients with the same issue. I have messaged TrainerFu twice now if the last 6 months about the problem but no body has replied! Hopefully this will get a response and more importantly a solution. I am NOT taking my ipad to the gym!

Love it i have been using trainerfu for two days with my first client and can't fault it best app for everything I need to help keep my client up-to-date with new exercises and the correct way to do it and it always helps me with how they are going with their routine and change it to suit them 5 stars well done

It's pointless. Whenever I try to add a client it says I already have a client that exists with "that" email...... I have 0 clients. Havnt been able to add anyone. Also since I downloaded the app ice been bombarded with spam emails from this app

Works well! User Interface needs a face lift. Communication with your trainer is great and you can see the progress of weight, measurements, workout PRs and mkfe. However the app looks outdated. It would add to the experience of the app looked fresh and clean. The functionality is 💯 so that's why I rate it 4 stars.

This app is great. I love having the videos to see the movements, it's pretty easy to edit and it's simple to track my workouts with! Had a little problem with some small glitches but overall great experience.
I love the functionality of the app. Keeps me on track with my fitness. It's helpful for my personal trainer too to stay in the loop of how I'm doing and he can personalized my goals and objectives.

I've had this app downloaded for a while and really enjoy using it. It's very detail oriented and gives you lots of ways to connect with clients. The HelpDesk was incredible, super responsive and figured out the issue I was having.

I wish it had it's own internal way of tracking food. I use another app for that which thankfully syncs with Trainer FU. Love that my trainer can post videos with the workouts in case I'm unsure on how to perform and exercise.
Awesome! The interaction between my coach and the whole team of athletes is amazing! And being able to track all of my workouts, progress pictures and measurements is great.

The from a trainee perspective and a software engineer perspective, this app is solid. The functionality that is there is strong and reliable and can stand on it's own with little work. The app still seems a little immature when it comes to user interfaces and workout sharing, but that's fixable with a new skin/layout and some user tracking studies. I don't see a way to customize push notifications, which would be super helpful. Either way this is SUPER helpful for trainees. Thanks TrainerFu!
Great app. Only criticism is that the notification never goes away, even after you've opened it. The same notification comes up as a new notification every time you open the app.

With new update, they updated the UX to current design, but broke copying over last workout's numbers, which is a huge deal. No one wants to re-add everything, especially when progressing each week. Fix this functionality, it's incredibly important.

I've been using this app for some years now and it gets the job done. I wish the communication was better with the developers. I only get a response when I want to upgrade but not when I have general questions about client's profiles. The app is pretty basic and straightforward. I'll continue to use it.

Growing up on a farm and wrestling I was always physically fit and did not need to exercise. Fast forward 10 years, I've moved off the farm and no longer wrestle. I was always self conscious about the gym, not knowing if I was doing things correctly. However thanks to this app and my personal trainer I'm learning quickly.
So easy to use. Love that the workouts arw right there and can access video if need be. also like that I can access my coach 24/7 as well as update my stats! Very convenient!!

My reason for the 4 stars is because myFitnessPal does not sync or link to TrainerFu for some reason. Other than that, I like how my coach can setup my workouts on which days and provides a "how to" YouTube video next to the workout assigned to me. Once I complete my workout, it instantly sends details to my coach. It also allows me to edit the workout details such as what weight I used, etc. It allows me to post either a photo or video of my workout for my coach to review my technique.
It used to be really good for me but since the update the graph became straight line. Now my clients can't see properly their results.
It's a good starter app. Creating workouts is nice with the addition of videos. Sadly, after the updated the app has become glitchy. I can't text with clients or modify settings without it freezing.
the app is totally set up differently between android and Apple. Can't get the same features to use the app friendlier. Apple app allows more options than android.

I just remembered that I had previously reviewed this poorly, but that's no longer my opinion. Almost all of the errors & things have been fixed at this point, & they've continued to improve the software.
