Like this I can't see what they did on their last workout and can't use what I prepared for them. For a paid programme, this bug is a little too much! Fix it, guys!

I'm new to Personal Training, However, I've been using this App since the beginning of the year. After months of use, for some reason, as of recent, I am not able to upload more than one set for each exercise, which defeats the purpose of logging in the workout! ie: when establishing the number of sets and reps for the Bench Press, for example..., I can type in 4 sets, type in the number of reps for each set, and type in the amount of weight per set... But the system defaults to the 1st set.

I do find this app helpful for providing workouts to clients, however there are a lot of glitches to the app. Sometimes after I publish my workout, it will completely change what I did and I'll have to re-eneter everything which takes up a lot of extra time. I like having the demonstration videos but I've had a difficult time being able to add my own demonstration videos like you're supposed to be able to do. There are also some features that I wish the app had that it doesnt.

A MUST HAVE FOR SELF EMPLOYED TRAINERS! This app really does make it super easy to create online programs for clients. From the catalog of exercises to the ability to add in your own plus link a video to your own demonstration! You can emil your program to clients which happens to be in the exact excel spreadsheet format I have used for years. And thats just the exercise & programming aspect. You can also add daily tasks, record nutrition, EVERYTHING!... Granted I am only a week in, I love it!

Seems great so far! Scheduling could be a little more in depth as far as setting set recurring schedules for certain clients or being able to easily copy and roll your schedule week to week but otherwise great! Should save anything entered as a draft in case you accidentally click out so you dont lose info and have to re enter.

It's great but the guided play back sucks. You cant skip ahead, go back to previous exercises or start from where you left off. I have accidentally closed the play back close to the end and I'm stuck starting again or manually timing stuff. Heaven forbid your phone change orientation because that will also restart the guided play back. Would be nice to have those options. Android version sucks.

I had a problem with the messages option, the app shuted down every time I try to send a message, so I wrote a message to FitSW team to see if they could fix it. In less than 48 hours the did everything until they fix my problem. Great support service, very professional and efficient. And the app is excellent for me as Personal Trainer! Highly recommend it. Well done guys.

Just can't use this app. I've tried it a few times as I like certain things about it, but the usability is just not great. Maybe I'll try again, I've been using Trainer Plus but the search facility on the exercise library is shocking and you have to build programs on a desktop site so mobile usability is not great on there either. Basically I am yet to find a decent mobile app where I can build exercise programs

Extremely useful for tracking workouts and progress. My complaint is that it will oftentimes, when I open up the app, tell me that I have to log out and in once again. Apparently, it happens to my personal trainer as well. Please fix, because otherwise, this would be a 5 star review!

Giving it 5 star cause i liked the easy interface for my clients and its aesthetics. It would be much more better if you add a rating for every workout of my client. Like after my clients marks their workout as completed, i would want to know how easy was it for them on a scale of 1-10. This little piece of information will help every trainer to make changes in the workout. Second: in standard nutrition, the max value is 20 for macros which is very low. Let the trainer decide the macros.

Outstanding app for working with a personal trainer. Love that I can message my trainer, see my workouts, and see my progress all in one place. Would be five stars if nutrition/macros were easier to track on the app. I have to use a separate app (cronometer) to track those. But I'm overall very happy with my experience.

I like this app because of the variety of exercises and the videos, and that I can assign workouts for my clients to do on their own. Edit: I originally complained about an issue that I was having with the software not saving information or displaying client progress. I was planning to cancel my subscription. However, the developer reached out to me right away to ensure the problem was fixed. I appreciate the service and willingness to make things right. I will keep my subscription! Thanks!

Not bad but definitely has a long way to go. Routine kept changing excercises, had to update 3 separate weeks & was with client. Not very professional. No where 4 client to add notes on routines just excercises so 4 ex. if they mark not complete we can track why, can't put in rep range 8-12 shows up as -4, would be nice if updates came through app not email or at least is an option, cant change time zone in settings sent client message at 11 EST showed as 8, needs auto-erase 4 faster data input

It's an awesome platform, definitely a good one for a new or beginning trainer. You are able to really design how the workout and diets are supposed to happen. It also gives the client something to look at and have with them 24/7 as a reminder.

Very good app for personal trainers & health coaches who want to monitor & track progress of their clients. Can customize nutrition plans & workout plans. Has health assessment tracking also. Lots of features. Would give it a 5 star if it included mass text /group text capability. Customer support is responsive when a tech issue comes up. Good job!

No way to upload existing workouts or programs which means you start from scratch creating each workout on the device. I lost interest after getting halfway through creating my first week. Unnecessarily tedious. Login is finicky as well. Great features for adding and tracking clients but needs the ability to upload templates

The fitness coordinator of my fire department sets up workouts for me through this app. Very user friendly, great ability to track metrics and communicate with my trainer. Instructional videos that are added are very helpful and you can access them on the fly without having to back out of your workout. great app!

Garbage app - keeps crashing when trying to open progress pictures. Support is pretty useless, they keep sending "we are checking" generic responses to support requests and no resolution. 10 days today and they are not able to fix a simple bug

Non starter! The calendar function for entering date of birth requires you to scroll month by month. Setting up a new client age 60 requires over 700 clicks of the "back arrow " just to get to his year of birth!! Another example of poor design and programming.

App is really Solid, a great tool for the price If your a small bussiness like one. Having a schedule where I can book clents Sessions and classes is fantastic, Somthing Some of the other high and apps are lacking. The only thing I need (and what stoped a 5 star review ) is when programing i'd like it if the reps and kg had their own Seperation box or a drop down.Separating them with a Comma Can be confusing for my clients. other than that its great!

Very good concept and super helpful for private personal trainers. However, ever since the last update my app as well as my clients app keeps crashing trying to view the workout. I hope it will be updated soon because i just subscribed for 15 clients.
This app never works correctly. Its takes forever to load when it does decide to load. Never able to login and if you do it takes another hour to load the actual workouts

There is no way to chat with support team or timely response for your queries or mails ( do they need more than 24 hours?). The support team needs to be more active. This app can reach heights if it corrects few things in which it lags.. as at this lockdown time many fitness experts have started guiding online and need such apps. I was thinking to upgrade but now i doubt i will.

Its an awesome app to use. Being able to see the work out demo so i could correct my form. Keeping my past work out results so i can see the progress Ive made. This is app is a great if you are working towards your fitness goals!

I used the app for a few months. Its over priced and keeps hanging. Even after unsubscribing to the app and deleting the account i was charged for it and even though it's been almost 2 weeks, they said they would refund my amount. I still havent recieved it.

Can't add clients. The message "invalid user ID" pops up with no information on what the user ID is. Can't even upload a picture to the client "error picking up image" Immediately resolved. Very happy with the app.

Good features but the dates are not in order. I put in workouts and tasks and it shows September 2022 before August and July 2022. Even when I sort by date, no idea how to fix it as it forces me to enter the dates when I publish. Very confusing for me and clients.

So far the app is exactly what I have been looking for. I have only been using it for a week, but I would really like a way to look at the same workout from the week prior to check weight and reps without out having to leave the current workout.
Overall ok for a freebie 😊. So far I've had to enter all the names of my exercises. That's the tedious bit, but I'm waiting for feedback from my clients to hear how they're finding it too

This app/program has come a loooonnggg way. I'm so glad I stuck it out. I am a personal trainer and nutrition coach. This program is golden for me and my clients. I absolutely love all the updates. Great job FitSW team!! I appreciate you all.

Trialed this for my clients. Not much works on it. Too many to mention but my main beef is cutting a portion in half results in zero macros. Awful messaging app. Client received a notification but once click on it does not go to the message.

2 stars because hes showing me that i have 2 clients already. But on profile of my client is just blank & when i delete the profile it appears again. So i cant manage 2 clients atm, only one. Thats why 2 stars, til the bug is fixed
So Far it's really going well, very easy to follow and fill out information. I'll definitly use this app for my clients, the upgrade prices are very resonable as well. Keep up the great work!!!
what's going on with this app??? I often have to uninstall and re-download the app to log on. And NOW, IT DOESN'T WORK AT ALL!!!
great with the app my desktop could be better when building a program when switching workouts. other things to is to give my clients paperwork to fill out.. all set great customer service 👍

Very useful app. Juste if they can add a meal plan temples and if we can see in real time the macros and cals wen we add food in the meal plan. And other languages like french Otherwise its very useful
Pretty flexible app and useful for basic training. Probably could be a little sexier and may be some tweaks to improve the user interface but it does a good job.

Its a bit broken...cant put info for more than 4 sets in, tabbing from reps to weight take me from reps back to notes making it impossible since it doesnt allow me to scroll freely while keyboard is active.

Easy to use as a one on one trainer and for an online trainer. Would prefer testing the app on more than 2 clients during the trail mode. We will look at the app on studio /gym mode at the end of this trial.
app is great for tracking certain things and communication between you and your trainer. However, there are a great deal of glitches and bugs to be fixed before I would give 5 stars.

I like that I can provide my clients with a online program, assessment, schedule etc what I dislike about the app is that in order for you to do live video training, group classes you need to upgrade. Once that is done they dont advise you that u must be able to use stripe otherwise you cant use those features . Which is crappy and I have to pay for something I cant use mxm dont get this app useless .... what makes it more crappy is that no body response when u contact them .
I'm brand new to the career of personal training and this app has really helped with organization, not to mention the library of exercises that they keep on account.
Used for the first time. Easy to keep track of workout. I found the brief instructional video of each exercise very helpful.
Cant believe this is free! Excellent app, valuable data and easy to work with. Only thing I would advise is to hire u IX designer to make the app look more appealing and simpler to use.

The current bugs are very annoying! Cannot track progress while in a day exercise as they keep on resetting! Pls fix Still the sams issue on 1.76.08!! All new bugs logged with their helldesk already! Still they ask to log errors!
App was great first couple of weeks. Now I can't see my clients programs and workouts. I cant even see my client list. Fix this please or refund me my money.
When adding the exercises to superset. The system crash and all the exercises jumble up. So frustrating. A 15mins program plan takes 1 hour.
was working decently well. but recently cannot open app at all. only access through website. crashes everytime app is launched....fixed!!!
I like the simplicity of the app and how i can connect with my trainer. Im able to get my workouts with demo which makes it easier for me to know what to do and how to do it correctly. Great app
What an awesome app! I had never heard of FitSW until my personal trainer started using it with me. So much great health and fitness information - all in one place. Loving this!
Great app. For the beginner's like me it's great to be able to challengenew record and compete against yourself. Great workouts already set for you!

I like the app because it is a motivation for me to start moving to do my workouts so I could lose the weight which I set to lose. I gave this app five stars because it is really helping me in a big way
The app allows you to watch demos if you don't know how to do the listed excersie. This app is incredibly help for me and I'm sure plenty others.
Almost perfect. Just wish I could add short videos or at least start and finish pics directly on the app without having to link to YouTube.
Had an issue early with it, sent in feedback and was fixed within a day. Still learning all the ins and outs. But would definately recommend!

The biggest problem with this app is there is no customer service which is a shame because it looks to have lots of potential. I was going to upgrade, but since I have no support and guidance I will have to leave and find another app
Affordable and it is everything I need to train my clients in one app! Best app for trainers I have found after a long search.
Nice app. Never knew about it until my trainer started using it. Easy to use and has basically everything needed for a good and safe workout.
i can't just add my clients workouts. The app requires their email addresses and passwords. my clients won't appreciate. uninstalling program.
I like the app buuuuuutt, I'm constantly having to go in an edit each workout due to wrong # of sets, reps and weights.
The app does everything I need it to do and it's a great link between myself and my trainer. its not perfect but the developer has been really responsive to questions and requests.
Unable to sign up as trainer. Kept getting an error message that something went wrong.
Best app for freelance personal trainers, this app helped me in my hardest time and I thank them for the great work..
it doesn't have everything, but it is a damn good app to organise your clients and save time.
Great so far! Easy to manage and set specialized programs and exercises.
Thank you for being prompt in your response. Except I have now paid for the upgrade but hasn't send me a code and just taken money. I would really love this app to work.
very interactive app, informative, better than the apps for big name fitness brands, it even features medical history!!!
My trainer was able to resolve my login issue. I also want to mention that the customer service response I received was very important to me and appreciated
Great easy to use app. Has some minor bugs but overall reliable. Me and my trainer love it's ease of use!
Great app, it can be customized to specific needs and is also affordable for smaller businesses
Being using since 2019 till today August 29 2020 and I love it a few hiccups in the logging in but apart from that I love it!
great app. the only minor problem I have is that it lags sometimes and it won't log me in. Great work!
this app totally sucks. huge fail from the last version. has to reinstall every use
Fit Sw is such a complete platform with so many great features. It has enabled me to add many more clients to my business thanks to its effectiveness and efficiency!
Easy to set up. Everything is perfectly set up and easy to find/use. 10/10
its good i feel the food part needs some work and also you should make a how to video tips and tricks
Things are good except for messaging. I am not receiving messages and I have the updated version.
It was rough but great because I haven't stretched like this in very long time, after while it became very relaxing.
good app, have a few issues with reordering the exercises when designing a workout
This app sucks. It has a terrible UI and is frustrating to use. Pick a different fitness app.
Im a trainer trying to set up this app for me and my clients. Its not allowing to set up or log in. I have an android. This app doesnt work for androids??
Great app for personal trainers. Gives all the great features other apps offer for frws
Hard to rate as an still setting up.... & first client entered has now disappeared
So easy to track my workouts , nutrition, and anything I could need...makes my busy mom life so much easier!
I tried a other apps. But this one is very user friendly for myself and clients.
The diet section seems to cause the app to crash. Other than that its great
Is there an option to add our own exercises? There isn't enough variety to choose from
Great Application , to have communication with your client or Trainer freely.
Janet Franklin I was skeptical at first but it keeps you accountable with trainer also. I just recommend trying it out.
This app has been a time saver for trainers! Keep up the good work
Excellent app. My personal trainer is amazing. Helped me tremendous. Thank you.
Easier to understand and track. keeps you on track.
Easy to use, great help in my weekly training.
cant copy workouts every im entering a workout regiment it crashes and doesnt even the progress this is bull
Great workout coach. Excellent links to demo video clips
I love that I can keep track of everything. my time, reps....its awesome
Really great tool for the personal trainer !!! Would highly reccomend !!

I've been using RepCount to track lifts since 2022. I definitely recommend it if you're looking for a workout tracker that doesn't try to babysit you. It has a clean, straightforward, and easy to use UI. It works great on both Android and IOS, and it's easy to access my data on different devices. The only feature I wish it had is desktop synchronization. Overall an amazing workout tracker that I'll continue to use for years to come.

This app is amazing! I just started using the basic one yesterday, but it has already helped me see directly what I need to do at the gym and the goals obtained for the day. Setting up the training program is super easy and I love the fact that one can change, add or delete and adjust as necessary, right after doing each exercise. Superbly thought out and easy to use! Great job!

I had to play around with the app to figure out how it works, a quick tutorial would be nice. I love that I can add custom excercises and routines. I like using the timer to time my reps. Its very easy to access on the screen. I like that I can even add stretches to have a warm up routine! This is a great app! No ads too!

Pretty cool app, I love that I can just enter the workout that I want without having to deal with some pre-filled template. It also automatically records how long your sessions are, you just set when you ended. It also automatically saves your entries as you make them, that is just awesome! I just wish it weren't a subscription service, I prefer to just buy access with a one-time payment.

I love the way I can record my workout and gradually improve. I am new to weight lifting so the animations help me learn to do the lifts the right way. The rest timer is easy to use and very helpful for consistency. Lots of room for growth for me and this does a great job helping me do so progressively. I can make my own custom exercises as well and track those. Just right!

I absolutely love this app, I didn't think I used to need a workout tracking app but as I got more serious in the gym this has become an absolute lifesaver to track my progress from day-to-day and week-to-week. also just to organize my different routines from upper-body and lower-body, way simpler and easier than any other method out there.

I love this app so much. For all of the people complaining about the lack of pre-loaded exercises: it's meant to be FLEXIBLE. You get to add and edit exercises, which I love—it really let's me make my own routines. I love that I can leave notes for myself on specific days or exercises, because I'll sometimes have forgotten why I made a change by the next time I get to that exercise and I can use this as a reminder. I'll be getting the premium sometime this year for sure and I can't wait!

The simplicity is unmatched. Every other workout app either forces you to do this in app timed BS that you constantly have to manage during the workout, and they are often unbelievably annoying to maneuver through. This app opens on the training log though with easily recognizable options, and you can easily find your exercises to log thanks to simply organized categories. It has only the extra features you need though, like short notes and a workout finish reminder if you forget to click it.

simple and easy to use with nice statistics on workouts I wish you could log weight separately though. Edit: Recently data from the previous workout is not being applied when added to a workout. I have to manually look at the history of the certain workout to see what weight I did on X workout. Edit: the bug was fixed, back to five stars 💪

I've been using the premium version of this app for years and it's fairly simple to use and has done job for my clients and I. Some features differ from android to iPhone which can be inefficient sometimes. Also, the graphs may be a bit complicated to read and navigate depending on who you are but if you just want to log your workouts and keep track of your overall volume and exercises, this is fine.

This is the best Workout tracking app I have ever used! The fact that the app was built so Agnostically that you can literally track any activity you can conceive with any format that makes sense to you...It's Exceptional! I also love the way the app shows Rep and Weight Suggestions based on your past workouts, as well as the graphical representations of the data. I don't work out without it now. Well Done. You ever need to do usability testing, let me know!

Great app, one critical flaw. On Android, the timer doesn't give an audible cue (or shut of the music) unless your phone is unlocked and the app is in focus. I lock my phone between sets so I can put it into my pocket during rests without accidentally touching stuff on it. Timer should make an audible sound through the audio channel regardless.

My only issue with this app is that it randomly rotates despite my phone set to lock screen rotation and it's like impossible to change it back without turning on autorotate, rotating phone, then turning it off again. it's SO annoying in the middle of my workouts. It should respect device settings. Will change to 5 star if they fix that. Android user.

The free version is more than enough if you want to just track your lifts and lifts are updated automatically to the last weight you changed. It does not have annoying pushy advertising for the paid version, although i will donate to them if possible. Had no issues so far. The guys who made this app are a huge W

Easy and to the point. I don't need anything fancy or anything to do my routine although this one does. It also allows me to do my own routine and it's super easy to track. Highly recommend for the no nonsense workouts

Fantastic app, I really only have one complaint. Replacing an exercise mid session doesn't automatically adjust the amount of sets to how many you usually do for the new exercise. Say I usually do 4 sets of unilateral curls, but the machine is busy, so I replace it with 2 sets of unilateral dumbbell curls. The first two sets are correctly adjusted after weight and reps, but then the two extra sets from the 4 set exercise are just left there empty for me to manually remove.
this app works just as good as a pen and paper to track what weights one is lifting. it would be nice if there was an option to buy and unlock the app but all that's offered is a BS subscription.
Very easy to use. Need to add more exercises
absolut the best option for free users, and I tried them all, a gift to the world

user since 2022, the app is great and all but can the developer update the ui a bit like make it show if we're progressing with upward arrows and fix the warmup sets logging problem where when you log a working set weight next time it shows on the warmup sets column and maybe add ai assistant suggestions and stuff for premium users that's all and thank you !

This is exactly what I needed. No one telling me what to do, just logging and tracking my own progress. Great reminder during workout, simple and intuitive.Too bad they don't have a lifetime unlock option . If I can unlock it once, then I don't regret it when I don't use it for a while. And I have a very bad experience canceling subscription.

Wow! I am so impressed! Finally a straightforward workout log. No exercise programs or extra clutter. Everything is tweaked to perfection so the inputs can be entered as fast as possible. It includes reusable routines, convenient timer and useful statistics. Also one of the very few apps that can properly track bodyweight exercises (allowing for no weights input).

Absolutely fantastic app, perfect even for the free version to keep track of workouts. I'm just getting back into lifting after a couple of decades off and this app is perfect for keeping track. One suggestion, when adding exercises - having the ability to upload a photo to the exercise would be really helpful. I'm getting my workouts from magazines and sometimes having a picture to reference the exercise would be helpful.

Really liking this app. When I can afford it I will likely jump into the subscription. A quick and easy simple log of my workouts was exactly what I was looking for. I was "winging it" on lifting days because I didn't want to bring a pad and pen to the gym and I did NOT want someone's recommended workouts... Just basic bodypart, exercise, weight and reps. Thanks for making this.

I've been using this app for 6mths now & love it. It's simple yet allows options like drop sets, adding any exercise by reps, distance, time, tracks prev workouts well, so very flexible. The only minor thing missing for me is an expand/collapse feature when in your routine so you dont have to scroll through all sets & exercises to get to your next set to record reps. well done to the developers.

Excellent app, especially for a newbie like me. If I could make a suggestion? If links could be enabled in the notes section. Sometimes you come across a workout that's different you want to try, or an alternative to one you're doing. It's great trying to describe a workout, but it's better if there's a link to remind you of form and technique on a web page or video. Other than that no problems hear! Enables quick input of reps and sets with stored information regarding previous exercises.

I have tried most of the gym logging apps available between 2000 - 2023. This is is the best one. I can use the super set function to create both super sets and drop sets. It is simple to navigate and use with a logical layout. My font size needs to be big so it did cause me a slight issue with creating names when editing lists but this isn't something you need to do more than once. I did contact developer for help and they responded quickly. I paid for a year after using free. It is worth it.

So far so good 👍 I am currently on the free version for the moment but the app does what it says. A minor heads up and suggestion though: The pushup exercice seems to be missing? I could just manually add it but I found it weird since pull-ups were present within the list. It would be nice to be able to add our own categories like mobility for people who want to improve their flexibility via stretches (bridge and twist hold progressions). All in all a good app with an intuitif interface.

I took 5 minutes to think about what to write here, since the app is really good. For me it does everything you need without any bloatwear, it works as good as pen and paper, which might not seem hard to find, but trust me, it is. Plus you have a neat timer. If you pay for premium you will also get a beat graphs to track your progress which is not necessary and I bought it more to support the app, also the superset function you get with it is neat! I recommend this app wholeheartedly!

meh, pretty useless without paying a subscription. to respond to the dev - you can't see charts, you can't see weights at a glance (got to click into individual sets), can't export your data, forced to create an account for some unknown reason. basic functionality such as copying is locked behind the subscription the app "fitnotes" does everything this app does, for free with an optional one off payment. I also own my data, can use charts etc. sorry to say your app is not worth £5 a month.

Edit: Devs responded in email regarding this and showed me i was missing the button to do so. This has made it 5 stars and responsive devs. Suggestion to make the ability to add categories of exercises instead of being tied to only the base ones. For example i train forearms which i have to clump with bicep exercises. This is the only feature missing that would make me fully satisfied with the app, other than that its amazing in a lot of ways so try it out.
Free, tracks my workouts, can leave notes, can add exercises. it's basically everything you need
used it for 2 ish years now great for keeping track of strength, workouts, reps and sets massive help especially when it comes to staying consistent on a workout plan
It does everything you need without extra junk and does it well. Very satisfied for over 8 years.

I've used this app a lot and it's great. Only way this app could be better is if it would allow users to add more body parts such as neck, or be more specific per body part like upper/lower back, quads/hamstrings etc. Otherwise very easy to use and probably the best app to use for tracking your progress. Would be great if you could make routines based on time as well instead of just reps and sets. For example do jumping jacks for 30 seconds rest for 10 and so on with more exercices.
This is great! I wanted something to track my reps to see my progress and this app delivers. No telling you what to do. 👍👍

Decent app but i feel the data could look way better. The charts are too small and hard to read. It would be cool to have a weekly volume section on the whole body with a model of person that is colour coded to show what we hit more. Also being able to put workouts in folders would be really useful because after a while it starts to look taky.

Exactly what ive been looking for! Ive been searching for years for a simple app to log workouts I rarely purchase apps as most ive found have been complicated and take too long to log in the gym With this app, i downloaded, starting working out, loved the free version and how easy it is to navigate. within 10 mins of using i purchased full version as its great value for money and everything ive been searching for to track my progress. I wish i had found this sooner! Perfect!

Super useful for tracking what you're lifting, when you start a workout it shows you what weight you lifted last time, the reps you did last time and any notes you made so you can see if there's been any improvement. It's really simple and easy to use and the best part is that there's no ads. There's a database for exercises which is pretty limited, I wish they would add to that. As well as this, schedule would be good so you know what to do on each day but aside from that it's perfect!

It's okay. I don't like that there are no videos, extensive database of workouts to search from, or a way to schedule workouts on a calendar, especially since it is a paid subscription. Also, when adding in notes, it keeps duplicating it on the superset, although I typed in two different notes.. Hopefully I'm not missing something.

this app does not do what it says. you'd think that based on the name you can just go in and count reps. no, instead you get onboarded with modals, promoted for premium, lead to create and exercise.... and theres a timer button, but they won't let you use it without allowing notifications... this app is the epitome of ensh**ification

Great, simple app for tracking workouts. Kuddos to the developer. Although the app is great, I don't think it justifies a monthly fee, but the free version is good and provides a decent feature set. Shame there isn't a lifetime pro version because I'd definitely pay for it (bought that on iOS 8 years ago).

All I was looking for was an APP to track random exercise reps. Surprised there weren't more out there! I came across repcount and it's exactly what I was looking for! Easily customizable to suit anyone's needed. Also, the support from the company is great and very responsive!! Thank you!!!

Once again has the same problem as all the other fitness apps the most basic things are hidden behind a paywall why can't I just see how many push-ups I've done today without having to pay I wouldn't mind a banner ad at the bottom if I don't have to pay to see how many push-ups I do. Google Fitness does it for free it's just got the worst user interface alive

App was working perfectly. Now crashes all the time. Won't let let me input any new workouts. Can't type more than one letter at a time without the keyboard disappearing. Can't save workouts as new routines without crashing. Such a shame. Will have to cancel my subscription and find a new app to use.

Amazing app, one thing id wish it had - it's possible to insert a comma to the weight text box but not to the rep textbox. Sometimes on the same set I'll drop the weight. Having a way to concisely write the reps of the dropped weight (with the comma) could really be helpful. Or ever half reps such as LLP's could be considered as "half reps"

Great app. It lets you save your workouts so you don't have to remember for next time, and it's easy to enter data. There are a decent amount of exercises included in the app, but if you want to add your own, it's extremely easy. Excellent customer support system as well. 100% would recommend.

This app is exceptional and incredibly useful for tracking workouts and monitoring progress. I use it every time I exercise, and it has significantly contributed to my fitness journey. I highly recommend it to anyone looking to stay organized and motivated in their workouts.

Great workout tracking app, very easy and simple to use. Good data and graphs if you're into that kind of thing. Timer for resting between sets, and nice to easily see your past history of lifts, and your personal PBs. Would definitely recommend this app.

Great app and very easy to use. I would like to see more exercises as standard though. It would also be nice for the app to include rating your sets based on how difficult they were or how they felt for progression and fatigue management purposes. If these were included I would give 5*.

Exactly what I was looking for. Super simple and easy to use. Love I can also add my own custom exercises into the app which makes someone like me who's new to working use the same naming convention that my trainer uses to educate me on the exercises and machines in my local gym.

No frills workout tracker. Exactly what I needed. All I want is to count weight and reps, and populate the last weight for each new workout. Does it perfectly. Couldn't recommend more if all you want is a basic workout journal.

Feedback: #1 if you accidentally press finish before finishing your workout and say no to to the pop-up it will remove the finish icon. #2 sometimes when you try to edit a routine the way or wraps or whatever you set will be reset. I still can't see your responses 🤷🏾‍♂️

Does exactly what I need it to without any unnecessary bs while still providing charts of my lifts historically and giving pretty accurate 1RM estimations. Have used this every day for years with very minimal hiccups, highly recommended over any other workout tracker out there.

The best app I've found for the way I track my workouts. I just wish it had a calendar layout which showed which muscle groups were targeted on which days (color coded or some other way) like some of the other apps. Otherwise it's pretty neat!

Very user friendly and robust customization even in the free version. I've used this for years and it's perfect for tracking progress across workouts. I especially like leaving notes on sets to remember queues and machine settings. recommend it to anyone

I like the fact that it record your routines, I like the fact that it updates automatically, but wish it had data on all weight lifting exercises. The ones it has helps you perform them correctly, the others I have research out of app for varied routine

I would much like to have an option to add a link to a video or a tutorial article that shows me how to do the exercises. Other than that it's a great app! It the default options available could include them that would be excellent!

I've been using rep count for three years now and I have only ever been overwhelmingly satisfied. I absolutely love all the statistics and how easy it is to make and customize workouts and exercises. The app's creator is also fantastic. I noticed a slight bug in the app so I emailed him and he fixed it a few updates later. I cannot recommend this app enough!

I've found this app extremely helpful for tracking my workouts, progress, exercises, etc. And I've found all of that information to be very helpful for adjusting things in my routine according to performance on a session to session basis.

Love this app. It is very simple to use and easy to track data. The estimated 1 rep max is an amazing feature. However, I wish I could share within the app. A mate of mine also uses this app, but when I send him a workout, I have done or vice versa. It looks over complicated, compared to how simple it is set out in the app. For the most part, I still use this app and recommend it to people I know.
I does exactly what I was looking for: records the sets. The only thing I was missing - change UOMs for the "weight". I wanted to have centimeters for box jumps. other than that, an awesome app.

Great app! Simple and intuitive to use. Would give 5 stars if 1) There was a way to sync with Samsung Health 2) There is a smart-watch app. Wondering if the developers have plans for these, especially for (2). Would definitely be willing to pay for the premium version if (2) is available.

It's very easy to input your workout into the app and I'm a fan of how easy it is to complete the same workout again. However, the already filled in exercises are tailored towards male lifting plans and lack many basic female dominant exercises such as hip thrusts and glute bridges.

perfect for tracking workouts if you want to set up your splits once and quickly log them each time. I love that it brings up what you tracked last time with notes so you just overwrite it - easy to track progression.

Absolutely love this app, really well thought out. If possible it would be great to add a 'share' feature so that you can share workouts with other people that have repcount, so they don't have to create them themselves

Honestly, this is the first tracking app I actually love. Just to add, the Notes feature can be very amusing as I can see all the stupid things I'd tell myself to get some motivation from my previous workouts. Honestly, this is a simple, yet robust app.
Excellent tool, even the free version. Includes rest times and ability to create routines and add exercises. Hopefully, I will get the paid version soon, it seems worth it.

Used to use my notes app, this is 10x better. Pretty much the exact same thing but super organised and quick. Only thing id add is a way to add more categories, since i had to lump in forearms with another category. But thats just a suggestion. Love it 👍

Great for quick easy tracking of weights and reps to see progression. Took a little tinkering to get it to display my routine the way I like, but once in there it's a lot easier than using a notebook.

Easy to use rep counter. Intuitive and great. And free unless you want to pay to get extra features like statistics. One star off as for example Seated EZ bar preacher curl missing but had basic stand-up bar curl which I used instead...
Great app, even the free version!
Best gym app for people who want to add note. I tried so many apps. This one is worth the subscription. Option to add RPE as extra field (instead of text in note) would make it 11/10.
It's an amazing app. The best I had so far. The only thing missing really is a graphical representation of what muscle groups you trained. Like the "Stronger" app does. Pretty please. 🙏

THE workout tracker. Incredibly easy to use and customise, plus ongoing technical support from the developer who is really friendly and responsive. Well worth buying the full version. Support your Devs!

Best, simplest gym track app there is. Used free version for years which is all you need but paying for premium just out of respect for how helpful it is, and extra features (i.e., entire history of your lifts) are nice

The free version was really good, the paid one is a godsent for tracking my workouts. My annual membership expires tomorrow, definitely getting it again. Haven't skipped logging a single session so far

Love how simplistic and yet so customizable it is. Also, the price for the premium version is fair, totally worth the investment if you use the app on a regular basis, but also not completely necessary to enjoy the app.

Awesome app! Easy to set up and use. Only thing I would change is ability to set reps when you set up a workout instead of adding them as you do the workout the first time, but not a big issue really.

I've been a consistent user of RepCount for some time now after the suggestion from a friend and I have always recommended the paid subscription to my friends, and I suggest the same for any fitness fanatic interested in quantifiable gains/results. A simply and beautiful app designed with the user in mind. The high degree of customisation, figures/stats, and UI make this a fantastic app. If you score this less than 5 I'd be interested to see what you've written and why! cracker app 👏

Highly recommend, free version is outstanding: simple, well-designed and functional. With no ads even for the free version this app is a no brainer. Plus ****repcount auto-backup**** /auto-backup to my google drive/ has saved me many a time.

Loving this app. There's a number of well thought out features that are not immediately obvious until you start using it (for example the previous weight/rep hinting), so my suggestion is to really use it and don't be afraid to explore!
Simple, Clean - Great Tracker App. The only thing that's not Amazing is that there aren't a whole lot of exercises available, so be prepared to add them yourself!
Honestly, pretty solid app! Free version does what I need it to do, works every time! Can be used with different accounts to track much more than just your workout regime!!

This app is an amazing free app. It is a great all round app that allows a lot of customization without having a subscription like others that I have used. I would recommend this to anyone and wish that I found it sooner.
Really enjoy the app but one thing that would make the UI much easier to use is if you could go to Edit Categories, then from that page, edit individual exercises in the categories!
great app overall. Really enjoy the logging and it's customizable.
Very easy to use and lets you see what you lifted last time

Out of all my apps, this is the one I use the most. It is so simple to use, and the developer Simon is so receptive to ideas and questions. The best part of this app for me is seeing what amount of weight and reps I did my last routine. 100 out of 10 would recommend using this app!
honestly, this app one of the best applications i have ever used. thanks alot!!

It's one of the best gym apps have you used, it deserves five stars but I'll give it three because the free mode is very limited. If you have money to spend on a gym app then this app is highly recommended.

would rate it higher but requires a subscription to unlock tracking features. I can see a one time payment for an app like this. Subscriptions should be for services that are offering new content daily or weekly.

I love this app and use it to track all my workouts! Help! i just got a new phone and every time I open it fresh it has signed me out forcing me to sign in again and then asking if I want to start my free trial, however, I have already paid for mine until February which it does say if I go in under account. can you help me fix this issue?
Easy to use, great way to track workouts. It would however be good to able to try the charts etc that come with the upgraded version prior to paying for it.

I literally tried about eight other apps similar to this and they were extremely difficult to figure out how to use. This one is very intuitive. I've been using it for a few months now and have no intentions of trying anything else.
Of course it'd be nice if some features - like drop sets - weren't behind the paywall, but the basic functionality is very good once you figure it out.
The paid options look handy, but the free version has enough of the right features, like an in-line timer, to make it totally usable on its own.
Simple app that's very user-friendly. I was made aware of this app from a trainer, and it's been my only source for tracking my workouts and weight. I enjoy it thoroughly.
Brilliant and easy to use. Just found out you can edit and add categories which helps me select exercises based on specific body part training.
This is by far the most flexible and most intuitive tracking app I've tried! I can easily add custom exercises and notes to my routines.

playStoreReviews.text: If I could rate negative or zero I would. ALL11/11/19 cannot access again, payment made 10/24 9/27/19 issues fixed but could happen again. 9/26/19 Payment made 2 days prior but license not current, so I cannot book appointments or register payments. Currently waiting for a resolution after making contact So far I loving it. Haven't had it for very long so still working on understanding everything but it does everything I was wanting plus a few extras.

Wonderful in everyway except one, I want to download it on my Windows 10 pc but can't. (I tried Google solutions with no success). It still gets a 5 star rating. For what you get, (I paid for the license but, the free version is awesome too) its a life saver for me! It put the big picture on a small screen, saves me time with automatic reminders, clients can book themselves online (this is OPTIONAL), I can upload pics to their profiles, no more forgetting a face! TapGroom is underrated.

It's been good so far. There's a couple things I wish it had. I wish there was a way to block certain times off. I wish they had a no call no show or cancelled option and I also wish the times was 4pm not pm before the numbe Edit. There's a glitch when people book the app online. It says failed Also, the online schedule didn't update within the 5 minutes. Sometimes it'll say I have appointments that are booked days in advanced . Please fix this problem

Every single advertisement for Tapgroom says FREE! Nothing is ever mentioned about payment unless you want to use reports, Statistics, Marketing and Accounting! I use the program for just a database and scheduler and suddenly the program locked up and demanded $15 per month! I am really pissed! My client info is in this app and I cannot use it! LIARS!

Super helpful for my salon, only problem is that I have it on both my iPad and Android phone. I purchased the license on my iPad so I can add more than 50 clients. I have everything synced to my phone but I can't add or edit any appointments from my phone unless I purchase the license again. In terms of convenience, that sucks. Overall, it does what I need and runs well. Would like to be able to sync my license across devices though, I'm not paying another $15/month when I can just use my iPad.

I love this app. I'm able to keep detailed records of all my clients and grooms. It makes me look super professional when I'm able to access client records, print receipts. It makes tax time easy as you can enter expenses as you go and keep a digital copy of the receipt

Function ok, too bad it doesn't integrated with Google, only batch imports. Would be great to be able to use you contact autofill new clients and sync with Google calendar. That's how it should be with every other apps out there. Maybe will try again in the future when updated

I would use extream caution buying into this company or using this app! Its definitely easy to use but there is absolutely no customer service, I paid for it and for it and have been trying to reach someone for 2 weeks I've sent over 20 emails sent messages on their Facebook and absolutely nothing. Now I've put my whole business into this and no clue if it's gonna dissappear... Is company going under? Who's taking my money? Will I lose all my data one day? Just not worth it if theres no people!

*edited has problem i was having is now sorted*!Really love this app for my grooming business love the auto reminder text feature and is generally very easy to use however just this week i can now no longer view my 2 schedules side by side for the same day with the all groomers option but now i have to look at one for myself then switch to my colleague which is very annoying i need to be able to see them both side by side? Can i fix this?

Okay. I really don't need "sample groomers" or "clients". I just need myself and my clients. I'm sure there's a simple way to clear these fake customers and groomers out of the app, but honestly, I just want to enter my own information WITHOUT figuring out how to erase an example.

loved the app at the beginning. Now, dogs will be on there one day, then not the next day. or I will schedule a dog, and it will reschedule them for 2 weeks out on top of the one I book, and now I can't sync the app with another groomer. says update app, but Playstore says there is no update
This is the worst app ive ever used, i paid for it, and when you try to add a new customer the app crashes, you get no feedback from customer support. I do NOT recommend this app
Is excellent! But I wish the pictures could be saved entirely the app makes me crop the picture and I can't save the whole photo. But overall is excellent!

Good software with unfortunate MAJOR downfalls. They charge you monthly and there's no way to ever own the software. You're stuck paying them until you inevitably switch to new software. Also, if you have more than one groomer, there's no way to sync data between two devices.  In addition to this, you'd have to pay for an extra license regardless. So if you have two groomers, it would cost over $660 to use this software for 2 years. It's sad that this is such a money-grab, because it functions great.

As the owner of a small salon, I love GrooMore. The software is easy to use and understand. My employees like the ability to check their schedule at any time on their phones. There would be a great advantage to using this app for mobile salons as well. Customer service is the best I've ever worked with. They really care about creating a product that works for your company. GrooMore also integrates with QuickBooks and Square, which makes accounting much easier.

Love this app! I have a small shop from home and it's so perfect for appointments and keeping track of my insights. I especially love the online booking, as it's so easy for my clients to use. The customer service is also amazing, they get back to you right away and they even have an amazing community page on FB for suggestions and to talk about what more we'd like from the app.
the app opens and then immediately closes. can't do anything with the app on your phone. even tried uninstalling and that didn't work. fix it. if I could give 0 stars I would
1/8/2026: Was working fine on my android before the recent update, and now it crashed seconds after opening. Very disappointing. 1/19/2026: still crashing can't open

Does what it needs to. I'm mobile so I need to send my clients invoices when their not home. This app doesn't do that. It only sends it once it's paid. This is something that would be great being mobile. However the smart scheduling is a great asset to have if you're unsure how far a client is from each other.

It's ok but alot of features I don't use. I don't like that the client is messaged from a number that they cannot reach unless we pay for the monthly fee. The texts should come from our business number. I wish they had a "light" version because I literally only want to use it to schedule and thats it.

I am thrilled that there is FINALLY an app that has all the features I need to run my grooming business. My clients tested the online booking today and said it was fast and simple. Customer support is fantastic, timely, and helpful. I was impressed with the free trial before it was close to being up and purchased a plan. The nice thing is they have a Facebook group for users that is helpful and they've been adding features at our request. It's worth every penny.

Just what my business needed. This scheduling/grooming management app is awesome. So many features, profile picture for each pet, automatic reminders, online scheduling with smart scheduling (makes sure customers are close to each, eliminates zigzagging all over town). Tech support is by far the best I have come across. If I am having an issue or wanting a tweak to the system or recommendation to improve it for my business structure they have come through. Highly recommend. Love it 💕

good app, but i would suggest a few more options and sections. like option to choose if i want reminder for each appointment or point that is added on the feed page. sections for vet, groomer info, measurments of the pet, height weight temperature. option to add notes for each vet appointment or anything similar.

I adore this app for taking care of my sister's dog while they're out of town. playStoreReviews.text: This is an amazing app for keeping track of your move! Easy to use and navigate! The ads do get annoying, but the app is free, so it's not a huge deal. I love having the option to print off a list of everything (that costs, but it's under $3 for a pdf file to print, not bad at all.) This is the perfect app for OCD movers like myself. Keep track of boxes, furniture and more. The one feature I would like to see, is the option to add the weight of each item. But again, a minor thing. 5 stars!

Used it for my move with a total of around 190 boxes. The main useful thing afterwards is obviously the search inventory feature . The major drawback at the time I was using it, is that it doesn't sync to other devices, so you can't just pack parallel with your SO and add stuff at the same time. That almost made me use a different app. Other than that, the app is fairly simple, not many bells and whistles but what it does, it does well. Add a box, fill it with content, label it and move on to the next one.

Useful, but could be better. I love how this app can used to keep a log of your inventory. I also how it has the option to export to pdf (if you pay). However, this app is lacking as a app for packing and moving. It could do better at giving the user the ability to be organized. It would be useful to have an option to mark a box as completely packed, so you know if there's more room in certain boxes without having check them all and so you know if there are boxes left that you didn't tape up yet because there was more room in them. Or maybe even so you can know that you loaded the box up to move in the vehicle. That way you can do an inventory check on the boxes at your new home after moving each load. The option would just help me be more organized. An option I think definitely needs to be added is the option to mark a box as moved, so you can make sure you haven't missed or lost any boxes. The aforementioned option would help with along with this option. Another option I feel would be helpful with organization an extra label for the boxes, so you can label what type of stuff it contains, not just what room it's for or is in. I would be able to mark a box as containing media (cds, dvds, vhs, digital games), electronics, paint supplies, sewing supplies, jewelry, books, dining ware, cooking ware, board games, makeup, misc knick-knacks, etc etc. This, of course, would include the ability to add multiple labels on each box since they may contain more than one type. It would also be great if the same labels were available to manually label each item in the inventory. I create excel sheets for an inventory list when I move. I have an option to label what type of item each possession is, what box the possession is in, if the box has been packed, if the box has been moved, and the value of the item. I even save an extra label for the boxes so I know what type of stuff each box contains. It would be great if I had the ability to do all of this in one app. Especially if I wanted to transfer it all over to an excel sheet to keep as an inventory log.

I wish I could give it lower than a 1. I have been planning my move for over 6 months and packing boxes and just putting the box number on them 6 months later and over 250 Boxes in my storage unit and I open the app and all my data is gone. I can't get any response to the contact emails or anything. I am so mad I even advertised and built up this app on Tik Tok.

Was 4 stars now only 2 I was really happy with this app. Until..... I sat down to print the "markers" (box labels). They aren't evenly spaced on the sheet. I wish the "print"markers" features was designed to be evenly distributed on a US size sheet (or at least have that option). It is pretty much useless as is. I spent 50 bucks on label stock, plus the cost of the upgrade to find out that it prints unevenly spaced on the page, so everything is kind of smooshed in the center. Premade label stock generally has each label positioned in it's column or row equally spaced.so having a 5/16 inch (1cm-ish) gutter between columns, and 3/4 inch (2cm) left and right margins makes the info nearest the center print off the labels and into the white space between the labels ARGH. This is REALLY frustrating.

There doesn't seem to be an easy way to just add items to a box by voice other than by interacting with the cumbersome and slow AI assistant which does nothing except keep telling me "No coins available!". I have no clue what that means. I just want to be able to tell it a box number I am working on and then just voice-add items without a lot of back and forth conversation. This app does not seem to provide that. Per your response, I don't really need or want AI. I just want voice input.

It is a perfect program for someone who is a little ocd like me. I can share it with my husband so he can add the boxes he packs too, and the boxes are numbered according to what's on the system (we chose not to use the labelling system because I have my own system, and the app caters for that). I love the inventory system where you can search for items in boxes. I can set up my own codes per room in the rooms section... and I can set up 2 moves at the same time which is what we doing! LOVE IT!

The app before the update was better and worked quicker. After the update, I had a mini panic after it erased all of my files. However, I had made backups and after entering a title, it let me restore them. The new version runs a little slower than the last one but still seems a good database. It is still better than any of the other house moving apps though there are still traces of random German words scattered around.

This is a super helpful app when you are moving. You can keep an inventory of what items are in each box and which room they will go to. But if you don't want to have that much detail, you don't have to! The search function is very helpful when you are trying to find an item without opening a ton of boxes. This is our second move that we are using this app for and I can't move without it.

Worth getting and worth the couple of upgrades to keep track of your move. We had an international move to do where all boxes need to be inventoried and this app was perfect. Not only can you create lists and organize by room. But the keyword search allows you to quickly find where items are and what boxes they are in. You can also snap photos of the goods in each box and have that ready for your inventory. When you are all done you can export as a PDF and print it off to take with you.

I was looking for a way to export furniture sizes, so I logged a support ticket to see if there was a way. The next minute, there is an email from them saying the app will be updated shortly. I checked and the app has been updated, and the feature I needed is now available. Wow. I am very impressed by the app and the dev team

Absolutely amazing app for organizing a move. The ability to search the inventory makes finding your essentials a snap at the end. I use it just so I have a full inventory for insurance purposes. Weather my things are in boxes or unpacked, I have a complete list of the things in my home. Recommend

A first-class piece of software. During our current move, I was thinking about how to keep track what's in which box without going mad. This app does moving box inventory and room inventory very well, and the search is handy. It's rare that an app fits what I'm looking for so precisely.

A phenomenal, easy to use, and life changing app! I used this app in 2019 for a large move, downsizing from a 2800 sqft home to a 1400 sqft home and separate storage facility. This app made my move feel like a breeze! Having the ability to quickly locate an item from the 100+ boxes I had meticulously packed was seamless! The ability to upload pictures of what was in the box was equally wonderful when sometimes my typed description just wasn't enough. Thanks for this incredible app! Top notch!

Please update to allow pictures of items to be uploaded in bulk from your phones album and the be able to either mass assign them to existing items or create an item for each photo automatically with the option to name each item if you want or give a generic name if chosen. To be honest, the built in camera is slow and cumbersome and you cannot auto link an existing item to a photo already uploaded. These features are critically needed ASAP PLEASE!

As someone who has moved 11 times in the past 20 years many of those diffent states using this app for my most recent move was a total game charger the key is making sure you list every item packed in a box and then label the box with a unique identity that's easy to spot then you will be able to search for that item love this app its great for moving

Tremendous app to plan a relocation. If anyone masters a process it's of course an app from Germany. Even possible to share across phones with your family and all go packing together. Maybe add an intro slider / setup wizzard that asks for already known info in a sequential way, but even configuring via the menues is convenient and works great.

This is the BEST app I've found! Easy to use, easy to add pictures of items and easy to locate a box or an item in any box. It made my move of 618 boxes in storage a LOT easier. I can actually find stuff! It could use some polishing but I highly recommend it. Good job!

*Update* I'm adding the 5th star since auto sorting is now available. Thank you devs! --- Original review: Incredible app! Giving 4 stars only because it doesn't have automatic alpha sorting of box names, but you can do it manually. Would be super helpful to have an option to auto-sort for those of us who are using codes for our boxes (iev K1, K2, MB1, MB2 etc).

I love this app and will recommend it to anyone I know moving. The only thing I wish it would do is allow you to edit the original number of boxes you need. I like that it allows you to organize each room by color. Although I hope to not have to move again anytime soon or in the future, I will definitely use this app again.

The absolute best app for moving house. The free option has all the most useful features so you don't need premium. Log boxes by rooms colour code them and take pictures of them for easy tracking. The item lookup is the best

In the midst of moving, I am finding this app quite helpful. It takes a bit to organize well, but the versatility of this app makes moving organization a reality! So far, I only have one upgrade suggestion. I would love to have Search capabilities. Dozens of boxes are well labeled with listed items, yet I have manually searched for items in the app. Thanks for making moving easier!

best app for moving. takes time to familiarize but once you do, it is a powerful tool to organize, inventory, and make moving a bit more less headache. I especially love the inventory search tool and photo.

Such a great app. It's really helped us with a huge family move. Just make sure that everyone using the app clasifies the same boxes in the same way e.g. agree beforehand on what is a S/M/L box otherwise things can get confusing.

It was a super helpful app but after the update it's apparently lost my account because when I go to log in it tells me that user doesn't exist or was lost. So now right in the middle of our move I've lost all of my information.

It has the basic shell of what might be helpful, but adding a box and what's inside the box and number in the box that I couldn't figure it out shouldn't be that hard. I am uninstalling it and going with something else
I like this app a lot so far. It's giving me the ability to name my boxes, say what's in them, and take multiple pics per box. They have a handy checklist and a count down to move date.
Served me well during my moving. Now the app works well being my home inventory tool. Only improvement I can think of is the support of boxes in a box relationship. All in all well made.
App was good, I didn't mind the pop up ads but now they put ads all throughout the list!!! It is VERY distracting and it makes it seem like my list is split in categories!!!

This app is better than I expected. It is really customisable and versital in a technological (and less user friendly) way. If you are an early millennial who is technologically savvy in an old school way, you still fall in love with this app.
Love it so far but wish that there was an ad free version; especially since I paid money after I kept getting the "you've used 10 boxes...." message.
Wanted a simple app for tracking what boxes were packed and where they're going. Much, much too complicated of an app to even attempt to use.
It is quite a good app, havent found anything more adequate on the german market. Would be nice to have more features in that can help u move. But so far. Quite decent!
Great for the 'detail oriented' person of the household to keep things on track, but easy enough to use for those who are less organised.

Every useful feature is behind a paywall, might as well list the app for a cost in the play store rather than wasting people's time installing the app only to discover it is essentially a paid for app.

You're making me do math to enter a box! I don't know ow the Cubic Feet of a box without doing math. Not all box4s have this info printed. This app should be figuring it out for me. Then the app can determine volume as needed. Bur volume isn't the only thing needed. What's the weight? Contents? Item Count.

Thank you for making a simple, light, functional and non intrusive moving app! This baby can hold so many boxes. I didn't have to write on a single box in real life, and it helped me find items that I desperately needed but couldn't remember where I had put them. Fantastic A+

Yes the free one has ads but honestly has been a breeze to use! All boxes and items are organized and I am able to search my notes! Awesome way to find something after moving!
Really helpful app for moving. We would have been searching forever for certain things if not for this app and search ability. Saved my sanity and got us super organised!

playStoreReviews.text: I prefer to use the Avery web page on my laptop or desktop but that isn't always convenient or possible. This app is easy to navigate, makes is effortless to make a fast simple label, and I think they included more than enough extra design elements and fonts to be useful to most people for any need.

I saw that it was super cheap for a lifetime license so I tried the trial first just to see if I thought I'd actually use it. However, it's so locked down in trial mode that I can't actually try out the things that would tell me if I'd like it. So I don't trust it and don't want to have to do a smaller paid subscription just to find out if it has the features I'd like and if they work well enough. It sucks too because the lifetime license was a decent enough deal that it could be worth it.

My thermal printer has saved me a fortune on shipping labels, and this app has made the process quick & easy. Edit: taking off a star because it won't print circles properly (they come out oval), and it won't center within a round label, no matter which direction I set the offset. Also, the screaming beep when you open the cover is way too loud. Still prints fantastic mailing labels, though.

In this App you can create & print labels one at a time via bluetooth(thermal printer from Amazon) only. There is no way you can save a label as template or a copy. No option to print multiple labels with different data. It only works for 1 single label to be printed at a time or multiple labels of the same label. This App needs basic functionality for consumers to fully utilise it.

This app has turned my printer into a paper weight. All of a sudden after update it won't search or connect my printer ( tried from 2 phones ). Now costing me a small fortune printing shipping labels from normal printer and looks unprofessional. This app is always messing up and after contacting the supplier of the app you get no reply. Absolutely useless and now looks like I now have to spend another £100 out on a different shipping printer. Please sort it out.

playStoreReviews.text: I prefer to use the Avery web page on my laptop or desktop but that isn't always convenient or possible. This app is easy to navigate, makes is effortless to make a fast simple label, and I think they included more than enough extra design elements and fonts to be useful to most people for any need.

I saw that it was super cheap for a lifetime license so I tried the trial first just to see if I thought I'd actually use it. However, it's so locked down in trial mode that I can't actually try out the things that would tell me if I'd like it. So I don't trust it and don't want to have to do a smaller paid subscription just to find out if it has the features I'd like and if they work well enough. It sucks too because the lifetime license was a decent enough deal that it could be worth it.
the free is incredibly limited. it's basically paid. Google needs to stop allowing apps like this to list as free
