I figured creating labels with a smart phone would allow me to easily create labels that were more customized than basic printers offered, so I bought the Brady M211, but this app is horribly unintuitive & poorly designed, making the process time consuming, frustrating & overly complicated. Also, basic processes require too many button pushes. It's all too hard to explain in a short review. If the app at least worked, I could overlook the overpriced cartridges.

they made updates to the app which made the whole experience so much worse. if that wasnt bad enough, i cant use the app for more than 5 minutes without it crashing. by the time i finish writing out all my labels the app crashes and i have to write it out all over again. i have 2 of their machines and theyre basically useless to me now. and why is it that i have to connect to my machine every time i use the app? it should remember that its my machine

Fails to allow users to access Excel files. Additionally, should be re-coded to pull more than one column of data out of a spreadsheet file, this is unacceptably poor. Latest update gas a 'got it' help message that intrudes upon the functionality of the app, and bypassing it forces the app to hang for no reason. And, when I get the app going finally, there is no way to edit existing text without erasing the old text box. The text box editor should not be auto completing or adding punctuation.

The app is OK. I like being able to make the labels on my phone. My biggest complaint is when using patch panels, multi label shrink tubes, etc, you don't have the option to go to the next label. You have to click off of it open the text options, click off it again to clear, then click on the next area to start typing again. Why not just have the option to jump to the next label without all the hassle. It adds a considerable amount of time. At that point, you might as well just use the printer.

Horrible app, difficult to create the simplest of labels. I am used to using the BMP-21 PLUS, and find it impossible to create the same wire wrap labels and very difficult to create a simple landscape banner label. The app constantly reformats the rows and glitches out. Once it does that, you have to start all over because it won't let you edit the lines that blanked out. Why couldn't it be as easy as picking a label style, font and font size like any other label. Great idea, very poor execution

-The app is not intuitive or organized, Options and features are scattered all over the place! -It doesn't allow you to select fraction sizes like 1.5, 1.75,.. and there is no option to select the wire size so it will adjust the length automatically, but rather some fixed sizes 1",2",. -The Blank / Free lable option has serious bugas as it doesn't differentiate between the Vertical / Horizontal option!! -No matter what I tried to do, I couldn't get it to print a Circuit Breaker lable, properly!

Looks good, impossible to use! I have a list longer than a page of things that are extremely hard or impossible to do. I had hoped for an easy experience, but my $250 M211 turned into an expensive disappointment. How can i provide you detailed feedback? Easy things like filling a label with multiple lines of maximum size text across it in landscape mode isn't actually possible. Neither is wasting less than an inch of ribbon for every print. Zooming and moving text around is at best flaky.

Needs work. It is very difficult to just add text and move it around to line things up the way you want. The GUI needs to be more usable. Every time you go to do something you trigger pop ups and things you don't want to. I was creating a 4 inch label to be printed along the label. Adding two simple text boxes, one as the title, "Milwaukee Tools" in a larger font then the tool name underneath in a smaller font was a real task. Great little printer but so hard to do basic things.

This app is horribly disappointing. I've been using a BMP-21 for years and it's wonderful, I purchased an M211 printer to replace it as a more compact unit to transport. I just want to create the same labels as the BMP-21, but it's horribly complicated to create a basic label. If you make a wire label and want to adjust the length it erases all the label text and makes you start again. It seems the designers tried packing too many features into the software instead of making a good interface.

This app's functionality leads to significant label tape wastage due to the disproportionately small writing space in comparison to the label dimensions. It's unclear whether this issue stems from inadequate beta testing or if it's an intentional design choice. Unfortunately, there doesn't appear to be an alternative method for creating labels for the m211 printer. If you are an app developer you could make some money by providing a pay app that actually worked. This printer cost nearly $300.

App crashes and refused to pair to several Andriod phones. Brand new device. Tested and reinstalled on S25, S25 Ultra, Z Fold 7, S24, All crashed and none of them worked. Not worth the money for the printer, Will likely be returnjng it if I can't make this work in 24 hours, And then never look at Brady again. Worst Experience I've ever had at the start of using a product.

Worked fine before updates. After updates 80% of the time the app just sits at thr brady express labels splash screen and never progresses. Have to force close app and restart it multiple times and maybe it will work again. Happening on a galaxy s23 ultra, and a pixel 9 fold pro. Both same issue. Seems to have happened after the addition of voice labels.

Not intuitive. Very difficult to use full label as majority of label when setting up is marked as non printable. Don't like the no preview before printing, again wasting label material. Maybe I'm just dumb. Edit I am dumb 3 stars now. But I have yet, after much searching on the brady website, to find a manual that details solutions to the issues I am experiencing. And I have owned a Brady 2200TLS since 2008 and use3d many others so not new to labelers. Just can't get labels for it anymore.

Im using this app on a Samsung 23+ I believe. The app is extremely cumbersome. If you want to print verticle label it's very difficult to setup. It will literally print horizontal and vertical at same time. After 20 mins of trying deleting resetting. I went to conventional label maker and 10 seconds I was done. For a standard label. It works.
App is super easy to use, and works great with the printer, but I'm having stability issue where it crashes every few minutes when doing larger projects.
very good product. tons and tons of options, but the software is just a smidge clunky. it is not easy to share the printer with multiple people. otherwise very nice product.

Terrible interface. Crashes. Not user friendly at all. Update: Contacted tech support, was put on hold for a long time while the CS ran to his demo room to use the M211 printer. Then told, he wasn't sure how to use it and needed to talk to the developers. No resolution was provided. This product doesn't work well to load excel files and print lots of labels. It's basically the standard labeler but your keyboard is your cell phone. This product was no doubt rushed to selves to make a buck.

Well, I have uninstalled the app, cleared it, and reinstalled it. It works now on my s23untra. Im new to the app, and i do find it hard to understand. Would love if you could update the app and add it to the electrical section.. option To select gage of the wire (cable) font size and just print wire labels ... I have not seen any useful tutorials of the app as of right now. I'm planning to reach out to technical support for some guidance.

Poor Interface and Experience I was disappointed to find the interface is clunky and the experience is poor. Issues include: resize handles on text often don't work and do not resize in real time, pinch to zoom also does not zoom in real time, switching label size causes issues & many more. Frankly the entire app and interface needs a massive overhaul. It actually has turned me off buying a Brady label printer when I was set on buying a Brady M511. Good hardware let down by bad software
Great app! Copy and paste would be nice.
Not user friendly. Cumbersome and clumsy UI. For such an expensive label maker, the app seems to have been outsourced to someone who never uses the printer.
Over an hour wasted and I still cant print a readable label! This app is infuriating.

no longer has features it used to have as that are advertised. got a new phone, now no longer has the screen to connect to cloud storage , and when I try to load the excel files I have used for 3 years, it says it is an unsupported file format. the files are not corrupted , the app has gone back to trash status. it was getting better as they added a caps lock function that it frustratingly lacked when I started with it 3 years ago, but still has a ton of ui issues trash 🗑️🗑️🗑️

If you have to change the label supply, it will force you to create a "new blank label". It doesn't even try to convert what you have to a new supply. If you could copy the data and paste it, it would at least make it usable. But no... 48-port patch panel has to be manually re-typed just because. Absolute garbage software. 5-star for the printer. 1-star for the app development.

it's bad and frustrating to use. don't hit enter while in text entry for a label! also found that cable types nor cable measurements are not listed as options for labels. This app needs to be more fleshed out so it has feature parity with the their cheapest stand-alone labelers if this app is required to be used with their non-stand-alone labelers (no buttons or screen). printed labels are not as shown in the screen.

update: Got the email saying to update from the store. Updated outside of work hours so I had time to revert it should anything go wrong. the app works great now. Thank you for taking the time to email me the old copy of the app so that I could get my M211 working while yall fixed the update. This is one tool I use the most in my work and love it's compact size. The app no longer crashes and I can freely update it now.

Really solid app. Make sure and get the right kind of labels, Brady changed the standards so you have to buy the new Authentic style with the A logo. Definitely annoying but the new labels are backwards compatible with the older printers. All in all I love this new platform, well done Brady USA.

Not perfect, i have some trouble with the margin. the apps freeze sometimes. the option to take picture is horrible. i would like to be able to make multiple different tag from one picture. pdf is slow and cannot make multiple different tag.

Works some of the time. when I first open the app I can easily make adjustments to the label I need. But when using it and I need to make adjustments, a lot of the times I can't change the font size. Also, I can't easily go back to the menu to change fonts and sizes.

The idea of this is great but app is not ready for mainstream. Very quirky. Even trying to edit a once printed label turns into a disaster. Essentially useless until software team gets the app fixed. On the plus side, physical build quality is good. Connectivity to phone was almost instant. Battery seems robust and as usual Brady case/packaging is excellent. If they get the software right, this is perfect for wiring environment and worth twice the cost. For now, I'm sticking to my BMP21.

Updated to 2.6.0 (52) and now it won't use any of the saved M21-500 wire label setups on my M211. Claims the "Object is outside of label 1" with IGNORE / FIX dialog, but tapping FIX does nothing. If I create a new label, it prints the numbers continuous and won't allow me to print on only half the label as the previous version would. How do I downgrade to previous version so I can use my saved label setups???

Usually use a Brady BMP21 Plus which has a built in keyboard. It's a great labeler, no complaints. It's' horrible! Now I know why nobody ever uses this M211 labeler! I'm going to delete this app and put the M211 back on the shelf!

I started using the app about 1 month ago. It took a little playing around with to get comfortable but is SUPER easy to use! The developer, Kei, was extremely helpful and responsive to any question I had. Now that I am running my business completely on my tablet things have never been easier!  I love being able to quickly add a product  (by scanning it) to a service and not have to write up a  ticket. You can set it up to add tax only to the product and you can send an email receipt with the press of a button! Once you set it up it does it all for you! I could go on and on. So many great features! My clients even love it! I know it's scary when you are used to a paper schedule but all can be backed up. You can even sync your tapsstyle schedule with Google calendar so you can see it on any desktop. Had a little trouble getting the Google Calendar sync to work but now it's working great. Just try it. You have nothing to lose.

Omg I did not enjoy this game. I will see the balance of ads is perfect to me. The frustration came in with having to repeat levels over and over again to move forward. I am done with the game. If just feels extremely pay to win and I'm not interested in those types of games.

I reached the point where I'm just waiting for the game to release new levels. Basically, once you hit a certain level, there's no new content. All you can do is play various levels against others for over a week with the top players getting bonus items. The house that you build runs out of updates too. I'd rate the game itself as 4 stars, but if I knew there was an end point, I would've have wasted money on it.

This is actually a really fun game, but its got a pay wall. One of the annoying, plausibly deniable kind, where you don't, strictly speaking, HAVE to spend money, but you reach a point where no amount of skill will let you pass the levels without either spending money or watching tons of ads over the course of several days.

I love the game it is fun I wish that you could change Serenity's clothes sooner than whatever level you can I'm on level 247 and the game keeps shutting off. and that is pretty annoying I'm one who enjoys buying things on the games that I play if I need to and it has been a few times where things that I buy have been erased because the game has cut off, hopefully the creators and text can fix this issue.

Pretty fun game if you like time mgt games, which I do. It does get very challenging. On the downside, too many levels between new locations. Also when you get to the location at 106, you change money and start at zero. HORRIBLE. Levels between 115 and 145 have a glitch-which is seriously ticking me off. Serenity tries to deliver to the green stations but instead gets stuck going back and forth. No way to stop it, so you have to.quit the level, LOSING your boosters that you used. HORRIBLE.

The game is actually fun. But it crashes A LOOOTTT!!! The points aren't accurate either. Kinda set up so that you can't move on without paying. I had a couple of yellow customers (kinda upset customers) and I expected my score to not be so high but my very next attempt, I had all green customers. Same amount, needs, and everything and received the same score. The only way to move on was to pay. Not happening. Fix these issues and I may download it back. Until then, uninstalling.

Having so many glitches with the game. Was not able to get into game last night. Tonight no way to mKe a purchase. Just says "Loading". No way to contact support through the app. I am requesting a full refund for ALL the money I have spent. No technical support. I just reloaded the game. Starting over. I hate the money spent and time wasted. The problem is, it is a fun, cute game. BUT DO NOT SPEND ANY MONEY ON IT! Don't buy the assists. No gems. It may disappear again and you are out of pocke

This game could be great if there weren't impossible levels. And if there weren't parts of the game that repeat the same impossible levels over and over. You play the level again and again only to realize you have to use a double coin booster, so you use your last one, only for the next level to be exactly the same, right down to what the customers ask for. Even fully upgraded and chain checking out, you can't earn enough coins to complete the level. I will not buy boosters, so this game is over

This game is a lot of fun, but I have to say difficulty wise It's extremely easy. There's no difficulty boost it seems between the first time on a level or the third time on a level. And maybe every five, six levels, they give you one that you have to run perfect in order to be able to complete. I expect this is their way of trying to make you waste lives, but overall it doesn't seem that difficult. I've stopped purchasing upgrades because I'm trying to make the game a little harder.

I have been playing this game for two years, and have spent hundreds of $'s on various packages, coins, gems, etc. because I feel if I am enjoying a game - I don't mind supporting the developers for their work for a few dollars per week. However, I have noticed several times where I am just seconds from the goal, and certain glitches will keep me from winning. I will suddenly be unable move a customer to a station, for instance. Then I run out of Gems and need to buy more to save the round. Ugh.

I just installed this game. Enjoyed it right up until I decided to stop for the night - and there was no mechanism to do so. Every time I finished a level, the only option was to "continue" to the next. So I hit PAUSE then QUIT: "Are you sure? You'll lose a life!" FINE. I hit QUIT again, lost the life, returned to the level map - then IMMEDIATELY a dialog box popped up giving me no option but to start the next level. I HAVE OTHER THINGS TO DO WITH MY LIFE THAN PLAY THIS 24/7, Y'ALL.

Good Until...... I was really enjoying this game despite spending real money to play. However, since the update, it doesn't work correctly if it works at all. It's not spectacular, but one can see different characters. The "celebration" when you win is lackluster at best. The sound effects are on point. Decent game overall.

I would give 5 stars but every time I get my celebrity bonus all the way loaded the game lags and makes me have to completely reopen the game, it's annoying because it takes so long to get those bonuses all the way up. playStoreReviews.text: Trying the free version right now and I love it! It helps me keep track of how often I use my items and how many I have. Great way to Catalog. The categories and information you can fill out for each item helps with budgeting and hygiene. I do wish that when I press "used today" it would appear in the calendar section but hopefully that can be added in the future. There is the option for Routines but know what items I used to achieve a look would be great.

I've been evaluating a few beauty inventory applications. This is one of the handful I downloaded to test. So far I like that even in the free version you can customize the types so I can inventory my press on nails and perfume. I also like that I can add a date for when I opened something. I'm still playing around. Curious if there is a way to export my inventory and also note days I used a product for a specific look or video? Still evaluating.

I love this app and it is helping track items in my inventory to keep me to accidentally buying dups. It is also useful to see how many uses I am getting out of products. I just wish there was a way to see the date I started using something. And maybe the dates my uses happened on. I have to document that in a separate place to remember and it would be easier to be able to see that in the app where I am adding that with my usage counts.

I paid the annual fee for the premium version and after almost a week still no upgrade to that version version. They did however take the money out of my account. Tried to email support with no response. Basically they took money from my bank account for premium version with no upgrade to premium version. I know mistakes happen so I hope the app creators reach out to me to fix this

just what i needed. i have ocd & i feel like i HAVE to track information abt all of my products. i did so in my notes app for awhile, but that got very overwhelming & cluttered since i have over 50 items & more my wishlist. this made it much easier & infinitely less overwhelming/messy for me, while giving me features my notes app couldnt. u get so much for only ¢99 a month. my only complaint is that the star rating for products doesn't work & always resets, at least for me.

Just started using to catalog my extensive makeup, skin care, and nail polish collections and so far so good. I suspect the budget feature will be very helpful, as well as the ability to create your own sub-list in each category. To agree with another reviewer, using the calendar to log daily makeup/skincare to spot trends, as well as keeping emptied products available for review, would be fantastic additional functions.

This app offers exactly what I need. I love it! The app is easy to use. The information that it asks you to log are useful. There are few functions I wish the app has: 1. Add a way to mark whether it's full size, travel size, or sample size (and show up when I browse); 2. I wish I could customize my collection browsing screen. For example, I wish it could show how many stars I rated it, instead of having to click on each item to look.3. I wish it give more options to sort.Overall pretty good app

This app is super easy to use , really like that I can add multiple pictures of my products, I can mark uses, track expiration dates and spending. I do wish it was broken down into sections for example under makeup I would like to see tabs for Foundation, blush, bronzer ect or the ability to add these tabs under the main heading of makeup, same for skin care

I downloaded this app to track my expiring foundations so I can use them up before they go off. However, after spending the time to input all the data, I went to the "expiration" area, and knowing full well at least one should be showing since it's expiring this month, I was shocked it didn't pull up any. So, I went back to check the dates and all the expiration dates have been randomized. Most in July 2025, oddly enough, but one even said Dec 31 2030.

I'm really loving this app as a way to check when I need to replenish my products and to remind me when to throw away old products. However, I wish they had a way to let me view my products according to brand or type. I tend to have multiple foundations, eyeshadows, etc so it would be nice to ONLY view those products when I'm trying to design a look or figure out what I'm packing with me for a vacation. Also, I would love if they added a travel option so I can design my travel makeup bag!

This app is my favorite for organizing all of my everything items to be honest, from makeup to skincare to books and photography equipment. However, I bought the premium version on my old phone and it seems not to transfer to my new phone even though that was the whole point, and customer support is unreachable.

Excellent Value and exactly what I needed no more no less. I've found out how much my eyeshadow collection is, track usage and I am using it to track my coloring books, cookbooks, and Art supplies. I can keep track of what I have, track usage and take pictures to go with each item. I paid for unlimited access. 10.99. Worth every penny and more.. (please don't get any idea of raising the price 😬) Thank you for putting in the thought and effort in creating this app.

Great for organization as I have a fairly large collection. It helps to make sure I don't buy too many of the same type of product so I don't end up with 50 primers. I do wish there were a few more features; such as, since there is a calendar, I wish I could input into the calender what makeup I wore for that day so I can easily see trends of my favorite products. Also once a product is finished I'd still like to see any notes I have on the product so I can go back and see how I like the product

I loved this app and used it regularly, even paid for premium. But I factory reset my phone and lost ALL of my data, hours worth of logging and information - gone. The backup system is not reliable and every time I try to restore my data it fails. Extremely disappointing because there aren't any other apps like this on Android that have all these features.

UPDATE 1/2/2020: The developer responded quickly and helped me realize that it was my phone's font settings that was distorting the font size in the app. I updated my rating to 4 stars. If more customization options for the dates in the app are included in a future update, then it'll be a 5-star app. PREVIOUS 12/30/19: This app has been pretty helpful. I discovered I had been using several items that were expired. However, I wish there were more customization options under settings. Users should be able to choose how dates are displayed. There should also be more tabs besides Care and Makeup or users should be able to add their own, such as Nail Polish, rather than putting it under Other. Finally, I noticed that some of the text is cut off at the top when I'm entering a product's name. It's very annoying.

review update the app has been updated recently, and this has improved a lot of things. however there are things that I can't seem to get to work I can't delete anything out of my empties. I can't delete any types or categories

Edit: okay, I have been using this app for like 4 years now, and today it got a massive update. this app is even better than it used to be - I can organize products among different types of project pans I'm doing, see purchasing and usage statistics, keep track of product usage, and make beauty routines. I actually switched my data over to a different google account just so I could pay the dev another 11 dollars for a lifetime subscription because I love this app so much.

The interface looks good and easy to navigate on first use, but there appears to be a bug when adding products to collection. the screen went blank when I tried to add a photo of my product, and I had to restart the app to see and access other features again

UPDATE: They located my data and restored it. Leaving previous review for transparency. Communication about the transition was non-existent, but they were able to fix in 24 hrs. ORIGINAL: Worst app ever. I had my entire collection, over 1000 items input. Uses tracked, prices. Took me MONTHS to input everything. And it was all attached to this email address. I got a new phone and now it's not taking my username and password, and requiring sync to gmail or iphone. Everything is wiped out. TRASH.

So far so good, although I have some issues taking pictures of items, as while the camera opens, it won't save the picture to the item. I can only add photos by taking a picture outside of the app. Also, some of the buttons - notes/pictures/camera are obscured by the picture when it's added - though that's a small niggle. Also I'd suggest adding the ability to add several pictures to one makeup listing - like say if it's a palette of some sort.

I love this app, I just bought the lifetime version. The UI is a bit inflexible though. If you add a note, you cannot erase it. Similarly, if you add a date of usage it cannot be deleted either - even the duplicate item will retain this info! So you have to re-add the item and all just to delete that bit of information. Also, a more useful measurement than grams would be ml imo.

Although the app does the job well and I like the interface (Hence, why I bought their plan in the first place). It is kinda frustrating to use because the app is really buggy and it keeps logging off my account. Please improve this first and I might change my review... Edit: They fixed the bug when it comes to logging in (still a bit buggy tho imo). Nonetheless, this is a good app for keeping track of all my skincare and makeup (w/ price summary for all of my purchases + product expiration)

I really like this app so I upgraded to the pro-version. It is great for keeping track of all my make up. I can list and organise everything by categories and I like the option of having photos of products to remind myself at a glance. I'm very keen on all the different statistics that it shows me including what I own and what I've spent. I would love if this app could include a tracker for product usage too, so I could tally every time I use something to know which products I reach for most.

Great app, easy to use! Happy that I found it. Really helps to organise the products I use and alerts of upcoming expiration dates. And I absolutely love the new barcode scanner feature. Stats, budget planner and beauty calendar are also quite useful. One suggestion though. Would be nice to track not only the starting date but also the date when I finished using a product. Or to have a feature showing how quickly I'm using them. And I hope one day body care and hair products are added too :)

I think this is the best app for makeup organizing on Android, but it needs to improve quite a bit. The app is glitchy - constantly gives an error - especially when you try to log in or create an account. Furthermore, not all brands are available to select- that's still okay, I have to just type it in. However, when you select the color, there aren't a lot of options in that color chart- maybe would be good if that could be updated. My major issue though are the glitches.

Initially, I had paid for premium but the app didn't unlock premium features. The company resolved the issue very quickly as soon as I reached out to them. I like the app a lot, though I have a few suggestions: 1) the ability to change units of measure per product rather than globally 2) better tag handling; tags sometimes appear under the keyboard layer, making it impossible to select 3) the ability to add and additional colour name separate from the colour picker

(4 stars) It's a great app to keep track of what you have, how quickly you're using it and when certain items expire. I just wish there was an option to add multiple images to a single item so I can add a swatch of the product. Edit: (5 stars) I'm astounded that the team considered suggestions that were made to them and implemented it. They truly are the one of the best developers at listening to customers/clients!

I have premium and the app is great. Love the interface, concept and features. Really easy to use and organisation is great except I'm having a slight issue where I add tags to a product but some of them disappear randomly causing some organisation issues with filters. I also wish you could add more lists as its currently care, makeup and other.

Great Idea with great room for improvement, It would be great if the app provides the options of choosing from a data base instead of depending o photos also if it gives me the chance to rate the product, some are excellent I want to remember to buy again and some bad I want to remember to avoid, or remember why they were bad in the first place. This will make the app a 10 Stars for me!
I love this app! It's very easy to organise everything from project panning to your spendings. The bugs have been fixed and the update is really nice because you can track your beauty routines.

Developer had me resolve the issues I had with transferring my data over to my new phone. The latest update has improved things greatly. There are a couple of minor things that need improving but overall 5/5 stars.

Lost all my previous saved products & confusing new layout Updated review: After emailing the developer clarifying on the issues I faced when using the app, they took time to address all the bugs and released the updates. Now, the app is working flawlessly. Thank you.

edit: after contacting the support team, they resolved the issue within minutes. I am excited to try out the app as it looks really promising. I will explore the app fully and write a detailed review but so far this seems to be the best and only app on Android that suits my needs. old review: I have purchased a subscription to try out the app but it still shows that I need to buy a subscription. The money was deducted from my account but I still don't have the subscription. I lost my money.

This app has some great features. I'm glad I paid for premium. I've seen the developer respond to previous feedback and have a few points for consideration. 1. Alphabetical sorting is selectively case sensitive - e.l.f. products appear at the end unless added as E.L.F.; NYX products appear before all other 'N' products unless entered as Nyx 2. Can't seem to move products from collection to wishlist (to repurchase, or if added accidentally in wrong list). Otherwise I'm enjoying using it!

The free version is extremely restricted- don't even bother unless you're willing to buy the regular version. I currently have 8 products that I uploaded last fall and I can't add any more unless I pay for it.

I never rate any apps but I really do love this. The only reason why I didn't give it 5 stars is because of the price to go pro, if it wasn't as much I would definitely buy the pro version. As it does give you a lot of information you need on the products you use. The only thing that I would say that is needed to make it better is to put product sale/offer price as well as the nominal price. Also it would be great if you could put on your wishlist products the price.

UPDATE: The small issue with the premium subscription was resolved in less than 24h hours. Excellent support for a great app. The functions this app offers were exactly what I needed so I got lifetime premium. After a day or two of working fine, it now asks me again to subscribe again and I'm unable to add more products or edit my existing ones.
Easy to use and loving the current features. Would love to see what new developments they make.

I was looking for an app that does pretty much exactly what this one does, I just don't love it because you can only have 3 categories: "Care," "Makeup," & "Other." I would love the ability to expand these categories. As a cosmetics collector, I need more than just 3 categories.

The app features some convenient tools like searching for products, expiration date notification, etc. (although how well those tools work is another matter). However, the app is quite buggy and prepare for a lot of annoying notification about how it stop working right when you want to sync your collection or searching for products. All in all, you'd better not waste your money buying the premium version.

I really want this app to be able to being up all the products from brands, I would type in "anastasia Beverly hills" and all of her products would show up, I click on what I own, it includes the prices, and I can add it to my "profile" so I know how much my collection is worth. I hope this makes sense! It would help a lot with people who want to insure their collection. I hope this helps, I would absolutely love that. There is an app like this for vinyl - discogs.

The app let me input 16 items before telling me I need to pay a subscription fee to add more! This app is a freaking joke!! No one who has only 16 items would need this app! It's made with the purpose of forcing you to pay a monthly fee for basic functions. Just make it a paid app instead of deceiving consumers, it's not useable without the subscription! It's deceiving, a cashgrab and waste of my time.

I paid for the paid subscription but the app won't let me use any of the paid parts, and it keeps asking me to pay again and again although I have, when I click on pay it says "You have already purchased this" but it still won't let me use it - it took my money and won't allow me access to what I paid for it. Either it's a massive scam or there's a serious bug. Edit: the developer told me to contact them and 2 days later I have zero response. It's a scam!!

Had some issues with crashing and not recognizing my premium status but the latest update fixed that. This is great for cataloging and organizing my massive makeup collection. My only complaint is that you can't select a second photo from the gallery, it has to be taken with the camera.

Wonderful app. Helps me organize and keep up with everything so I don't overbuy and so I can use everything I have to make room for more. I wish makeup companies would contribute to the database to speed up the process of getting my collection in, but otherwise the app itself is great and the developers are really responsive! Less than 2 hours to answer my issues when I stumbled into a bug! So great!

So far I really like the app. I am planning on purchasing. It's probably the only app on Android to help track project pans. Sometimes when I try to add dates from when I purchased or started using a product and it won't save, stating that I cannot add a date from the future. A feature I would like to see would be able to add our own photos to the project pan section. Mostly because I found this app after starting my journey and I have a bunch of progress photos on my camera roll already.

I found the app helpful and subscribed, paid for lifetime premium. However, after payment, I still don't have premium feature. I reached out to the app developer, forwarded my Google Play receipt asking for help, but never received a response. UPDATE 2: I finally received a response from the app developer who helped to solve my problem. Appreciate the prompt response. The app is really helpful if you want to organize your beauty products

Fantastic App, Amazing Developer! I send a few feature/improvement requests (along with accolades; the app is already fantastic) and I no sooner blinked than most of them were implemented. So impressed and so very glad I bought a lifetime license. This is gonna save me from having 4 of the same mascara I hated because I forgot I tried it and running out of my favorite moisturizer! ❤️❤️❤️

This app is really kind of pointless. However, there are a few good perks. I really like that you can list everything in your makeup collection and describe what it's used for. You're also able to make a note on HOW to use it and label the item with a picture. That was definitely why I originally downloaded the app. Other than that...it's pointless!

So great app for cataloguing my skincare! Statistics makes it so easy to see how much do I spend for different products, and photos with tags are very convenient to look through my stash. Definitely worth it. I can see you add some features from time to time, please don't stop 😁

Awesome!!! I love the addition of categories as now I can have a place for backup/unopened products without them clogging up my main inventory. So far I only use this app for my skincare, as I haven't gotten around to putting in all my makeup, and am loving it. Thank you to the developer for the quick response.

I really like this app, mostly. I did pay for it and nothing has changed, which seems like a glitch. Also, when adding notes, I don't know where to find them once saved. And it doesn't seem to save tags, which is really disappointing.

i downloaded this app thinking it's free, apparently it's not. I never got the in-app message or intro saying the app wouldn't be free. if it wasn't completely free then the app should have been advertised as such, otherwise it's dishonest and misleading. I might as well keep a GOOGLE doc spreadsheet that does basically the same thing-keeping track of expired makeup.

Awesome App!! This app is so useful!! I ended up enjoying it so much that I purchased the premium forever version. However, I had issues with it and it wiped my database on a few occasions. I ended up need to start from scratch. I LOVE the idea behind this and I think this is awesome app.

Thank you for fixing this issue for me. I really enjoy using the app and appreciate you fixing the problem. Initial Review: Fell in LOVE with this app and bought the forever premium version. A couple days later, the app stopped working for me and kept prompting me to upgrade again. I've reached out to the developer for assistance and nothing. Very disappointing 😞.

I absolutely love this app, and have bought the lifetime usage! I've got all my make up, skin care and nail polish logged and use it morning and night! I love that you can see how many uses you're getting out of a product- it encourages me to actually use my fancier stuff because I can see how many uses I get! Is there an option to see cost per use? Obviously it is basic maths I could do but it might be a function I can't find!

I've been using this app for hours and I am obsessed! You can make your own categories, add your own pictures, it reminds you when your products are going out of date. I just bought the premium which is only like, 5ish dollars a YEAR. Not sponsored, not affiliated, just exactly what I'm looking for. 5 stars!

Finally found an app to input all of my skincare and makeup and to see how much I spent on it! The last update added a field for adding the product size, much appreciated. This update had an issue with taking photos though, but the customer support helped me immediately 😊

there's a lot of potential here. good features, layout, & tracking capabilities. unfortunately, too many bugs & glitches. it makes the analytics and app overall unreliable, which defeats the purpose for me. the app would randomly change dates I assigned to items even after they were saved, wouldn't let me input certain dates or update certain settings at all, it randomly removed ratings from items & removed certain categories altogether at times. the backup feature also didn't work.

Good app, but if you have a make up collection of items over a certain number (I think 30?) then you'll have to pay for premium. Leaving this review because I wish I had of known that before wasting my time.

Got the annual subscription to avoid limitations and because i really think this app has potential to be something great. It has its issues, many features are buggy, not working properly, too complicated to use, some are just all over the place BUT it does the job anyways. It's still in development, but it's a great way for people to organize their cosmetics. If the dev is willing to work on the app, it might just be the next big thing.

mostly great features, but I do not understand the function of the calendar if you can't log what products you used that day. would be 5 stars with that functionality. also, the date format is buggy, but I can work with that.
Not what you think it is. I just want an app to track what makeup I have and I would have to manually enter every detail and pay to add more than a few. Way too time consuming and pointless.

Great app. Would only be improved with a few more categories to subdivide makeup & care into. Love that you can add brands yourself & can do multiple pictures. Does exactly what I need and is perfectly affordable for the premium features.

I liked being able to track the dates and the expenses. It's 3 stars now only because I haven't utilise the other functions yet (calendar and budget). If it could sync between devices, I'd immediately give it 5 stars.
I love the update! Even easier to use & I love the new customizations!
too little free item slots, not really usefull

I love this app to inventory my cosmetic collection, track spending, see purchasing trends, and store wishlist items. I am using Beautistics to be a more mindful consumer and I think the subscription cost is worth the data aggregation.

Great for organising my makeup products. However, would be good if i can input the color type for the product as i have multiple lipsticks from the same brand same product line but in different color.

I have using this app for a couple of months & I love it. I have upgraded to the premium version & have catalogued my huge makeup collection into this app. The main reason I use it is for my Project Pan - it's so quick & easy to see usage. There are a few glitches but I am seeing improvements with every update.

I want to love this app, but I paid for the lifetime upgrade and still can not access the premium features. If this can be fixed, I will definitely change my review as I really like the app so far. *thank you for the quick response and fix!* Definitely worth 5 stars.
Great app. I do wish I could sort alphabetically and by brand. Being able to change the name of the "other" tab would be great too. Otherwise, I'm really enjoying the app!

I love this App! I love to be organized and mix and match and plan out a weeks worth of looks using my collection. The budget feature is pretty cool too. I hope they make another app that does everything this does but with the clothes in my closet. Keep up the good work!
Great tool for organizing, tracking, and using my stash of cosmetics! Highly recommend! Customer service is also incredibly respinsive and are constantly updating with better features.

Waste of time , items imputed disappear, barcode scanner never recognizes top brands and the free version only allows 20 items. 20$ for premium but it does not work. Waste of time and money, do not purchase please!!!

It annoys the HECK out of me that my tags are not being saved when I assign them to products. So whenever I try to look up something based on tags... Nothing. It's been like this for weeks. I was hoping this would have been fixed already.
This is the exact app I've been looking for. It really helps me keep on top of my products and make sure I'm using things before their expiry date, and also tracking what I'm purchasing.
I had very high hopes for this app. Paid for the upgrade to premium, and additional features are still unavailable. Tried to contact dev via email and IG with no response. I'm very disappointed!
Loved it. Bought the premium version and I'm enjoying using it. A suggestion is possibly letting us order the makeup list? E.g. alphabetical order, order by category, customised order etc.
Very helpful app. There was a delay after payment for premium features to work but I contact CS and they got it working immediately, great customer service!
Love this app! Really helpful for makeup inventory, budgeting and tracking. I'm going to track my project pans and my no-buy for next year with this.
This app is useful when it comes to project pan and adding products to see when the expiry date is. It is also helpful to see how much you have spent on beauty products!
This app does great tracking each make up product you have. However It doesn't tell you the expiration date.

This app is a godsend. I use it to track my purchases but also track my entire collection including things I get for free through my profession. 100 stars to customer service for helping me transfer my collection over from my old device to a new one. ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
I like the app, but it seems to have a bug where the expiry date in the edit screen always shows as 1/1/30? Even when elsewhere it shows the expiry date correctly

I was looking for this type of application for a long time. Overall, it's very put together app with nice UI. A couple of suggestions: (1) ability to increase use counter in project pan view, (2) size unit defined per product (liquids are easier to track in ml and solids in grams), (3) ability to filter by tag (in addition to category filter), (4) show expiration date in List view, (5) ability to select time period and top usages by categories in Summary, or have usages section in Statistics
I like the app but some of the dates of purchase and expiration dates you set won't save properly!

As a Blind makeup hobbyist, this incredibly useful tool has totally relieved my organisational woes! Easy to navigate, efficacious functionality, TalkBack accessible. The $5.99/yearly Pro version is SO worth it!

This app is too time consuming. There should be an easier way to add products, such as being able to scan the bar code and it automatically loads the product information to include brand, product name, and price.
Love this app. Helps me keep track of all my beauty/makeup items and when they expire. Thanks Beautistics!
I absolutely love this app! Keeps me organized and preventing me from over consumption of products.
I have been looking for an app like this for 5 years. Its everything I want for managing my makeup amd skincare collection.
This is EXACTLY what I was looking for! I have way too much makeup and wanted a way to organize/inventory it. I like it so much I purchased the upgrade. Thanks so much for making this!
used it to keep track. Since update keeps saying loading all I have on it has gone
I love this app! I've been using it for almost 2 years now. My only complaint is I can't use it on my chrombook or computer.
This app is helping me to keep track of my products and when they expire. I'm trying out the project pan functions next.
Bar code is not working for all products. I suggest uou may integrate google lens to add product. I reside in india so most brands are also not there even big brands like MAC and smashbox
Doesn't transfer saved information to other devices. I have asked for help. Still won't work.
It only allows you to add a couple products before you then have to pay to add more
I think it could be alot better. I'm getting used to it tho. But it is kind of a pain in the butt. It's a great concept, great idea. Keep at it.

The free version is good, but I paid for a subscription, and half of my current products are not listed in the catalog. And I can't add them directly because I no longer have their boxes to scan or take ingredient pics. I emailed support, and they provided a workaround. It gets the job done, but it's not seamless or intuitive. I will get use out of the app, but there could definitely be improvement to the user experience. Additionally, I've noticed the recs don't honor my personal preferences.

Creates more confusion. 95% of functionality is behind a paywall & the 3 day trial isnt even enough to learn how to navigate all the screens. The products it recommends are obscure & if you select them it says theyre a bad choice. Its recommending a routine where I cleanse, then treatment serum, then cleanse again? Ads show a progress tracking graph but its just a fake, static, sample graph that doesnt change with your progress. Photo analysis is ok, not worth being stuck w/ a year subscription

I love how you scan take quizzes on what skin type you are, there are many options and parts of your skin that can be oily to dry, it's very simple and easy. My favorite part is after the quizzes, they suggest products to you with % matches and ratings and tell you how well they'd work on your skin, they're price, what they do, where to apply, ect. Truly amazing!!!😍

I much prefer the older version since it allowed you to save and revisit previously searched products, and it was just more esthetically pleasing to the eye. Also, cropping photos was much more functional. The new cropping tool doesn't allow for each side of the photo to be cropped independently. Two starts because being able to easily look up ingredients is still helpful. Just wish some of the old features would be brought back.

The concept is great. But it's a bit out of date. Too many products suggested are no longer available and not enough of newer products are covered. It also seems to mistake combination skin for oily acne prone skin. It's difficult to find products that aren't tailored to one or the other. Products I've managed to find afters years of trial and error were marked as inappropriate and products I absolutely know would leave my skin a mess are recommended.

Really annoying that now days a lot of things require a subscription. Its hard to use it without a subscription, subscription popup comes up every 2 minutes and 90% of the features are locked behind a paywall. Edit: "unlimited" is a funny way to describe it. I added 5 products in the time I had the app, and during that time, I hit limits for free content several ways. You can only make 1 custom list with 5 items. I understand needing to make money. But being reminded every 3 mins is annoying.

This app is such a time and money saver! Though I've always looked for products made for sensitive skin, many of them still left my skin irritated. My skin is also dry, so finding effective moisturizers (that is affordable) is an added challenge. However, having this app let's me easily scan ingredients, and explains why a product may or may not work for my needs. I would love to have something like this for hair care as well!

Awesome app! You can analyze ANY PRODUCT you have the ingredients for. If a product isn't in the database you can either take a picture of the ingredient list from the packaging, or copy and paste the list from elsewhere online. I HIGHLY recommend this app. I know they are working on having more products in their database and I'm looking forward to that! Customer service is also very helpful. I hope more ingredients are added too though, such as bakuchiol. Currently it doesn't really register.

The is by far the best skincare app I've used to determine the best products for my skin needs. The reports are so cute and easily readable. It helped me understand why the products I'm currently using havent been working for me. I love this app! Im giving it 4/5 stars since there is room for improvement. I think it would be helpful to allow users to take a photo of the product that they scanned ingredients using the analysis feature to better keep track of what we've scanned in the past.

Hands down an amazing app for all skincare journeys! I can't spend $200 on skin care and this app makes it easy to find amazing products for a full skin routine for under $90. I've recommended to friends and family and they've had a lot of success. We take trips to the store just to scan products and find a gem or two! Amazing app and definitely worth a try

Everything was alright, I use searching and comparison features the most. But it's because of the loading screen. Ive been stuck in the loading screen for a long time whenever I tried to open the app. It took a very long time to manage to open the app. :/ at least like 30minutes or something. I did tried reinstalling and reopening again.

They went into detail about all the products and what goes well with every element of your skin. The test was so accurate as well! They have so many products with ratings that I know now what to use,and since listening to this app and changing my skincare routine, my skin is clear for the first time in years!!! You may think it's useless, but trust me, it's not. It might be exactly what you're looking for to find the fault in your routine,and you can easily improve it, cost aware too.

Honestly this app is really amazing. I don't know a lot about skincare but I've learned so much from using it, especially with the routine builder! The scanner is great when shopping for new products as I can easily see what won't suit me I've marked it down a star because there's no way to go back and mark past routines as completed. I often forget to log my routine and I'd like the option to go back and mark it as completed!

I was gonna leave a nice review, but you can not contact any staff person in the built-in mail chat. And I had a problem with paying too, so it was really annoying to see that there is no support. Don't bother to activate the 7 day free trial because you are obligated to pay for a full month (thus making the trial literally useless because you are still charged from day 1 without the possibility to get the money back).

Very good app, but it would be better to have an option to sort saved products and rate them, as well as edit ingredients after the analysis was complete. I noticed that it interpreted some ingredients wrong. Also adding the picture of a product so it looks more like your pre-existing products profiles with the option to favorite, etc. would be nice too.

very very good app! *-* the best from skin care I ever found! I would also like to make a suggestion, would be great to have more "male" products in the data base. My boyfriend also loves skin care, we do it together and we did not find any of the products he uses in the database. besides that, I cant wait for the new feat. and add my routine to it :D

It's a great app and I love the recommendations but I have just two issues. 1. The "Best match" recommendations are all super expensive and when I set the settings for cheaper options, most come up under "Not the best match" or even "Don't recommend" and it's a little stressing. 2. When you search up products and you set it to sunscreens, you have to leave the search bar, reload and then go back to get rid of that setting. Other than that, it's great! I love it.

while the actual use of the app seems like a good idea, it was quite buggy with alerts popping up every second, starting when i first registered. edit: after talking to the developers, and uninstalling and reinstalling the app, i found that all my issues had disappeared, and the app was functioning as normal. i found that it is quite useful for someone new to skincare, as they could learn what is good and bad for their skin type

If you don't live in the US/W Europe most suggestions won't be available. The suggestions seem very arbitrary, seemingly based on the filters you choose only. It's not bad, but since the app claims to be personalized to "your unique skin", it's a let down. Possible allergens seem to bring the score down even if you have no sensibility/allergies. It could be better to ask what products/ingredients work for the user and try matching that info with the suggestions. Search crashes a lot too.

I just love this app so much. as I'm trying to be a more conscious consumer of skincare products this app has been of great help to me on this journey. I finally don't have to read the whole ingredients list and then spend so much time analysing it. The only changes I would make is adding oilyness to the list of skin concerns and more skincare product recommendations based on the country of residence and what is available there, also some budget friendly options would be lovely

I have been using this app for around 5 years and recently it has been messing up with any ingenious list I copy and paste. after clicking analys i find weird ingredients that were in the list. I double checked and I realized it did that with around 3 or 4 ingredients. it misses some and adds some that were not there even which messes the result. hope it gets fixed soon.

Been waiting to find and app like this. I try to keep updated but there's so much information and too many factors. I really enjoy system, it's quite easy to use and the way it already takes previous parameters into consideration. 10/10. Super pretty and easy to use. I'd say there should be a way to enter the info for a product if you have it and update the info. Or maybe send for review we could also help make the database bigger. Amazing work!!

Very good application! This helps me to know better about the product I use. A little suggestion, can you add a category for serum products? I tried to analyze the serum I use and this application says that the product is a toner. It's a bit confusing becauase the serum that I'm using is pretty good, but analysis says it's not that good. Maybe because compared to other toner products, where more ingredients are used than serum, it results in a lower score. Even so, great app!

You can very easily get full info about every ingridient of your skincare products/makeup. It shows if it's a match for your skin type or not, and what might get your specific conditions worse (just learned some of my products are actually pretty bad for my acne/oily skin even if the package says otherwise), so you'll know what you shouldn't buy, it also let's you check if a product is vegan/suitable for pregnant women and all of that. Highly recommend, especially when you're out shopping

Impressed. I've been looking for something like this to identify vegan products however, I was completely sold when they allowed a Halal option - while products are limited in this aspect, I appreciate the app considering this as a skin care concern for some people. I'll most likely use the vegan option anyway but I'm happy with the UI, easy navigation, filters and just the plethora of info and helpful links to products.

This app is the answer to what I've wanted before: a practical and accesible source of information for skincare and the ingredients. The UI is simple. It uses the approach of personal needs, and that the system will generate recommendations based on data. Not just "yes" or "no", it also explains "why" the ingredient is good or bad. For those that doesn't have time to read every single paper about every single ingredient, I think this will suit you!

It was a pretty good experience for me that I can see the matching percentage of the skin care to my skin. That's where the problems occur.I've found the skincare that I desire through the searching part and it shows that the percentage of the skincare that suits to my combination skin is 94%. Afterwards, I copy and paste the ingredient of the same skincare at the ingredient analyzer but then It shows 64%.I don't know which one should I believe as the result makes a huge different.

This app is AMAZING! Usually, when I'd buy new product, I always look at Incidecoder/Skincarisma first. It was helpful for checking the ingredients, but not enough for when deciding which product I should buy. This app literally save my time bcs I could apply filters that match my skin concerns. I like how they classified each product, so I could have more option of which product I should buy and worth to buy for my skin. I hope they add another feature such as skincare regime planner/schedule.

used to download this before it was popular. missed the old one, the UI design was much better. the new one was confusing and I feel disappointed by the amount of free scanning they gave unlike the old one was unlimited. now, I can't even get in the app. always stuck on the skinbliss magic page. was a good app that I like

Not what I expected. I was hoping I could have the option to analyze my skin every time I would take pictures or simply have a daily scan. The picture comparison doesn't work at all. I see the concerns from one day on the left and the right side for the second day is blank and the rest of the report is blank.

I used the app in the past to learn more and set a good face routine tailored to my skin. It was easy to use and very simple. However, since the revamp update it's a lot clunkier and harder to navigate, I don't enjoy using it anymore and it's a lot harder to set the filters I want to the right products. 5*+ for the old app, 3* at best for the new app for me.

I've always wanted to take better care of my skin but didn't know how because there's so much information and I didn't know what helped. Since getting this app, I've been able to get accurate and helpful products and even tips that help a lot. If you're already a skincare guru or just a total noob like me who only cleanses and moisturises (I'll soon get sunscreen, chill 😂), I'd definitely recommend this app

This really like this app because its extremely educational. Especially for skin care as that's the main purpose of the app, but it really covers a good range of different situations especially with facial skin and really aids in finding you the best product they know is made for specific reasons. I also really like this app because they also have educational slides on how to take care of different types of skin and even gives you tips on facial beauty and other skin care related issues.

Great but needs a few improvements. The app crashes or more specifically it says that it lost connection to the network very often which can be frustrating. I also wish you could add you own products that you scan, products that aren't already in the app. It would be nice if there was a way to share thoughts with other on products, like a comment section. Thank you for this amazing app 💕

This spp is okay for a while it gives you good information about the products but my concerns are that the app will glitch out and stay on one product,if it shies you can buy a product it says there out of stock or they don't sell in your country,searching for ingredients took a while cause the app couldn't load the words and crash and finally my screen would turn grey sometimes for weird reasons. Its a good app but can be better.

I've used this app for years ❤️It helped me find affordable skincare that I would've never considered. My skin is clear from breakouts now, minus a few small spots of hyperpigmentation. The development team is often very responsive and takes in all feedback to try to meet user needs. Their recent update did limit access to formerly free features, such as limiting scans, but searching their catalog is always an option just as easily. This is must-have shopping app to keep in your pocket!

oh my gosh! I'm can't believe an app can give me so much info! I scanned the ingredients of an $80 product that I had high hopes for and I found out way more than I would have by reading a 100 buyer reviews or product reviews or descriptions. the only thing I can compare it to is taking all of your products to a dermatologist and have them sit, go over every ingredient, why it is or isn't good for you, and like a BUNCH of other super useful info. I'm wowed! Thank you so so much for this app!

I really like this app, all the details bout the ingredients are so much helpful to me, I'm just wonderijg if you could add more details on about price or the product availability in many countries? I'm from Southest Asia and it's kinda hard for me to find the suggested product at local drugstore. Everything is good, I really like the explanation given for each product :)

The limitations for non-supporters are really annoying. Paying for something is supposed to give extra benefits, not basic functions. It's also wildly inaccurate with ratings, and so many products that have sucked for me are rated super high while holy grails are rated low to average. Why would I pay for something that doesn't even work?

So many good features my skin is improving quite a bit! It still needs some work like general QoL improvements and more intl products as many products are usually just available in the EU. The app can sometimes be a little bit unintuitive, like pressing the back button in a search doesnt go back or reset the search, and using their home button still leaves you in the search. Their algorithm for suggestions and the AI for the ingredient photos is really good though!

I recommend this app forfor the sake of your investment. I rarely give 5 stars to apps but here why I did this one. Before buying a product that says "helps with fine lines" etc we all hope it does given most facial products in this age are expensive. The quality of ingredients plays a enormous factor in the regiment of skincare. The cheap products made my issues worse and all the expensive ones served no purpose for what im aiming for.

Filters are useless, This app will analyse your skin and act like a doctor, meaning it'll disregard your input because it thinks it's right, I'll ask it to filter out non-vegan or non-crualty free prodructs in the search and it will still show them because they are a "good match for my skin" so I lose a lot of time looking through products. I even tried to payed version to see if it was any better and it wasn't. Finally the indicated prices aren't accurate.

Amazing app unfortunately the things I'm looking for are paid :( After being answered I will complete this review: I'm from Brazil and the amount of products there are no where here, so I need to look up for similars, it's alright, but I really want to improve my skin and for this (I already went to a professional) I needed a better routine, even if it's just some easy steps to my skin type, as I said the app is amazing but the things I'm looking for are paid and I can't afford this now.

I absolutely love the app overall. I especially love how I can scan the ingredients of skincare products without needing to individually search up the ingredients and its effects on my skin. It has made it so much easier for me to buy the right skincare products for my skin.

Product reviews is one thing. But getting a blow-by-blow info on what works for your skin and how a product addresses skin concerns is another level. And this is IT!!! I'm honestly happy to have found this cause it takes the confusing guess-work out. No more extra costs; no more confusion.

Please ALWAYS be free. This is insanely educational and beautifully designed. I was blown away by how easy it was to learn about the products I'm using. My favorite part is if you search up very popular or hyped products, the algorithm will tell you if and why it's suitable for your skin or not, based on what you need and your skin type. I can't explain how impressed I am. Keep up the good work!

love this app!! made me realize a lot of the products I'm using arent great for my skin. I've switched my routine since and my skin already looks better. super happy about this app. can't wait for future updates :) I am removing a star because I have been a loyal user of this app for a long time, joined the beta program, and was really excited with what you were doing with the updates. however I'm extremely disappointed with having to pay to use features I consider essential.

The new version is worse, first version was very easy to use. I liked the old version more, in which you put the ingredients of a product, and it gave you a grade for the product and which of the ingredients are toxic and which are not. Now we have to enter at least 3 pieces of information to. After the update, my profile was deleted. There is no history of the searches we have done.

it's pretty nice! i've got a suggestion that might make it easier and more practical to use, though: maybe the user can tap on the brand's name (when they're viewing a product) and it takes us to that brand's "page" with the rest of its products within the app!

Overall a good enough app to know the availability of products and what can you find in a brand but the main issue is that the results differ soo much if you search the product than when you scan it, it gives totally different results so i don't know what to follow, that's why i gave one star, that maybe small difference makes alot specially with sensitive skin.

A NEED. I absolutely love it. I just ordered tons of skincare products for me and my momma and it helped me save a lot of money. It help me avoid wasting my money on products that aren't suitable for our skin. I would love to recommend this app and keep it forever. Very helpful. Thank you for making this app. Keep up the amazing work. ❤️❤️ Suggestion: •More products •Add "season" filter. Or idk what it's called. Ex: best products suitable for summer. Huehue

I think this is a great app. However I think there is a lot of room to grow, more preferences and options required (ex: show items for sale in certain stores), less sensitivity to criteria and results or like, categorized results, more products to be added and to fix the camera issues. This app is really cool but for the level it's at now and how reliant someone can find themselves on this info, it needs to be impeccable. Please keep investing. I am hugely supportive.

It is user friendly. But the cons are, data takes time to load and there are cases that has issues such as adding product, it returns an error and many more. Aside from the functionality itself, it really provides a detailed information of the product which could help the user. A great app for a beginner skincare like me 👍

I REALLY like the concept and layout its great and simple. But as it is now its unuseable. I search for cleansers, It tells me 400+ results for me. I scrolls through maybe 20 products. Then it snaps me back to the top of those 20 products. So it just keeps showing me the same 20 products. And things arent accurate to the price filter. Has potential if this is fixed.

This is absolutely amazing and I 100% recommend, it shows absolutely every piece of information you could possibly want as well as the price and availability (in most). The only thing is I think a filter on the country would be perfect so Im not looking at products which I can't buy! Thank u so much for this app!!!

Literally saved my skin wow I've been using the app for about 2 years now and it was honestly the best thing I ever did for my skin Not only are the results super detailed and curated, but they're also very simple for us folks who suck at chemistry and just want to know if an ingredient is good or not, and what for. I built my whole skincare routine from scratch using this app and I've had great results! Def recommend

The app analyzes skincare ingredients so it's really helpful for choosing skincare product which seems suitable for my skin type, concern, and lifestyle. But I keep getting disconnected/ maintenance message after scanning/ analyzing some products, so i need to wait several minutes for it to be back to normal.

Excellent app! Gives a perfect breakdown of ingredients list in skincare products! Just a suggestion. Please let us know your opinion too, after analysing the ingredients. For example - if I have got a product that has some questionable ingredients, then also let us know below the analysis that whether you should continue with this product or not, as that would be extremely helpful! Overall thanks. Loved it.

Super super helpful. Skinbliss has helped me find the perfect skin products and routine that works for me and avoid buying expensive products that do more harm than good. It is very personalised with a quiz about your skin bc some products are going to work for your skin type and others won't. I only wish that they had more Australian products listed and that they do hair products and shaving products as well.

I like the idea of the app, but a few important things are missing: 1) if you log a routine and then change it, it retroactively changes it in your diary. It should leave it as is so I can track what changes I've made to my routine. 2) Some very important skincare ingredients are just not available at all, mainly adapalene and tretinoin (the latter is available, but the app only says it's banned in the EU). Some people have genuine prescriptions for these and would like to track them too.

This app has been so incredibly helpful. I've been struggling with my skin for months and had trouble finding products that would actually help and not worsen any of my issues, but now it's slowly but surely getting better and I can keep track of what does and doesn't work. I ended up paying for the subscription as the additional features were really helpful for me, but you can certainly still get a lot of use out of it as a free user. Devs also quickly fix glitches as they arise!

The app is lovely and super helpful, especially for those if us who know little to nothing about skincare. The main issue I have is the app has the option to blacklist ingredients, which is AMAZING but it doesn't actually blacklist the ingredients. I have coconut ingredients blocked due to allergies but if I go to an item I can look at the ingredient list and see it has coconut in it but it's still reccomended and states there is no blacklisted ingredients in the product.

This app is amazing! Ive used it for over 6 months now and every time I used to break out from a product or it made my skin irritated the app gave it a low score for me on suitability. I started using it as the only way to look for skincare and I haven't had any terrible issues since. I checked and every product that I liked before it have it a good score, I trust this app and hopefully it won't make me waste money.

Edit: the problem is solved! The app is rlly good btw :D I was wondering why I was having blemishes all of a sudden, turned out the products i was using had questionable ingredients! Also the feature to find the best skin products for your skin type is rlly useful! Definitely would recommend to ppl new in the skincare journey(人*´∀｀).^♡

This app is awesome, it gives me tips on everything I need to know. For example sunscreen, double cleansing, skincare in the winter, retinol, etc. They also let you scan any skincare product to see if it's good for you skin type or not. I recommend 100%. (btw I'm serious)

Wanted to check out some possible solutions for my skin and thought this app seemed like it was it. Took 2 attempts to make an account cuz it booted me out after tapping the Google sign in option. Second time I just pressed the email one. But immediately after, Google informed me that the app had exposed my password to another party. Thank God I didn't use the same pass as the real one for my Google. But seriously? Imma uninstall, this is very concerning.

Whenever I add the exact same product (same ingredients, product type, etc.) it always gives me a different "match" score. This has ranged from only a 46% match, to an 83% match, all for the exact same product. This app uses AI in order to calculate whether a product is a match for your skin type, rather than evidence, and I personally wouldn't consider it a trustworthy source of information when deciding on what to include in your skincare routine.

Options to filter products that are too expensive, and to only show products from selected stores (like lookfantastic etc.) would be very helpful. Other than that it's an excellent app, I definitely recommend it Edit: Changed to five stars since these options were included in an update!

Really great app so far. Just one concern. Under your list of skin types, you have mentioned 'sensitive', but there is no option to choose that skin type for my profile. Please help fix this. I have chosen combination for now, but the most accurate would be sensitive.

I'm not even going to lie, this is one of the best apps i have ever used and I'm so serious about it. i've used it for more than a year now and i always check skincare products before buying them and this app has never failed me, everytime it says it's a good match i see a positive effect. my skin condition has improved so much with the aid of this app and the interface is much better than other skincare apps i've tried. i recommend this to pretty much everyone i know lol

I use this App to learn more about skincare ingredients, what the role of each one is and which ones could be problematic for my skin condition. It definitely makes navigating products easier for a group of people whose values are not cared about much in western culture

This app is the best thing I wish I had it starting off, I litterally don't know how it's free, I definitely am not the type of person to spend money on an app so Im really happy this exists.
