playStoreApps.name: PetBacker-Dog Boarding, Sitter
playStoreApps.developer: Pet Backer | Your Trusted House Sitter for Pets

playStoreReviews.text: Buggy as hell. App gets more and more unreliable after the first week. Takes longer and longer to start, freezes constantly and runs in the background and refuses to shutdown.

I thought I'd found a good Tracker, apparently not ,was telling me that there was no Internet but it was turned on . Then when it did work I was unable to view the map route ,all I got was a blank page ??? ..Looking for a replacement at the moment ,hopefully it's more reliable. 🤔🤔.Can't understand why you have to select a dog before you start.... 🤔🤔

After Tractive discontinued their Dog Walk app, I was looking for another simple app to keep track of each client's pet with a log of our time & distance walked. Treatwalk is exactly what I need as a full time walker, but issues with a laggy UI, connecting to the server to start & end walks & the timer randomly not working I can't give it the 5 stars I wish I could. It's is pretty much a brand new app so I'm hoping these issues are resolved soon! Potential to be EXCELLENT!

I've been using this app for a few months now, and it's been amazing for keeping me motivated to walk my dogs every day. The streak feature is such a fun way to stay consistent — I actually look forward to getting out there just to keep it going! It’s helped turn a daily routine into something I’m proud of, and I feel way more accountable and productive because of it. If you’re looking for a little extra push to stay active with your pets, I can’t recommend it enough. I’m super happy with it!

Only thing accurate is the timer. Took walk with both dogs. My phone said over 3000 steps. App said 50 dog steps. Distance walked was also inaccurate. Map of route was worthless. Deleting now. Don't waste your time.
I really like the app so far but could you add an option to choose cycling or running instead of just play or walk? It would be great to be able to track that.
Loving this app! Lots of fun tracking my walks in a new way. Wish I could interact with other users.

I've had this app for a long time. Initially it worked fine, felt you're part of a good cause. Then with every update it got worse. It would pause, freeze or shut down on its own. Distance would be inaccurate. Now, it's basically useless. I can't remember the last time there was a challenge. And the app still shuts down randomly. I've installed, reinstalled. Cleared cache. Just a buggy app. PS. I have the most recent version and when go to Community and click Public groups, shuts down.

Been using the app for almost 2 years now and it has always stopped tracking if I record a video while on our walk. I thought maybe the location settings on my phone's camera were interfering with the app, but when I checked, I didn't even have location enabled on the camera to begin with. Not sure what else would be interfering with the tracking while I have the camera app open, but it's the only app that conflicts with WoofTrax in such a way.

I have been using this app for years. Once in a while something would happen and it wouldn't track or the app would crash. It did not happen often though. Yesterday, I started using the updated version of the app. I hate it!! GPS location is off by quite a bit. GPS bounces all over the place and does not track the mileage accurately. Very disappointing as I walk, hike and backpack with my dogs a lot and like to track the mileage. I will have to find a different app to use.

I have had this app for about 7 years. Doesn't always track right, I thought because of dicey internet coverage. I got a new phone and now I keep getting notifications saying that the app is turning on intermittently and using up the battery. It said to put it deep sleep, but then it wouldn't work at all. I have uninstalled and reinstalled twice, no luck. I really like earning money for my local humane shelter, but these issues are making it frustrating. Is there anything that would fix it?

I have used this app for a long time and have really enjoyed knowing that my walks with my dogs could potentially add to the life of another dog. Now, with the new update, it doesn't track more than half the time, it's hardly ever accurate mileage-wise (I also use MayMyRun and another mileage tracker just by default). I have "better" luck if it is on and stays "on top" if you will but I shouldn't need to do that. I now feel like this tracker is just being used for route tracking or app popularity contest over something actually potentially helpful to other animals. I hope the bugs get fixed sooner than later.

FIX THIS APP!!!!! I, too, used to love and use the app regularly. But lately it has not recorded my walks accurately and because I can't walk too often in the winter due to knee issues, it is extremely important that when I do walk, it is recorded. The shelter I walk for needs as many people counted as possible! UPDATE: App appears to be fixed and working better. Now that the weather is cooler I'll be walking more and will monitor walks to make sure they are counted. So far so good. Thank you!

Stops on its own and doesn't track how long you've walked for. I'm not going to be looking at my phone every minute to ensure the app is still running. I actually pay attention to my dogs on our walks. Wouldn't recommend, even though it goes toward good cause. Even five years later, I'd still give this app one star. Same review as before: the app pauses/stops on its own while you're walking.

I have been using this app for quite some time and just using the update version today for the first time, I don't like it! You can't delete walks if you accidentally hit the start button or am trying something out, you can't go back into your history of walks individually for your speed, mph, or distance. This isn't very user friendly anymore!! ***UPDATE***** 5/14/2020 I've used it a few more times and have played around with the app and have seen how you can share, snap shot your info and see all of your stats from your walk you just did!! It's just difficult to get used to something different when you're so used to using it the way you started with it!!!

This would have been 5 stars but after a recent update, the app stops constantly without my realizing, so 2/3 or more of my walks don't get counted-every time! It tracked seamlessly every time before the update. Now, every time I finish a walk, I look at the app and it appears to have paused on its own blocks ago, and now is prompting me with "continue activity?" So frustrating! Most of my walk mileage is lost every time!! May have to find another app.

I've had this app for years, loved it, promoted it to everyone, it was an amazing app, easy to use, you could track your steps, I use to zoom in and take screenshots of my travels for my clients. This new update is horrible, the interface is not user friendly, it's harder to get started, especially when you're hands are full with excited animals. It doesn't track as well, furthermore, it used to show you where you were, I've gotten lost a few times, the map use to be so accurate, I could find.

I love the idea behind this app, and have been using it for a few years. But the tracker is incredibly spotty, and more often than not lately it cuts out a few minutes into my walk, and doesn't record the entire distance despite still running/keeping time in the background. It's frustrating as I do a lot of long walks and hikes and would love for those miles to contribute to a good cause!

I used to love this app. Over the last couple of weeks, it hasn't tracked any mileage. I thought it might be because the weather had gotten cold and my phone wasn't allowing it because the phone was in my pocket. However, I've been carrying the phone in my hand and it still doesn't track. It starts and after a few seconds, mileage and time seem to freeze. Please fix this, as I've seen others saying the same thing. I love this app! Please fix the issues!

I've used this for a long time and it used to do a decent job of tracking. Now it's awful. It keeps pausing my walk, so I don't get credit for most of it. It's very frustrating to come back from a 30-minute walk and see it tracked .01 miles. I don't have power save on and my location is on, so it's not me, It's the app. I hope they fix this, my charity is getting short-changed.

I thought this would be a good way to help a local shelter. I can live with the ads after using the app, but the app tracking is just too much to take. Trackers from/to Google, Integral Ad Science, Visual Studio App Center and DoubleVerify. I work in E-commerce, so I "get it", but that doesn't mean that I have to allow this app to collect over 70 data points on me. I'll just make a donation to my local shelter and uninstall the app.

I have used this app for about 3 years this time, and thought it was great, until the last update. Now it will not finish but only pauses. Which means the mileage will not update, and the map will not apply to a date/time. This means there is NO donation made. Unless it is fixed I will have to delete it and maybe reinstall. PLEASE fix this. Logging out and back in unlocked the app! Only lost about 25 walks and 30 miles! If it works when I walk the next few days I will update. Thank you.

so far not crazy about this app. It never calculates the distance correctly or matches what shows on my fitbit. On top of that, I don't know what happens, but I did a 4 mile walk today and nothing showed logged on the app. And there should be some way to manually enter your time and distance when it fails or upload it from your phone or other tracking device. And I still have to get any response from customer service on my emails to them.

Pros:  Like being able to give back just by walking.  Tracks walks well so if you don't use something else to see where/how long your walks are, this will do it.  Cons:  Hasn't been updated in a year.  Would like to be able to stop/resume walks from the notification drawer.  Would like to be able to see the amount of money given to the charity per walk/month/year whatever.    Overall, pretty good.  The fact that it hasn't been updated in a year and you can't see the amount given to the charity makes me feel like it isn't doing what it says it is.  I will likely continue using it though.

Looks good... ON PAPER ONLY! I (and others!) have sent emails regarding app interruptions (you have to check the app to make sure it wasn't stopped) when phone calls are received and when other apps are used. SO FAR BOTH OF MY EMAILS HAVE BEEN IGNORED. CUSTOMER SERVICE VIRTUALLY NON EXISTENT - APPARENTLY THEY'RE MORE CONCERNED ABOUT ADVERTISER'S CLICKS THAN ASSISTING SUBSCRIBERS!!! If you don't believe me, click on "See All Reviews" & look at the issues then look at the dates they were submitted

This app worked great when I first started to use it about 1.5-2 years ago, however, now it no longer tracks the miles we walk, only the time. In addition, it will randomly pause itself during a walk or unpause during a stop. Super frustrating! I use this with another app, and this app when it does record the mileage, is always off by atleast a mile or so. Definitely needs fixing!

So far on two walks, the app stopped tracking at some point. My Samsung health tracker is pretty accurate, clocked me at 3 miles. Your app only recorded a portion of it. I'll try one more walk and if it fails to track accurately, I'll delete the app. I can understand auto pause when I stop to pick up poop or give my dog water, but it should restart automatically as well.

This app used to be great. Haven't used it in a while until recently and it starts a walk but quickly pauses/ends the walk or just doesn't record. It was last updated almost a year ago and all their social media has gone silent too. Would be nice to know if this company was having problems or just closed up shop. Ugh.

Update: I made changes so it has permission to run in the background and it now tracks the whole walk. I can understand the optimize reminder while on my walk but I get them five hours after the walk unless I force stop the app after each walk. --original- With the latest version of the app on Android 13, it will typically track for 20 minutes then stop. My last couple walks, it stopped tracking after 5 minutes before I get to the 1/4 mile point. I've checked my settings and nothing looks amiss.

The updated app is awful. Since the update it stops tracking after a few minutes. So we only get credit for part of the total time and mileage. On top of that the app no longer stays open. It used to be I could start the app, turn my screen off and when I turned the screen back on the app would still be open. Now it isn't. I have to re-open the app, only to find out that it stopped tracking 30 minutes before the end of the walk.

I just installed this app and I can already see a major issue I'm going to have with it: the unkillable popup asking me to turn on my location, even though I'm not walking! I know I have to enable location to track my walk, but if I'm not walking, then location doesn't need to be turned on. Tapping "No thanks" does nothing. I'm having trouble even setting up my account because of this bloody location popup, and I'm already considering uninstalling it.

Have used this app for years. I like being able to track walks, distances and durations to help stay fit. Your new look is fine, easy to navigate. The only thing that looks amiss is the Community. Under my charity you show over 200 people in it. In the old app, there were about 20 or so. I am no longer able to compare my walks to the other members in Last Chance Ranch. I liked trying to compete with the top walkers. Can you get more points for longer walks or distances?

Great purpose, but app is jusy okay. I have been using it for a few weeks now but the GPS does not always work. I have had a few walks that this app will kot track my location and will not provide the total distance walked. I have a different app running at the same time for my fitness tracker that measures my walk with no GPS problems.

This app no longer works. Too bad, as I really liked it back when it was working. I liked that I could just record/track my walks without all the extraneous nonsense that most step-counters include, AND that I could help the rescue I volunteer with at the same time. Now I have to find another walk tracker. :(

I just upgraded the app and began using it again. It looks like tracking issue has been resolved (through 2 walks). It also looks like it was able to find all of my walks and total distances since I've been using this app (for at least 6 years). Those totals show up when opening the app. The actual walking history with date and distance only shows details of the walk since upgrading the app.

The app worked great for the last 6 years...until the recent upgrade. Now, it's the worst tracking app ever. My usual daily walk through my neighborhood is just over 1 mile. Lately, I get home only to find it tracked about 0.25 miles and only part of my route. I uninstalled because it's worthless! Bring back the old version and maybe I will try again. Until then, it's just taking up space on my phone so bye-bye. And, no need to email with tracking tips. Already tried all that.

I LOVE this app so much. I learned about it through the rescue where we got our pup Lulu - Recycled Pets Nor-Cal. I think it is fantastic that walking my dog can help support great organizations. I really love that the app tracks my routes (time, distance covered and a map of the route we took!). It is so cool to look back at the history of our walks. The updated version of the app is wonderful.

Just put this on my smartphone and tried to use it, but if the screen goes off, it stops tracking. Even with no power saving and allowing background data and location enabled, I walked a couple of miles with my Dobermans, and the app said I only walk 0.06 of a mile and my walking speed was 1.5 mph. I know I walk faster than that. It's great it's for a good cause, but not doing any good when the app doesn't work. Yes, I have the latest version. Don't respond back with just contact support.

I love the idea of the app, but the tracker is VERY inaccurate by between .25 and .5 miles. I found the only way to fix this was to frequently pull my phone out and unlock it. It then updates the map, but treats any curves in a trail as a direct straight line in-between the points. This may account for the errors in distance. My GPS confirmed 1 mile route showed up as .65 of a mile and an entire section of trail I walked wasn't recorded. This was an urban trail, not off in the mountains.

Became completely useless. Used to work ok. Seemed accurate on distance and time but not accurate with pace. Previously it would show a pop up add when finished then data. Now when I say I'm done it just stops and gives me no options. Have rebooted phone even uninstalled and re-installed. Same thing 100% useless now. Update: Signing out then in does work but I never know when it will be needed. When I do it loses the most recently completed walk. I wish wooftrax would actually fix this.

This app was great before they completely overhauled it a couple months ago. I have had nothing but inaccuracies and problems since... Like only recording partial walks or randomly ending your walk without saying your finished. I used to be able to run other apps (like my camera or book of faces) but now, if I open one while on a walk, it promptly ENDS my walk. It's so frustrating to walk 1.62 miles and the app only records .7 or .8. On a regular basis... It is no longer reliable AT ALL...

Have loved the app for years ! The GPS was spot on within feet of my walk. Got a forced new version several days ago - the GPS now has us zooming straight-line many miles away, then zig-zaging over houses, going to all sorts of places I am nowhere near. My .88 mile walk to the park across the street on the old version now says I go from 2.79 miles to over 12 miles on the same path. It thinks I am exceeding 30mph. They better fix it quick. The data WFAD now provides is worthless.

I appreciate that it makes donations to rescues. It is handy and the maps are good. I believe the distance tracker to be accurate. I liked it better when it was "Walk for a Dog." Before it was updated, it would automatically shut down if your device stopped moving for a period of time. It does not do that anymore, so if you forget to turn it off, it just keeps running. Also, I cannot find anyway to delete a walk. It also used to allow this. I emailed the site and asked but no one ever replied.

The app has a number of problems as it will freeze and only track a portion of the walk. The worst part now is I cannot get the app to allow me to even begin a walk after selecting my pet. Everything else seems to work - community, dashboard, challenge and history. But if you can't start a walk those other functions are useless. This has been a problem for the past two days and I have reloaded the app, but it won't work.

I use this app whenever I am walking, running, biking or hiking. I love being able to do some good while spending time with my pup! There are a few improvements that I think would enhance it and make it much better. 1. Cannot use the Notification that shows the app is being used for anything 2. Cannot use the camera without the session ending 3. Would love to know how much my chosen shelter/rescue has received, either historically or real-time 4. More detail when a session is shared via facebook, i.e. length/time of session, map and/or include photos, if we could take them during a session. (last year it used to include the mileage at least, now not even that is shared) That's all I can think of right now. I don't mind the ads as then I don't have to pay but also I don't like to have to sit thru too many in order to share a session or whatever. :)

Ok, the update was a bit of a shock but just because I wasn't expecting it. I opened it one morning and had to log in again. The pup was dancing around and I had to reset my password. :) When we got back I had to reset all my critter's (7 of them) pictures. There I noticed that there isn't any way to sort the individual critter's activity. The older history it totally unsorted.

I used the app for years, loved it. The new forced update, however, is terrible. It does not track walks and shows routes not taken. I uninstalled then tried to download it again but am stuck on email verification. The email never comes, and yes, I've checked junk mail and all other mailboxes, tried 3 times. Also, from what I could see, the new app seems to make sharing more difficult. I didn't see a way to lost directly to FB as I always had. Any guidance would be much appreciated!

Update: reinstalled years later, now I can't even log in. So much for that =/ I don't have any problems using this app. The only hangup is you NEED to turn your GPS tracker on before you open the app, or it will not find your location. I turn it on when I'm getting my dogs' leashes then open the app after I have them ready to go. Route seems pretty accurate (I wander in the wilderness so hard to say precisely), app is easy to use, the ads aren't obnoxious, and overall I like the concept.

Unreliable! It saddens me to think that people think they're helping a charity by using this app, since the app doesn't actually do the job it advertises. Mine constantly stops in the middle of a walk - just abruptly ends! No clue, no notification, no reason given. I discover this after I get home; I've walked the same 2 mile route for ages, but I've been credited for .12 of a mile. It's buggy, it's unreliable, except for the ads, which are always popping up. Too bad.

Used to work pretty good now glitches all the time, I turn the screen off on my phone and it stops tracking. I leave my screen on and it is still super inaccurate. I cant upload walks I do offline without turning on my location and it wont let me say "no thanks", it keeps popping up the location reminder. It pauses itself all the time. I should be able to turn it on and walk. I've checked all my phone settings and nothing is changed. Too many frustrations when it used to be pretty simple

I loved the idea of walk for a dog, and got my dogs shelter to sign up. However, I stopped using it a couple years ago because I had too many walking apps going at the same time. I just redownloaded it, and its suddenly really inaccurate, says my End point is randomly halfway through my route (it is not set to stop until its idle for 20 mins), doesnt give me credit for the whole walk unless I'm watching it the whole time. It's just too buggy, and I'm uninstalling again. Oh. And now there are a million ads! Great in theory, disappointing in practice.

It will sometimes work. But it usually randomly pauses my walk. You can't listen to music with it tracking your way like it says. I use Spotify and it always stops as soon as I got start out continue walk. I have yet to actually get a full walk in without it not working. If that were to get fixed, then I think this app would be a great app. But for now it drives me nuts. And yes I have the most recent update.

I used to love using this app for walking clients' dog while house-sitting. I let them pick the charity they want their dog to raise money for. It's a great little perk. But lately, the GPS cuts out, and doesn't reconnect until I turn my screen on again. Instead of following the road where I've walked, it jumps from the last known location, straight through buildings, to connect to my new location. As a result, my distance traveled is inaccurate, and significantly shortened.

Then using this app successfully for several years and really enjoy being able to log my mileage and benefit from one of my favorite rescues. With them the last 2 weeks I also have started having a problem with my distance not being accurately recorded or my walk being terminated before it's actually over. Extremely frustrating!!!! Tried reinstalling and we'll see how it goes tomorrow. Based on others experience I am not optimistic

Used to LOVE this app. Wish we could get the old version back. Never had any issues until now. I know it's free and charity but for all the ads they make you sit through, I would hope it worked better. Can't really get my donations for my rescue if it doesn't track accurately, or even work consistently. Update: Have the latest update installed, and power saver/battery saver off. It is not the phone, it is the app. It says GPS accuracy is "excellent" yet somehow still doesn't track correctly.

Frustrated that there's no 'sign in' option to bring over history from my old phone when I got a new one and no in app way to provide feedback or contact anyone. I have a phone with a built-in pedometer, it would be awesome if there was a feature/setting that tied the app to that to reflect all my walking and not just when I'm accessible to GPS signal. I walk a LOT sometimes as a security guard but like today, some of that happens in underground spaces.

I love that the app supports rescues. Unfortunately it often doesn't work and loses connection, therefore, my walk isn't recorded properly. We just went for a walk in the subdivision that I know is 1.1 miles. It lost connection, told me I couldn't go over 30mph (not even possible with my knees) and recorded it as only .41 miles. It does this daily.

I used to really like this app, but now, not so much. Doesn't properly track the number of walks taken and the miles walked and in turn, the "level" and "points" earned don't increase. It's stated on their website that the organization you're walking for receive donations based on the number of active walkers there are for that organization. Well, if the app isn't properly logging walks consistently, I'm weary that it would be able to track "active walkers" consistently. Only started to have these tracking issues after they added different features like the "Challenge" tab; "Community" tab; level/points system. Don't really care for all the bells & whistles if it's gonna make the app go haywire. Asked for them to address these issues via e-mail, but got no response.

I love the idea behind this app: earning money for a charity by walking my dog. That said, be aware that the distance tracking is not accurate. I just walked .7 miles according to Google Maps and my fitness tracker, but the Woof Trax app recorded the walk as .48 miles. What's more is that the math on the app, 2.15 mph x 20 minutes, adds up to .7 miles, not the recorded .48 miles.

Seems to work fine. I have been walking with other Apps and the pooch always came along. The miles recorded by the other Apps and this one are within tenths so no issues. I have not walked a known distance to check it against but I feel for the purpose it suits it is fine. I like the tracking feature with the trace line. I don't understand where the points go or when or how many. I uploaded when it said there were eligible points but only once.

EDIT: My phone placed the app in "DEEP SLEEP", so despite being able to use the app, its permissions were limited. I had to access Google Play, select/manage this app, and then "ENABLE" the app. Everything is now working as intended. ORIGINAL REVIEW: I'm running on the latest version of Android and the app has ceased being able to maintain a GPS signal once the phone is idling and/or the screen is off. I've read other reviewers' comments, and some echo the same problem.

^Update 18July21^ Still pausing &/or disconnecting during walks. Today's walk of 1+ mile recorded as 0 miles & 25 minutes. There doesn't seem to be a way to delete these bogus walks. **Update 23May2020 Still think this app is a good idea, but it keeps pausing during walks. Lost about 1/3 of a 3 mile walk today. ** Great idea to raise money for shelters. Works pretty well most of the time, but I have to check it a few times during a walk as it sometimes pauses or stops recording.

Update had worked well for me. A couple times it hasn't tracked, which isn't a huge deal (stop the walk, restart, and walk a tenth a mile more). Accuracy is pretty good (I run this concurrently with MapMyRun, and results are similar). I do wish my prior walks would play into my level (appears Android users got the shaft. I have 1400+ lifetime walks and am only level 10).

This app was decent for a few years. Now it is virtually useless. It records a very small fraction of my walk, although it indicates that the GPS signal is good to excellent. The problem is not my phone because othr apps that track my walk are consistently accurate. UPDATE: Disabling the phone's power saver feature seems to have solved the issue.

It's a great app!!! I love that I can support my Rescue. However, as of June 2, 2020 it does not register my average mph. It has my miles and distance but not my speed. I cannot figure it out. It tracks it while I am walking but when I'm finished it says 0.00 mph. Can someone figure this out and get it corrected. Thank you.

Great idea, but it randomly will stop for no apparent reason. Super frustrating to walk a mile or two and not get credit for it because the app decided to pause part way through. I know to hit "resume" after using the camera mid walk, but sometimes it will stop even if I don't use any other apps during a walk. Please look into this. Thanks.

I love the idea of walking for rescues but this is obviously another app originated on Apple transported to Android and sucks. I have yet to have it continue to track my walk more than 3 minutes in. As soon as the screensaver kicks in and the phone locks, it seems to end the walk. And yes, I've allowed it to run in the background on Android but it still dies.

It was better before the update. It updated recently and now it doesn't track the time on my walks. It says I walked a mile in 12 minutes when I had been walking for 30 minutes. I use this app to track the time for walking dogs. I walk them for 30 minutes. If the app isn't going to tell me the correct time - it keeps pausing itself - then it's useless.

The app no longer tracks mileage ad we walk. I've reloaded the app several times and I've made sure everything that needs to be turned on is on. It is an intermittent problem. Half the time it captures distance (no longer accurately) and half the time it captures no distance but does capture time spent walking. I can't find any contact info for Wooftrax so no way to report this issue.

Does not record any distance....useless. This app used to work and felt great to use it by helping a local shelter. Now....and since late September 2021 it will not connect to GPS and won't record any activity at all. I have uninstalled, reinstalled, recalibrated GPS....nothing will work. It's just taking up space on my mobile device

I walk my pup every day, I like that my favorite charity can benefit. Since they've updated the app I've noticed the stats are sometimes off. I walk ~3 miles in ~1 hour so my mph should be close to 3mph. Recently walked 3.39 miles in 1hr 3min and it showed my Avg speed as 2.78 mph, which isn't correct. As long as the miles register for the charity OK, but stats are not calculating correctly.

I like the new format . . . and now I see points and much more clear information than the old version gave. I like seeing my route and my speed. Wonderful! I do wish there was more clear info about how our daily walks benefit our selected rescue group . . . Also, new version is easier to use for pausing and resuming, which is great.

I've been using this app for years. I have loved it up until now. As many have said, the new update is horrible. It stops my walk after only seconds. I have noticed it won't run at the same time as my Amazon Music app. One stops the other and vice versa. Not a fan! I like to listen to music while walking. Frustrating! Please fix.

Isn't tracking my mileage. It will turn on but either the screen stays blank in WALK mode or it'll show the map but won't record any of my progress. It's very irritating as I walked over 3 miles today and I didn't get any credit for it. I hope they fix this problem. I have walked over 350 miles since last October and really Love this App.....Please Fix this... Please!!

Update 3/2020. HORRIBLE! Every few months for the last 4 years I've tried this app and it's STILL horrible. Turns off automatically , doesn't record anything, don't waste your time they haven't fixed a thing in over 5 years. I've given this app a chance on and off for over years and it stops working in the middle of a walk EVERY TIME. . I'M STARTING TO BELIEVE ALL THIS COMPANY CARES ABOUT ARE THE ANNOYING ADS. FUNNY HOW THE ADS NEVER STOP WORKING THOUGH.

Used this app for years on my old phone without any issues. Recently re-downloaded it after getting a new phone and it no longer works properly. Went for a 3 mile walk and it didn't track any of it despite my location being turned on and all settings correct (to my knowledge). Uninstalling until it gets fixed. It's a shame that this is happening now when so many people are out walking their dogs/taking walks to get a break from quarantine. Could be raising a lot of much needed money for shelters

Every time I stop for whatever reason the tracking stops. I have app running in background and every time I check on it it ask to resume. Update Thanks for response. Fist my use while in background got turned off by updates. 2nd phone have an program that puts app to sleep. Had to change usage to unlimited. Now seams to work now.

Update! This app has gotten worse since this last review. Now I can no longer finish it. You can only pause it! I am not going to keep logging on and off it every time I go to use it. Walks will not show up in history! This new update is horrible! It keeps stopping, and I never know until I get home! I've been using this app for years but this new app is hard to read, font too small. I'm going to uninstall & reinstall. If it still is messing up, I'll find another app 🐾😳

Terrible app update. Walked almost two miles today before I realized it wasn't recording my actual route. Just where I left from and the location I checked my phone. I had location services on. Also, why do I have to walk three times a day to get 30 points? We walk three miles in one walk. That should be sufficient.

I've used and loved this app for many years, but for the last several months this app has been wildly inaccurate reporting mileage. I will walk or run 2 miles only have it report 0.1 miles. Considering money is given based on your mileage I'm frustrated that the accuracy has diminished so significantly. I've reached out to support with no response.

Question more than a review: can you make it so that I can open app and view history without turning location on? Thank you. Hello! I have tried to find the setting you recommended however I only have four options in the app manager: allow all the time, allow only while using the app, ask every time, and don't allow. On the app settings I have four options: edit profile, change email, change password, and delete account. I appreciate any additional assistance you can provide. Thank you, 😊

Awesome awesome app and idea! Few quirks: it stops mid walk and has to be restarted. The yellow track line marking your distance blends in with the map, so not really noticeable, especially when doing in in and out trail and the line overlaps. Also, it should be 10 pts for each 1/4 mi even if in one recording. It's a hassle to time and restart the walk each time to earn more points.

4/1/23 took a break from using the app ( my dogs don't do the snow). I used it for the 1st time this yr. I clicked on start walk. By all accounts we should have walked almost 2 miles. But once we were done, it didn't track. It appears this app isn't as simple as it once was. I will try it a few more times and then decide if it's worth the aggravation.

Love the idea of this app and I used to love using it, but whatever update happened last week with android has completely broken it. We can go for 3 miles walk and it records 0 or 1 or maybe 3. The map is incredibly flaky now- doesn't track where you are actually walking; could be just a straight line from home to furthest point then back again. That coupled with the lack of feedback (what is my charity actually getting from my efforts?) has led me to finally uninstall.

Stopped giving me the points for my walks. They just wouldn't upload anymore. Reached out for help, but they couldn't fix it, but keep encouraging me to use the app? No thanks. Although I do like the idea of the app, maybe set goal markers or send updates as to how much has been given to the persons charity so they know they're not wasting their time. Also, fix the app first. Seems like a lot of people are leaving the app because it doesn't work correctly.

The old app liked to crash, the new app really likes to crash, I've lost 2 workouts in 2 days. I like the concept of levelling up in my pack if it ever logs a workout again at all. The ads hide a lot of the screen information and sometimes the screen content is too big for my literal screen - I wonder what's over there that I can see part of but not all of, certainly can't click on it... Keep working on the app and release a stable, usable version for Android!

I've used this app for several months and enjoyed it, but now it's requiring access to my location at all times instead of just during app use. I've stopped using the app as there should be no reason it needs to track me, other than during walks. If they update the app so that it returns to how it was, I'll use it again. Edit: The issue has been fixed, so I'll resume app use

Since upgrade nothing but problems. Is frustrating . You want to do something good and end up beeing upset fighting with the app. Cannot get GPS location. Its not the phone because every other app with location works, since 12.27.16 app do not open anymore. Such a good idea, nut frustrating App 10.15.21 here we go again. No tracking of miles

It has not recorded one walk accurately in the past two weeks. It randomly stops recording; walking two dogs, I can't hold the phone in my hand to make sure it's working. Very disappointing. Edited to add: The developers of the app very promptly replied to my review, which was greatly appreciated. Suggestion to change some settings were given, and this resulted in a much more accurate tracking of our walk tonight. Much happier with this result - thank you! 😊

I want to love it and for a long time I did. We have about 700 miles. But the last yr or so the app has given me nothing but trouble. It stops recording our walk every time I try to take a pic or anything on my phone. I need to be vigilant to keep checking it and restarting it. And now it also stop randomly even if I keep that screen open only. I've lost full walks, half's and parts of walks. I can't babysit my phone every few mins. Yes I have uninstalled and reinstalled. Doesn't work.

EDIT: I previously left one star and an angry rant when I lost over half my mileage during the app upgrade. The WoofTrax team went back and made sure my miles were restored. They also took out some of the extra features, like the countdown, that I thought were annoying. The app is more simple and for me personally more enjoyable to use now. Thank you!

Update 4-8-21. Latest update fixed location permission issue. Thank you! App now requires full-time location permission, instead of "when in use" permission. Developer states that app does not collect location when data when not in use, which is a LIE. I get notified several times a day by Android that the app has accessed my location while it is not in use. I want to support my local rescue organization, but I don't like being spied on.
simple app. you walk anyway, so use it to help you local shelter. wish it read steps from a wearable in case you forget to hit start before going.

App has been a pain since early June. Once I start the Walk, as soon as my screen goes dark it stops working and asks to continue activity. Have noticed that almost every single one of my walks which are usually over an hour long have only logged 6-7 min. I resume activity and will do it again. Thought it was a bug, restarted my phone, I don't have any power saving on and location is always on. Gps also is always tracking but it just goes into pause mode.
I very much like it so far, but I wish there was a way to trim a recording in the event you fail to "Finish" one. An export feature would be welcome as well.
As others have said, app keeps stopping my walks so it looks like we didn't move. Happens all the time now, I'm uninstalling.
My daughter is very invested in making sure all the dogs get adopted, so we do a lot more walks now. This app is easy enough to use.

This app was recently updated, and after a short learning curve I've come to prefer this newer update. You can choose between walking, running, and cycling, the map is accurate and you can share your walks once concluded. It's easy to navigate between walks, history, challenges, etc. and I like the home page offering the summary as well. Normally, I detest upgrades but this one was well done. It didn't take me long at all to navigate it like a pro.

I have used this app for many years and have always enjoyed it until the most recent update. It now shuts off for no reason while I am walking. Another issue I have is that, in the past, I knew it would shut off if I forgot to turn it off, and started to drive. So although now it shuts off for no reason while I am walking, it does not shut off if I forget and start to drive. In addition, my history from the last many years is gone. I am so disappointed with the update!

Terrible! I have been using this app for at least 4 years. Normal on my morning walk and then boom! An absolutely awful update. Doesn't track properly, only counted about half my walk and the map wasn't even close to my path. Where are my stats? Bring back the old version and try again with a new one. And please don't tell me to contact someone at an email address...I am contacting someone here.

Update: still doesn't track correctly. I can't put this in my pocket I have to hold it out and on the whole time… Not really OK in the cold. Have to have your phone screen on, or it times out and doesn't follow your path properly. Breaks the walk into several small ones and lose your points. Very annoying.

Very unhappy and disappointed!! There is absolutely no reason why this app requires access to my location ALL THE TIME! It is no one's business where I am at all times, and I find it totally unacceptable. If the programmer can't make the app work while ONLY having access to my location when I turn it on to walk, then it is time that he finds another line of work! I have now gone to ResQ Walk since they aren't nearly as nosy and controlling. My only regret is that my charity is the lower now.

I have loved this app for a while, but in the last week it stopped recording my distance, only time. My location is on and permission is granted. This is very frustrating! I'll give it another shot, but with no miles recording, no donations will come from those walks.

I loved this app in its previous iteration. This new one doesn't track my walks accurately at all. The walks are short of my actual mileage by .5 to .85 miles per day. I sent an email to let the people know. ZERO response, ZERO Fixes. I only keep using it because it will donate money to the animal rescue of my choice. VERY disappointed in this app and its support staff.

Their summary: "Turn your dog walking routine into a chance to earn support for your local animal shelter or rescue." Very key words: "a chance". I and a few others have had this app installed for months, with hundreds of combined miles of walks, and the selected charity hasn't seen a penny. On the plus side, it actually logs location well and I can turn the screen off and put the phone in my pocket and it still logs. Vendor replying to this review 17 months later (2021-7) is nonsense.

App is great but I do not keep my location on on my phone unless I need it and the app refuses to let me open it and check other items (history, account info, dog info) without turning on my location. Its not necessary unless I am actively walking and I find it intrusive and annoying that I can't do things in the app simply because I refuse to leave my location on. Thanks for your response, but that is not accurate. It keeps popping up regardless what I do and there is no cancel. Drop to 1 star

If it wasn't for the rescue getting something out of it (are they actually?! I have to ask) I would delete this app in a heartbeat. The new layout is not pleasant, less points overall (I walk long, but not 3 times a day), and the app keeps crashing now not actually recoding 1/2-2/3s of my walk. Frustrating.

It's excellent and a wonderful way to record our walks together. Would be 5 stars, except I periodically had a problem with it only partially recording walks. (Happened on 2 different phones, so likely not a phone issue). Also, can only see partial history without paying for their premium service. But otherwise easy to use, NO ANNOYING ADS 👍 and keeps a nice visual record of walks with the ability to make notes about each.

Perfect for my needs! Edit to say that I use the free version..no pushy subscription tactics, no invasive ads & no BS. This app is exactly what I've been looking for..it tracks distance, time & maps the walk. You can indicate when the dog goes potty or takes a break to get a drink. You can save the walk and keep track of your statistics. Everything I wanted in a dog walking app and nothing that I didn't want.. And so far, not one issue. Love this app!

Great app. I love keeping track of duration, route, and distance of all my walks with my dog. My OCD lives for that type of thing. Only wish you could connect with other current Amiko users, opposed to only being able to connect with people you recruit from your own Facebook Friends List, and thats only if you're able to recruit people from your Facebook Friends List. It'd just be so much better if you could connect and share with people already using the app on a consistent and regular basis.

I've used the app in the past and it has worked great. Today I downloaded it and tried it again as ill be more active with my dogs and I need something to record distance with for a dog walk trial I'm doing. What it recorded was just an absolute mangled mess that made no since and absolutely did not follow my GPS even though it was on and on precise location. Very disappointed with that. I will be finding a different tracker.

Was not expecting to keep having a subscription pushed on me. Uninstalling and deleting. And to the owner replying to reviews, put it in the description that you need to subscribe otherwise you will keep getting poor reviews. I can track my horse ride in full detail for free and want to be able to do the same with my dogs. But I have 3, so, not allowed clearly.

This app is great it logs the distance perfectly and doesn't use heaps of battery power. Connection to GPS sattelites is good so no needing to have an internet connection when using it. Only wish is that there was a total distance and time displayed at the top of the walks screen, it is nice to keep track of how far we have walked in total. As an ex Traktiv user I am impressed. I had to stop using Tractiv as the walk only version is no longer supported and the GPS is no longer accurate. AA++

**edit: It was me. I was the problem. I was leaving the power saver setting on. I started turning it off while using the app, and the tracking worked properly.** GPS stops working right if you ever put your phone in your pocket. I'd prefer not have to hold my phone through my dog's entire walk.
Really love this app! I've used it for years to keep track of my dog's walks & how many did places we've been walking/hiking!!
I use this app almost daily only complaint is that some features should be free like the statistics

Must have for walkies. It's difficult to "add friends"- but otherwise it does EVERYTHING you'd need. Great GPS. Great tracking. Summary of how much and how long under dog's profile. Can take pictures while walking that show up with the walk. Just fun. And useful.

I reached out to the developer, and the issue of the app being stuck on the Finding Your Location screen issue was fixed in less than 12 hrs!!! What outstanding customer service. App works perfectly now! I have never had any success reaching out to app developers, so I was surprised when I heard back so quickly. Thank you so much for everything. Because of this, I will be upgrading to the paid version - it's 100% worth it!

*edit to add: I have changed from a 5 star review to a 2 star review after seeing they removed some options. now you have to pay to see things we were able to see before. will be looking for a different app to use unfortunately* love it so far! I can track my dogs walks and share with my family. we track bathroom breaks, miles, and paws :) 👍🏼only thing I wish it did was make certain dogs public/private or allow only certain people to see stats for certain dogs.

Doesn't work as well now for some reason , If I stop to take photos then get home and check out the route & photos they're not saved anywhere , not in the app or on my phone itself 🤷‍♀️, I've tried un installing etc & no success - used to love this app was perfect first time round 😔 seems like its changed somehow 🤔

This app is absolutely brilliant, the free version is a welcome addition to apps it gives you what you need in a very professional way. we will be upgrading but only so we can add more photos. if I could ask the developers for one thing it would be to enable the app to be used as white label.
Need to pay for premium in order to record more than one walk.

excellent dog walking and tracking app! it allows me to add various dogs and track pees and poops on walks and our walking map. I know subscription models are popular but I really wish they were the way to buy the app outright.

Only had this app a week and have recorded a few walks. it seems very accurate on the GPS and so much fun to look back on, to see times and distances. We have a 4 month old puppy and I think this is going to be a great tool.

Best dog walker app I've used .easy to use and it's worth the premium if you walk multiple dogs. I use the premium app when I remember to pay for it. But the free app is just as awesome. The only downfall is it doesn't allow you to add mixed breed instead of Is an actual breed name for a dog.
I'm a professional dog walker and have tried a lot of different apps. This is the most accurate dog walking tracker I've ever used and has an easy interface. Simple is always better.

Thank you for adding the Australian Cattle Dog. We've been on several 3-4 mile walks and I keep forgetting to actually go in and turn the app on. My other apps start automatically, so I'm going to stay with those. Thank again!
62 mile walk for cancer research uk, tracks where we walk, how long and how far, can change from km to miles and vice versa, will definatly still be using it when the challenge as finished!

Requires a phone number and a login. Why would I want to store my location data on your cloud? What are you doing with that data? That's not how to spell "lose" and I don't believe you about your data handling. Suspicious.
Limited use. It needs the ability to share the route during the walk and not just after it's complete
A great app for monitoring the distance and time of the walks we take. works everything.
Great app. Works really well to track dogs walks within the family. Once linked to other family members you can see all family members walks from your app.

I like this app.. the only problem I have is that I sent my walk link to my client and it asks them to download the app just to see my walk...I wish the link would show the walk without asking them to download app
Not tracking my distance as well as it used to. I get watching ads hopefully this doesn't become a app you have to pay for
Tried to log in with my mobile, tried many times to get it to send me a verification code through text and received nothing. Uninstalled.
Good little app but the colour of the route needs to change so that you can see it more clearly on the different map types

App author decided to move a previously free feature, dog walk statistics [which were extremely basic, MS excel level for walks/miles per month], behind a paywall. If you want app users to subscribe you need to ADD features, not remove them. Absolute garbage. As of November 4th,previously free feature still behind a pay wall. App dev even decided to complain about receiving backlash over moving a basic feature behind a pay wall. Garbage.
Always been very useful & easy to use! I've used for a long time now & never had any issues!!
So far so good. Easy to use and fun to share. Adding photos, drink and poo stops are fun. 🤗
Very good app. Even the basic functionalities are enough to register every walking 🐕.
Simple and awesome. Love the co-owner feature for sharig walk record.
Love this app! Issues are rare but fixed quickly if they happen
The ap is useful, although sometimes the route is rather obscure!
Unaccurate and clipping walks doesn't change the total miles only that one walk
Incapable of tracking a walk without crashing.
It would be nice to be able to add walks manually if you forget to turn it on.
love! I'm a dog walker and it works great to send updates to my clients.
great app! easy to use
What are the "paws " and how are they earned?other than that making me crazy (because I dont know lol) love the app use it every walk,
Worked for 3 walks then stopped tracking - useless
Its a really good app. I use it for my business and my clients love it.
Loved this app at first but now I have nothing but problems emailed to get this right to no answer still waiting
It's fun! Especially with friends.
Good app to track your dog's walk and your own walk
Would be great if you can have multiple people added to the one walk
A user friendly lovely little useful app

Was excited to try this as a former WoofTrax user (it sucks after the last update). Was disappointed to learn that Amiko only allows you to add two dogs to your profile unless you're willing to pay a monthly fee 😒
Very poor tracking of walks.
Why can't all walks be removed? The start over option is missing. The dog thinks more treats will make it all ok?
really good, easy to use
Great app easy to use.
Problem solved itself. Great app.
I use it to record dog walks. 👍
A good app not 100% reliable
works well as described.
latest update will lead me to delete this app
Is it work if is work truly I will give you 5 stars
so easy to use 🐕🐾🐾 Thank You 👍🏼😘🐶

playStoreReviews.text: I originally got this app to help me keep track of my things as I was packing and moving, but now I'm completely obsessed with this app as a way to finally keep track of where in my house the things I have are. It's the most flexible inventory system you could use. It's for a large warehouse, a small business, or your own personal collection, with tons of customizability in terms of what can be saved. I'm looking forward to seeing how this app continues to develop and grow!

Loving this app! I used it for garage inventory so I wouldn't have to trudge out there and open 12 boxes or cabinets every time I need a tool or stored item, but using it rn to move is a game changer!! Knowing what's in each box will make unpacking 1000% easier. When movers pack, you pretty much have to unpack every single thing immediately to find any specific item. The ability to share an updated list would have eliminates the need for me to open it 15 times to answer his questions.

update. develope responded and let me know you can take 3 photos. works really well and it has all the necessary fields to track your home inventory. you create containers and then add items to the container so you can have a container like a living room also a container that's a closet the only thing it needs is a way to have more than one photo for a item. it sure would be great if they would add that feature then I would be five stars.

Great Product!! Efficient, easy to use, intuitive interface! UPDATE!!!! Have been using this app for about 3 or 4 weeks. It does a lot for a free program! i have yet to need any of the additional pay features due to its free configuration, but i just went online and bought the entire package!! Anyone who puts out a great program with this many free features included, they are getting my support!! Because I am sure I will use the additional features tracking and updating my gun collection.

Moved to my first place and excited to record all my items into this, both to find the item and for insurance purposes. (Hurricane state!) Easy enough to follow, and I enjoy having the ability to add descriptions, quantity, price, and tags to items. The only thing I'd love to see added is a seprate field to add a links to the item, in case I need to order more of said item or possible insurance claims. But honestly the long description field works just as fine. Otherwise, highly reccomended!

Looks amazing. The only thing I see missing is the ability to add other users. I plan to use this for insurance and I would like my husband to be able to add items as we go through rooms separately. It would be nice if there is an alert if we seem to have added the same thing twice that lets you know and ask if you would rather like to increase the inventory amount instead

So far this is the best organizational inventory app I have tried. I would like to be able to crop and rotate images through the app as I take pics for items instead of having to do it separately then select them from gallery, but that's a minor thing and otherwise everything else is perfect. So glad to be able to sort items in bins, for some reason the other app I was using couldn't do that.

I really like that this app is easy to use to take and label pictures. Unfortunately, it seems to limit how many items can be placed in a container. I can successfully share the list but so far have not had luck with the images going with it. The zip file looks like it is being created, then doesn't export to an email or even a backup. I will continue trying as it could be operator error, as I could still be missing a setting. Besides the fact that I would hate to lose two days of work put in.

I have been using this app all of 5 minutes but it is by far the best home inventory system/app I have been able to find that fits my needs. It's not clunky or overdone. everything I looked at was either way over complicated or so barebones it was worthless. I have spent hours upon hours googling, reading, and looking for a system to inventory my home items while I declutter and reorganize. I want to know what I kept in it's place and what I put in storage and where. Good job guys!!!

Possibly the best app for home inventories and has huge potential. A couple things I like: - Paid tiers are not a subscription model! This is huge to me, being someone who is cutting down on them. You get what you pay for. Great decision. - Dev is engaged with user community. - Intuitive, easy to use, and is packed full of useful features (and no bloat) - No data sharing with third parties. - No third-party ads. In-app purchases are not in your face.

Absolutely the best ap for people who hate organizing. (Like me) It's intuitive, easy to use, can make any entry a container and searching searches everywhere. I only wish I could get it on my other devices and that the list updated across all of them. However I do appreciate the security that also gives me! Love this ap, can't recommend it enough.

Awesome App. I just started using it and Iove it (already have over 100 items entered and haven't even started on my garage and outbuilding, according to the developer the only limitations to the number of items is storage space). With the horrible California fires it highlights the need for a detailed inventory of your belongings. I sent the developer a few emails and I was amazed at how quickly and detailed his responses were.

Exactly what I needed! I wanted a way to keep track of my yarn, and this offered the perfect solution, including letting me sort items into containers and sub-containers. Also, you can customize what describers you want for the items, so nothing is bogged down by categories you never fill out. I found the app to be very user-friendly.

Intuitive app, free for most purposes, engaged developer. Great for ADHD: enough to achieve goal of being able to find stuff, but w/o leaning too far into my hyperfocusing tendencies. Love the use of tags, the ability to have unlimited "containers" within other containers (e.g., room, cabinet, shelf) & pay model that allows you to pick what you need a la carte. The one thing that would make it better would be rec bar codes, but that would cost $$ (& competing apps that have do it poorly) TY!

Super easy to use. love the Google drive functionality. however a + and - for quantities of an item right on the item itself would be in my opinion be much more streamlined. otherwise super great app!! gonna use this forever! as a side note. I would LOVE some sort of collaborative function so my wife can also use the app

At this current time I can only to 4 stars, yes the program works without issue. But I would really like to see the quantity, receipt photo, and price feature added because I am making this for insurance purposes and I don't want 2 apps for the same thing. But other than that it's pretty flawless.

Absolutely lovely app! Very lightweight and exactly what I need. Allows unlimited categories and items. Only thing I would add is a way to add receipts for insurance (I got around this by making a category of receipts , but it'll be a little challenging to grab the amount if I need to).

omg. this is the app i didn't know i needed in my life. halloween costumes, parts and pieces all findable at a moments notice! love it. If you have lots of different things in different boxes in different rooms even, you can tag items to be able find like things. e.g. if i tag everything that 'looks' 70s, i can search on that tag to get " bell bottoms in box 1 in attic"; "platform shoes in blue box in closet"...etc. love it!

I'm using this app to organize, categorize and store my items. It's my favorite app for this purpose so far. Absolutely loving it and highly recommended. Also it's free. My only request is to have an option to add multiple items at once, it will be helpful when taking photos and adding items simultaneously.

love it! I tend to be messy, but im trying to give everything I own a "home". this is a very straightforward and easy to use app. I wish there was a way to share inventories with other users, so that we can keep a central inventory.

Using as a catalogue for SKU's for a tiny handmade business. I use the quantity for sales instead of inventory amounts so I can visually track which designs are most popular. Search and ordering functions are perfect and the app is simple to use with good export and backup functions, though would be great if the pdf export exported images too.

this is exactly what I've been looking for I have been using this app to try and organize my hundred of toads of two then equipment as soon as I started playing with it I decided to buy the whole everything just to support the developer and then I saw he was working on making it multi user or shareable which is exactly what I was getting to try and ask him to do so once we get that it will be the absolute perfect app for me easy and now if I'm looking for something I'm looking in app

amazing app for organizing my home. the only thing I feel missing is open date (to mark the date when I opened something), customizing the shown date format, ability to enter quantity with at least one decimal point and adding quantity unit ( like Kg, piece etc)
Perfect app for my needs. I can now quickly find an item without having to remember where it is stored.
Really nice, clean interface, really nice export, really good price. The dev is responsive to feature suggestions! Enjoying this app a lot at the moment.

So far so good. Nice and simple for home use. Avoids overwhelming features but has all the right features built in. Need a pro version/paid version with family sharing feature so that any member of family has access to the common inventory data. Basically a single data store with different apps connected to the same data store.

This app is very easy to use once I figured out what I was supposed to do. I love that I can add pictures and barcodes. I definitely recommend this to organize boxes of pictures and scrapbooks. I also have cutting dies that I'm going to track. Great app!
Thanks alot for this great app. Ist there a possibility to share and work with the same database within the family?

This is a great app, it works really well and helps me keep track of everything in my house. I've tried other apps but they didn't really work well lol, this one is way better than any other I've found

I like it. It's intuitive, and the paid features are also great (worth it IMO). Especially the nested/custom tags! My only complaint is, that there isn't a dedicated "weight" field for item details. I might abuse the "currency" field, for the time being, lol

I have downloaded and used many inventory apps. This one is exactly what I needed. ticks every box. as a tradie I can keep track of my stick and tools, even when I loan something out. purchased the app 5 minutes in!

I have a few issues that make daily use quite frustrating, especially when managing inventory: Bulk filtering and selection Is there any way to quickly filter and select multiple items? When I’m organizing boxes or checking inventory, I usually take one item in my hand and want to filter the entire inventory to find that exact item, add it to a selection, then search for the next item, and so on until the whole box is selected. After that, I want to move everything to another container at once.

As someone who has tested hundreds upon hundreds of apps, including home inventory ones, i highly recommend this. It has a lot of relevant and nice features (pls dont remove any) like infinite nesting of containers and view options. I just wish they had a widget that you can add to your homescreen to make searching for items quick and easy. Also, i wish you can change the view depending on the folder so for rooms i could make it grid and inside room containers into tree, for instance.

I’m super impressed with this app. Support replied within hours on a Sunday and were excellent. The interface is easy to navigate and highly customisable. I’ve created shelves, containers, and used barcodes and NFC tags with ease. Updating quantities, doing stock takes, adding photos of items and containers, exporting lists (with pictures) and backing up to Google Drive all work flawlessly. I bought the full version and it’s absolutely worth it. I am genuinely excited about this app!
Great app so far! What is the likelihood of this being available for IOS in the near future? I would really like to share this with my partner who has an iPhone! Thanks!

they don't make you sign in for some stupid data farming reason which almost gives 5 stars just for that, but this app just works perfectly for at home storage, quick and easy to use, don't have to input multiple lines of data for single items, you can inventory a whole box pretty quickly and add photos to either the whole container or individual items. good work!!!
almost perfect but, the app should be online and allow you to invite other members of your family, I know you can export but that's not the most convenient option.

This is almost exactly what I need, great management system and I like the Barcode feature. All offline with the possibility to export to PDF and spreadsheet. Adding price to an item is planned. Here's my little wishlist: - better sectioned spreadsheets/PDFs (just having container location doesn't seem like the best solution) - the ability to set low limit for an item, and with the push of a button be able to show a list of low quantity items - clicking an item shows me details

Almost Perfect - Wish I could sync the data with my wife so that we can both use the app, contribute and find things. It would also be great to be able to find an item by barcode. I.e. run the scanner across multiple barcodes until it finds rhe correct item. If this is an option I'd love to know where. Happy to pay for the feature.
Literally the best app ever to be invented! I now have an easy way to know where everything I own is without having to dig through stuff!
Absolutely lovely app ! My sorting, collecting and inventory related traits are very happy 😌 May this app's future be bright as a sun and hopefully it will never die 🙏🏻 keep up the epic good work 💚
Phenomenal app, highly recommend whether you are using it for business, financial goals, or even just personal organization (like me) it is really versatile, user friendly and a great resource.
I had trouble understanding the app until the developer reached out with detailed instructions. I now am on my way to recording all of my craft stash. Thank you for your quick response.

Really awesome app, very simple and intuitive. Makes inventory creation and easy task. This app needs to be built and scaled cross platform by helping the developer and its development for more robust and useful features to come faster with subsequent updates. update: Thank you Miquel! For your kind hearted and generous support. Your efforts are really impact creating and very much appreciated. Keep it up brother!☺️☺️
After a long time at last I found this great, useful, powerful and easy to use inventory app. Keep the good work. Thank you so much! I love it.

Brilliant! I love everything about this app! Containers, containers IN containers, not having a million extra fields I don't need... I've had a few apps over the years and I'm SO happy I've found the perfect one for me! And after reading some of the reviews, I'm going to also add my food with expiration dates 😁😁

I love this app. I've been using it to inventory what food we have in various cupboards, tagged with expiry dates. But now have put all the stuff in we take on holiday as a packing list. Looking forward to sorting out all the DIY stuff in the garage so I no longer have to rummage around to see what we have. Just brilliant.

Hi. Great app and thanks for writing it. Very useful for keeping track of my items. It would be a great feature if you could consider making a report or view that shows and sums the value for selected items, either by tag or container or just what is visible. Also, some items have multiple warranty periods (e.g. batteries often have shorter warranty periods than the item itself). Maybe you could add additional warranty fields? Keep up the good work and thanks again

It's amazing! As long as they don't make a restriction of items I'm completely fine with it. Definitely the best out there. Lots of different slots for different things, can have a storage space in a storage space in a storage space, basically unlimited. definitely worth having a very high average rating

The app is too good and I'm using it to manage my Tinkle and other book collections... It'll be better if the app has an import via excel feature, as manually creating tags and records is seriously tiring with some use cases... Hope you'd include it soon✨
Bring completely free is amazing and great layout, UI, UX! Great work with this app!

Excellent user interface. Export function appears to only allow text to be exported to a PDF file. However, it would be extremely useful if any images associated with each item could be exported so that the name of the item and its associated image(s) appear next to each other. Or am I missing a setting that can make this happen?
I really like the app now I know what a have inside bins without having to look into every single one.
looks to be just what I need (pre starting to use. lots of setting availability. touch wood its what I need!

Love the app. SUGGESTION: any way to share the data with your family? it would be great to have a feature to sync the data with family members so that everyone can find items in the house and if anyone moves an item they can update in their app and everyone will know the updated location.

This app is awesome, so simple to navigate and use. had been looking for something like this and tried loads of apps but this practically does everything I need. few things would make this even more amazing for me, 1. ability to have a custom field I would like to add a sizes of my items in a separate field. 2. to have ability for multiple users to add stuff. 3. Apple support. keep up the amazing work 👏

I had to inventory a deceased relatives home and tried a few apps. This app works great and saved me a lot of time. I had some challenges reorganizing the items later. I reached out to Miguel and he responded within 24 hours. He also provided a short video which helped me resolve the issue.

Hi, this application is very nice I have some suggestions - 1-please provide lock facility ,2-if possible please provide settings to enable or disable app fields for each database as it's requirements, for example if we create medicine database so we may don't need maintenance but if me make viechle database so we need maintenance, so point is this that we may adjust setting (disabled or enable) to different databases as per users needs, 3. For gain users reduced one time price for sometime 😉.

This House Inventory App is ok! If only they could highlight all the stuff like video games and some electronic toys that are located in my place so it can make this app so much easier for me because it was quite hard and didn't even help me find some stuff I put similar to the photo! 3 Stars and needs some room for improvement

Exactly what I needed to sort all the junk I had collected from Aliexpress, Daraz and in person shopping over the years and to stock it away. I have purposefully taken one star down because I would have loved to make a one time payment and make the app "mine" :). I did "pay for coffee" because it would have made me feel guilty had I been a freeloader, but what if it goes to paid mode in a few months or years?

I may be expecting too much from this app, so it is not working for me. It does not save the information you put for the items, nor is the information visible in any way unless you edit each one. I am trying to catalog some things and was hoping this would work, but it does not. if you are looking for a simple picture only quick reference, this would work. I was trying to include more information under the items than this app is capable of displaying.

This is a very impressive app to track items; especially when it comes to looking up items using barcodes. A lot of effort has been spent on allowing the experience to be customised by giving the user control over what fields are shown in the different views. The overall quality clearly shows that this is a passion project through and through. No ads, no registration, no paywalls and no intrusive button asking you to upgrade. Respect. This is an app that I would warmly recommend to a friend.

Good updates. Happy to see the improvements I like it. Simple very simple with very little features but very useful. This is very much enough for home inventory. Remember it is free at all. However, no backup facility as such. Only can export as text file. That is a big problem. When you change the phone you have no other option but to start afresh

Great app for home inventory. It appears to allow multiple levels of containers, which is great. One question- it allows you to take photos, but I don't see any place to view those pictures. Is the photo functionality working? Thank you for this wonderful free app. Update -the photo functionality is working perfectly. You have to click the photo button twice. Once to take the picture and once to insert it into the app. I reaffirm my 5 star rating.

Very good app. Since it uses a photo of the stuff we're cataloging, it could automatically reduce the size of the pictures in order to decrease the size of the cloud backup. Also, when exporting to excel, it could have an option to include pictures. I'm enjoying it very much.

Very nice little app. Just started using it, but so far I find it easy to navigate and has done everything I've needed from an inventory app. Only reason I gave it 4 stars and not 5 is that I think the exported PDF reports need to be a little cleaner and more robust.

I don't typically leave reviews, but this app diserves it. Finally, an app that is just as intuitive as it is functional. I can finally know where everything is and how many items I still have. The people who made this app thought of every little detail. I can customize far more than I thought I would ever need or want too. the ability to put tags and add pictures is amazing, too. I rate this 100 out of 5

Thanks Miquel! If not Google drive then at least allow option that 2 different people take inventory of different places -> take local back up and when transfer to one app are able to restore information from both the backups in a single app! That would be very useful. Thanks. Giving 4 star because even though it is a good app it needs further improvements. When someone takes a back up and thereafter has added something -> restores from the back up all the data gets wiped out.

This app is perfect for the specific use case I have. It's nice being able to keep a list of everything I have for cooking or cleaning, as well as having access to that information while I'm shopping. Being able to include pictures and quantities was a nice touch.

I feel like I tried every home item tracking app available and this one is the easiest and best one by far. Very easy to use and visually looks good. I wish there was a way to access it on web, but besides that haven't had any issues with it at all.

I'm obsessed with keeping track of my treasures (junk to others) and this app is great. I have it on my S25 phone and a Galaxy Note 8 and Galaxy Note 10 that are not used as phones with different treasures in each app. I want to combine all three inventories onto my Note 10but not sure how to do that.

I added some important data to this app and connected it with Google drive. Now I have changed my phone, downloaded the app and connected to Google drive once again. But now all data are vanished. You can use it as a toy, but not as a real app.

it's a great app so far, does almost everything I wanted on an inventory app and so far the best ui of them, would be nice to have a option to add a number to items and sort them that way in addition to the sort by name or quantity (for organizing purposes)

Great free home item organizer app to keep track of all of the things you have at home. The only thing that would make this app perfect is if they can include adding household members so they can also make changes to the inventory.

Nice and simple. Only has the most minimal of features but they are done very well. looking forward to see how this develops. Very strong foundation I think and data can be exported. There's no lock in and the only cost is an optional donation to the developer.
