playStoreReviews.text: Fairly straightforward app with the exception of the ability and ease to edit your listing if you've posted a sale. Spent a useless and extended amount of time to try to do that within the app, accessing the browser version, and doing a general how-to Google search. It was a bit ridiculous and still wasn't able to do the simple tweak I wanted. So make sure you get everything right on the first go. I couldn't even see where to obviously delete the listing in order repost correctly either.

App has absolutely no identity verification. Someone falsely put my address up on the app, presumably as part of a scam. I removed the listing, which was a simple form on their website. Which was nice, but also indicative of the problem. Anyone can post a listing anywhere, and anyone can take down any listing. If I could leave 0 stars I would.

Overall great experience. It would be nice if there are more interactive features like notifying about new sales close by or by keywords in description. Also, sometimes it shows an event that, when opened, says it's cancelled. This information should have been pulled from the server in background and the event shouldn't be shown on the map at all.

I had this app for close to 2 yrs and it worked great. Then today I installed it again after factory resetting my phone. I'll click on the sales and the ones I don't want I hide the peg. Then when I return to the map it throws me out into the ocean near Africa on the map. I tried changing colors it worked then went to another didn't change the color and it shot me out into the water again. If they fix it email me until then I'm not using it.

Not the prettiest app, but it delivers on functionality. The subscription fee very reasonable and well worth it for the additional features. I've had a few frustrations with the navigation using generalized locations rather than the actual address, so I have to be a bit more vigilant when navigating. Also as others have said, integration with platforms other than just Craigslist would be fantastic.

Not a great GUI, but it's better than nothing. I invisioned software like this 20 years ago but had no funding or connections. Needs the ability to migrate route data to waze, Google maps, etc, or ability to map within the app. *Edit* I know funds are available for this, but the only way this kind of thing is going to work is through a national ad campaign. There's rarely anything on it when there are sales all over.

WARNING!! - 0/5 stars!!! Don't waste your time downloading. just read the sad reviews. sounds like they had a good thing going, but then lost a deal with Craigslist and took a turn to greedy town, and now people who experienced anything at all from the app to begin with are so disappointed and left feeling ripped off. As for me, I wasted my time downloading the stupid app only to find it is completely useless. Downloaded only to uninstall and wish I could get those minutes of my life back.

The payed version of this app makes yardsale and estate sales so fun to go to. Friday night I sit down and map out a plan of attack and sat morning it's go time. Its great to map out your day on one map and also use the key words to organize the sales when searching. Then you 🌟the ones you like and it will create a route for you in maps if you ask it to. It also will sort of "ghost" all the sales that aren't on your route. Totally worth every penny of $5. Major time saver!

Unfortunately, like everyone is mentioning, this app is going downhill ever since Craigslist broke the agreement with this app. I don't see any yard sales in my area within a 20 mile radius when there's dozens and dozens on other apps. They relied too much on Craigslist and didn't have a backup. I hope it goes back the way it used to be. I'm keeping the app just in case the merge between them reconciles. Right now though, don't download if you're expecting an amazing experience like before.

This app was my go to source for sales last year. This year, after I paid for it, it has been awful. Sales don't load in automatically like they did a year ago. I have to look up sales on other sources and add them myself. What used to save me a lot of time is now a chore to use.

I've tried many yard sale apps & this app is the best. I can set it to make sure I don't miss my favorite community yard sale and can find yard sales in any city I might be in.😊 The above review was in 01/16. I gave it 5 Stars. I've held a subscription for 10 years, because I like the color option. However, over the past few years most sales don't even have a description, so the colors don't matmatterNow the price has doubled. I'm now editing my first review & giving it 3 Stars.
This app is a great idea, but terribly executed. In my state, there are a full 3 yard sales in a week. No point of getting this app

If you want to use crowd source feature, you have to allow 24/7 GPS tracking to "auto detect" yard sales based on your movement behavior. How HORRIBLY invasive, not to mention a battery drain. Why not let people simply submit sales manually? Is 24/7 user location data being sold? Valid question. App has full screen video ads and the image galleries are hard to scroll without changing app screens. Not a very good app and the mandatory behavior tracking spoils what could be a very useful feature.
some yard sales aren't real. map assist is terrible. this could be a great app!!

used to be a pretty useful app but now constant ads and always selling you something or showing you all the pictures without paying. Probably gonna uninstall as just another pay for everything and non stop ads. what a shame
It is very nice to be able to locate the sales and get a description of what is available at each location. I can map my destinations easily. I use it all the time. Thank you!
Helps a lot if you are a Treasure Hunter.

This App Is A Rummagers Dream Come True!! Rummage Sales, Garage Sales, Estate Sales, Going Out of Business Sales, if it's in the newspaper or on Craigslist it's all here!! One thing I wish the developers would do is link the GPS option to Google Maps, whatever GPS this app uses isn't the greatest. But for $1.99 per year it's totally worth one hundred and ninety nine pennies!! The free version only gets you views of sales on the weekends, paid version gets you all access to every day of the week.

Really disappointed that this app has not improved one bit since it broke ties with craigs list as it promised. It was a very useful yard sale app that I used religiously back then, now not so much. Not even great for seller either. Only able to post 6 photos. I'm advertising for a Sunday yard sale and I can't view it. After 3 attempts to list I have yet to see a link come thru my email. Glad I never paid money for this app.
Sometimes have to switch it from one day to another to make it work, but it's still a great app!

There are much better apps for yard/garage sale finding and tracking locations.  Note of caution:  This app is paid for through google play.  You end up with a SUBSCRIPTION that AUTOMATICALLY renews after one year even if you have not used it & it was uninstalled almost a year ago.    google has a 48hour refund policy, so they won't help you at all..  Just don't get snagged, make sure that you CANCEL it if you don't want to keep using it. Yes I do know this info but 8 out of 10 others may not.

Perfect app! Very useful. The more I play around with this app the more features I find. You can search all sales for the keyword you're looking for. Create a customized route to just the sales you want. It just gets better and better. One of the best apps I have found and one of the only apps I choose to pay for. I loved it!

This app died, let me explain... When it was connected to Craigslist this app worked great and I was able to hit 30 plus sales a day each weekend. This all changed with licensing, now it wont show anything really, this app has been irrelevant for years now, I hope this helps you and saves you time.

This is a great app for people who want to find out lots of info about nearby yard/garage sales. Tells you where they are, shows you what's for sale, tells you when to be there (and when not to be there). It has saved me time and gas, and had helped me find items I am interested in - fast.

This app is fairly useless. I paid a subscription fee to unlock extra features, hoping it would somehow make it better. It did not. The drive mode is not functional at all, and the first 2 yard sales I went to were not even active. The app is showing out dated information.

The app is amazing and just what my wife and I was looking for, I downloaded it and she loved it so much she downloaded it as well. The only issue we've came across is sometimes a glitch of when tapping on the pinpoint marker it takes you to an address of a different yard sale. But all in all we love the site and it's 99% accurate. And thus being said is the only reason I am giving a 4 star and not 5.

This app is AWESOME!!! It's super easy to use and I found 5 different Estate sales on last sat that I would've never of found unless for this app. Its awesome for not wasting your time because most of the Yard sales and Estate sale listings have pics of there highlighted items for sale and if pics aren't available the sales have typed list of what they're selling. I love it.

I really enjoyed this app and did subscribe to the advanced features. The price was fair but just days after I paid the app lost it's most valuable features. Frankly, I believe my subscription should be refunded as you can no longer deliver what I paid for.

Deleted immediately due to COVID19 stay at home restrictions, but before doing so. I noticed that no matter what way I had tried to set up my route in the app, I was not ever able, a window just popped up over and over with an error message. Otherwise all looks like it could someday be useful, if snags were able to get fixed first.

This used to be a good app but it hasn't worked for my area since they stopped pulling in Craigslist listings for my area earlier this year. I waited awhile to see if the developer would rectify the issue but they haven't so I dropped my subscription. It's absolutely worthless now!

**Edit:JUNK the creator announced that now it won't pull from craigs list so basically if its not on Facebook it won't show at all. We should be refunded for this. I didn't agree to having to buy it again after my first payment was lifetime. Way to steal peoples money. ** Thief after 3 years is making me pay for the app every year. I paid when it was a one time fee. Now I feel ripped off to have to pay again. If I new you could change to yearly I never would have gotten. Now app is junk. Greedy!

Nice to find an app that's smartly designed without being overdone, makes for more efficient use of your time, simplicity of use and you don't need to have the "Subscription Edition" for it to be very helpful in assisting you in your quest for treasures and it WILL, at the end of the day, increase your yield of goodies.

I have a galaxy S4. Use it weekly to find yard sales. After year + the app stoped showing pictures. I complained twice with no response from customer service. I canceled my subscription but i guess they dont care. Uninstalling after this review. 01/14/22. Checked the app a few weeks ago and saw pictures again. I resubscribed and this morning all I get when choosing a red point description is a the time the sale is held. Nothing else. What is up with this.

Was a great app when craigslist ads were being imported, but now I'm paying a yearly fee for an app that doesn't ever display any sales. All sorts of sales around me currently, but the app shows nothing. Canceling my subscription as I'm just paying for an app that doesn't do anything anymore.

I'm giving this app 5 stars because the app itself was fantastic and the premium features were well worth paying for. However I don't recommend downloading the app now since they lost their licensing agreement with Craigslist so now sales posted on there won't pull to the app which was where the majority came from. Super disappointing so I cancelled my subscription for now but will still use the app and will resubscribe if the issue is resolved. Fingers crossed!

I have a subscription, but when I try to change days it tells me I need a subscription. I s8gn out and back in and still nothing changes. It used to be a great app when it was free. Since being a subscription thing it's gone downhill. I'm going to cancel the subscription and remove the app.

Sadly this app does not let you post any type of comments or reviews so other people can see if there are any comments about said yard sale. For example I have driven 40 miles, for what I thought was going to be a great sale, and when I got there, the signs were posted up even in the yard but no one was there no cancellation signs nothing. Also I've driven 20 miles out just to find out there's no sale at all and there's even been times there was no address at all and yet it was posted in the app

This app works well, looks great and does what it should do. I'm rating 2 stars because once Craigslist removed their partnership, this app has nothing left and it really bites. This app WAS AWESOME before. Now not so much. I hope the DEVs are able to recuperate and find another way because once it's got a decent base of sales on it..this app is the best!! Just...not now. 😔

I like this app and have used it for several years. I was sad though when they lost the Craigslist access, but that wasn't the fault of Yard Sale Treasure Map. wish they could get it back though!! I still use this app whenever I want to find a sale, it's still great!!

the biggest issue I have is in navigation where upon leaving a site you are instructed to turn north, east, south or west rather than right or left. maybe I am alone, but in a strange neighborhood I have no idea of compass directions. there are some other issues but I do not have time to describe now. overall it is great app.

it was good when I first wrote this in 2013. it is great now. if you plan on going to garage sales I highly recommend this. August 17th 2019. I hate to give any app 5 stars, but this yard sale app is a real time saver. I go to garage sales in Tallahassee at least once a month and could I would waste several hours without it. I spend about an hour Saturday morning planning my entire trip. No more chasing those miserable signs.

Been 3 years since I posted this and it still thinks it's Saturday on Sunday. What a joke. Developer isn't the brightest. Original review (10/13/19): What's the actual point when I can just look on Craigslist instead since that's all it does? Also, it doesn't even know the dates. It thinks it's Saturday when it's Sunday which could definitely direct you to a place that nothings going on if you're not paying attention.

I like to know a little about the sales I am headed to, and the ad text does that. Nav is a bit iffy but close enough. I learned to get better pics by open in browser. The best sales I have been to, came from Treasure Map.

Not nearly as helpful as it used to be now that Craigslist listings don't appear. Far less listings and even fewer images and helpful info to determine if these sales are worth looking at. For some reason, this app doesn't allow scrolling so any info longer than the screen is unviewable, including time or address information.

This is an alright app. I find that the search parameters are hidden and there are ALOT of missing garage sales from Craigslist. Keep that in mind that you can add the sales for everyone, but that just means you'll miss out!

There are too many professional estate liquidators on this site and it seems at time that's all there is. These professional liquidators sell at antique dealer prices if not much higher so this app should be renamed. There are almost no yard sale or garage sale listings in this app. It really has become a free advertising platform for estate liquidators and other professional dealers.

I absolutely love & use this app to help me navigate through the garage sale listings. I number & color code the sales. I like the hidden feature which I use to hide the sales I have already been too. I use green for the sales I really want to go to, orange to caution me when a sale has a weird start or stop time, purple if I have been to the sale but want to go back, etc.

This app is awful now, it used to be great. They lost their ability to pull listings from Craigslist and other sites, making them pretty much worthless. They also charged my credit card for a new year, even after cancelling.

2018 update: 3 yrs running and I've recommend this app to over 100+ with tons of thank you's. I have never had any issue's with my LG or tablets. Has always been up to date. I only wish I had more color options for search items.
cant see any photos without subscription

This has been a 5 star app till today. My wife and I love to go out and treasure hunt. Today I open the app to find out that small businesses are posting. This needs to be for yard/garage sales only. An option needs to be added to report those that post something outside of that.

The app has lost me as a subscribed user until they can fix their Craigslist Licensing Issue, which made it to where you can only see user added sales. Was such a great app but it's not worth your time until it's fixed.
Its. Quite nice to find other sales in the area ahead of time, prevents backtracking and saves time. This is a bonus for shoppers and its easier to use and save routes.

I use this app every weekend! I love the new option of navigating to either the pin location or the address, and the extra pin colors. It still needs a "never again" feature, for the repeater sales that are crappy.

Love this app and have used it for our community Parade of Garage Sales the last three years. Shoppers love how easy it is to load, to use to follow all our sales. It's easy to print from to give hard copies of our map to those older folks who rather paper.

This app used to be good, but now you have to pay to see the photos on the sales. So we get ads and you still want me to pay. No thanks there are several other aps I use to find sales and THEY ARE FREE!!

This app used to be so much better! It used to actually map different sales but now it's no better than a GPS. We physically have to put in addresses. Which doesn't help find them all.... just the ones I've found.

used this app for several years. 99.9% location info correct & easy to find using map provided. Pics help decide if worth trip if location is out of the way.. handy to plan ahead using route map.. yard sale pages are everywhere but this one is my first choice.. if its on this site its worth the time to check it out... Its worth the subscription fee and i auto renew yearly..i use the map when im trying to find an address for any purpose.. its handy and easy to use. Never had negative use.

70% of the locations are wrong. Not even close. This would be an excellent app if it could do a better job of mapping the actual location or getting within a few streets of the location but it doesn't even come close.

I heard about this app through a video but it is not even worth the space on my phone. Barely detects any of the sale near me even though I clearly see them listed online. Then requires a subscription apparently to change important and typical things such as changing the radius of your search like seriously? I'll just find a different app out of the hundreds to use instead. Or i'll just search them online like I did before

Its very helpful however it definitely doesn't list all the sales and locations. Also when it lists an address you can see it on a map. I have to open my Google maps up separately and manually type in the address
The app works well, except some times the addresses don't. You get there and there is no sign of a yard sale. Also, Estate sales are included in the maps...they shouldn't be included.

BEWARE - Before Downloading the Trial App -  BEWARE - BEWARE  Useless App - Not many people list their sales here     - - - PLUS- - - -  Just got a notice FOR a bill 6.29.19 that it was being renewed.  No prior notice whatsoever.  Email dated 6.29.19.  They state they will give you a notice a few days  prior to the renewal so you can cancel if you like.  Well today is 6.30.19 and I am now stuck for another year.  They do not let you cancel it after the 6.29.19 date.  I did go in and cancel not to renew for 2020.   Hopefully I do not get another year added on in 2020.  Everyone BEWARE before installing this APP - It doesn't let you cancel like it says it will.   SCAM

Sometimes takes you to a different location then the sale. The addresses should be the whole address. When it is a partail address, the app takes you to "map marker." You sometimes end up blocks aways.

I normally lived this app, but lately not.many listing are published on thr app....Craigslist stopped , once people realize posting their garage sales on this app....they will have many many more show up, thus app literally maps out in order the garage sales in your area....hope to see some listing soon...spring time always fun to so shopping ! Nice app, hope everyone gives it a try...and post their sales on this app.

Wanted to download on a laptop. Phone is broken. App won't give me an option for a laptop. App is worthless and so is the idea! I go to sales that I'm interested in what is offered. Don't care if it's out of order of a map!!!
The ads are too many now. Has video ads when you're trying to get to next sale.

Loved this app for several years, it worked perfectly, but now when I try to arrounge my route by adding sales I want to attend, all I get is a big "SERVER ERROR" message. Same deal on several other phones I tried it on so it's not just me. BOO

Since they no longer automatically import Craigslist listings the app is useless. I haven't seen a single sale in months. They will not get another penny from me and the app will be deleted. The developer should be ashamed.

Whyyyyy?! I'm so sad to see this one go. I really loved yard sale treasure map. However, like a lot of the reviews are saying it's pretty much useless without the craigslist data. I used to suggest this app to everyone I met at yard sales. I really hope they are able to remedy this.

Haven't been garage saling in a while but I hold onto this app and I will because it is a great map of my yard sales around I think it should actually asked locations by Google if it was something they were able to pull off having a map of every small town and I'm not really sure if I would want my house on there and I hope that they asked the people before they star separate addresses and said that there is a bunch of valuables sitting on their driveway and then people drive to

5 Stars for what you were; Craigslist is the baddie here. I will miss the convenience this app provided. Craigslist stole your idea and implemented it poorly. I hope they change their mind. You'll get no negative review from me, but they did. Take care and thanks for all the treasures.
So I tried to put a sale up on here and everytime I try to put a date in for the sale it crashes and the whole app stops working. Deleted and redownloaded the app and it's still doing it.
I find it very convenient and easy to navigate through. it could not be more simple and I've also listed a yard sale on here myself which was also very easy. nothing fussy

Last year was great.This year so far is a little disappointing. I currently have 3 sales around me,but when I opened each one ,the only thing listed was the words yard sale.No address, no times,nothing

Not an accurate yard sale finder. Most of the yard sales on this app do not exist. You drive to the location within the time specified, and there is no sale. I have even had a sale that Google could not navigate to because the address did not exist. I am uninstalling the app.

This is a really good yard saleing tool. I especially like the way it is linked to Craig's list. My only concern is that ONLINE yardsales are an annoyance. you cannot go to them, they most often are "still getting ready" and they are actually just places online selling stuff. Can the online sales have their own online yardsale section?

Needs work. Salee's should be charged, not salers. This would help with salee's cancelling sales since they would have to pay to post a sale and therefore less likely to not follow through with sale. This would allow app makers to make the money required to keep app going, while allowing saler to create routes. Amount of false sales is very disappointing, and sales need a map feature to easily get directions. This app should model itself off the estatesales. Net app. Which is very user friendly.

This is the worst app I have ever tried to use! Most important piece of information THE ADDRESS OF THE SALE! seems to be top secret info here! Set to location and get sales the next state over, but none in my area! This app just plain sucks! Waste if time.

I gave this 2 star's because I thought it was a good idea; that's all! I didn't like this application very much! Had a few problems, but I haven't looked at it for a week; at least!!! SO WHEN I OPENED IT, JUST A FEW MINUTES AGO, AND THE SAME PLACES WHERE LISTED AS WAS THE LAST TIME. OH NO!
Very helpful app, but very limited in what is accessible for free. Must subscribe if you want to access all it's perks. Definitely an easier way to find Yard Sales though. Thank you!
I feel like I have been scammed. Got an annual subscription and never once did this app show any yard sales wherever I was, when in fact there were dozens of them. Waste of money, don't recommend!!!!
This app used to be OK but now that CL doesn't share information with it any longer pretty much nothing shows up on the map. Find a different app or look up your local papers classifieds online.

Sorry excuse for an app I paid the fee and have had it for 3 weeks and haven't seen one yard sale listed and I have it set for 50 miles....I live in a moderate size town with major metropolis a few miles away....this app don't work so save your 4.95

Stop the vibration for the love of Pete. Also, cannot move map and find sales near the new center point, so you have to wait for it to vibrate after selecting Thursday, then select Friday again so that it will re-search the area. Worth the subscription but needs polishing badly.

Not worth it wo CL. Was a great app last year. So much so I even subscribed. Has many great features. But without a data source they don't mean much. Will unsubscribe if not resolved by my renewal date.

I look through garage sales to purchase things to resell. I was looking for an app that would connect all the garage sales in my area and a drivable distance and this does so. I wish however it connected to Google Maps or some other kind of navigation so that the application would be seamless

how do I cancel this? I cancelled it just after I downloaded the app and signed up for the trial and discovered that it doesnt really work in my very rural area but apparently it didn't cancel and I was just charged for it! please help!
no longer pulls from other sources and now wants a fee to view more than 3 images from posted sales. No longer as useful as it was but better than nothing.

Worked well for one weekend. Maybe there's a time limit on the free app? This weekend nothing is coming up and the drop-down to switch days doesn't work. Anyway, not enough time with it to decide if it's worth paying for so I'm not.

This app used to be the best but since they went to crowd sourcing there are 99% fake ads!!! The addresses are listed with no description of items to sell and if you try to go, there are no sales at those addresses!!!!!
This app seemed decent before I paid for it. Does not list 1/4 of the sales as others. This is definitely poorly updated if at all. Do not pay for it there are better free options out there.
Weak. Anything useful requires a subscription. I'm better off just driving around, looking for hand-painted signs, stopping at each one to look.

Trying to balance an addiction to yard/rumage sales and a very full schedule is not easy .. with this app, I can find a few nearby sales quickly to squeeze a few stops into an already full day.. There's no need to drive around scoping for signs anymore!
This app is hard to navigate. As seller, it's very hard to go back and edit. It's useful to use if shopping but difficult to use to sell.
I uninstalled this map because I no longer use it. I was just charged the annual fee for the map. Will someone please reverse the charges & let me know. I'd also like to be removed from the app.

last year this app was awesome, but it appears something different has happened as the map seems to look different at times and there is a lot of incorrect addresses I have noticed. it would be great and awesome if it could just be as it was before hopefully the developers are working on this
Garbage, this app is useless now. Seriously, do not download. Not sure why but they lost all connections to most sales. Results have dropped significantly.
Decent app. Needs to work out a lot of bugs, especially with yard sale locations. App also only utilizes Craigs List for Yard Sales. Would be nice if this app used more platforms to retrieve info.
Love the pictures, can better decide which sales to go to and which to skip. And love being able to look for one specificific thing.

Very user friendly app. You get notifications whenever there is a garage or yard or estate sale. Just a click on the GPS location of the garage/yard/estate sale address will take you there. Easy to put garage/yard/estate sale pictures on the app. No need to put the garage sale signs on the streets, poles etc. and that will save time and energy and cost of putting signs on the streets. Helps in keeping the streets clean.
Great app! Easy to use! I highly suggest this add on to all users! Easy to install and edit. Thanks
great results, my yard sale was packed , amazing customer service as well, overall a good app to have 5 out of 5 😁
Extremely friendly to you. I will refer to all my friends
did not like .. nothing posted in 200 mile radius of my home.
found nothing within several states around me. don't waste your time
did not help me find a garage sale near me
couldn't get it to do anything
All So Awesome
love it

loved this app until the latest update, now I just struggle with it. it doesn't load and hangs up and crashes...it is constantly a problem and it is difficult to sell or buy without being able to communicate through the app. too bad cause I love VarageSale. won't struggle withbit much longer. if it isn't fixed soon, I will move all my stiff to another platform. please fix it.

The best place to find bargains and sell stuff you don't use. The only drawback is that users aren't allowed to ask for app payments. It was much easier to get rid of larger items quickly when we could post "Venmo holds" on "flash sale" items. Otherwise, everybody wants the item to be held for them, then gets mad of someone else gets there first. Too many "can I come at X time" and "How many people are ahead of me.." It's too much work, and now angry people know my address. 👎

Constantly freezes with error meassages galore! This used to be a fun site to sell on but it is unusable. When posting a new item, you enter in all the photos, title, description, and price, but it won't publish unless you go back and delete a letter or a number in each area, add it back in again, then it accepts it. But it won't include any of the painstakingly entered description when you go to the site to check your listing! Too much work to sell anything. Will be deleting my account.

I post an item for sale, well I fill out the form, get to the end and hit post, it does nothing except clears everything. I end up having to start over, this happened several times today while trying to post the same item, this happened yesterday too. I don't have time to keep trying to post the same item over and over and over and over and over!!!!!!! I only gave 1 star since it keeps happening. did great untill yesterday.

A little frustrating. I used Varage in the past to purchase and sell items in my community. A few years ago, the admins were always on top of sellers/buyers that were horrible with communication or none at all. As the app grows, it seems as if it's too much for them to handle. I recently got logged off, can't remember my password. I have requested "Forgot Password", 4 days later, still waiting for an email to reset my password. I've tried multiple times now.

Issues remain unaddressed. People never respond. I inquired about several items, but got no responses. I don't know if this is due to laziness on the sellers part. I suggest adding an expiration system like craigslist has, to weed out the posted items that have no activity from the original poster for a set amount of time. i see posts from 5 years ago still active.

I was looking forward to selling some things on this app but it was right off the bat too intrusive with my Facebook account. It wanted total access to all my Facebook account information. So, unfortunately, I had to uninstall. I don't want an app to have access to all my postings, what groups I've joined and those postings plus all my friends and their information.

Admin are very unprofessional and pick & choose which rules apply to certain members. No shows are supposed to be three strikes and they're out, but are on the site after years of the same stuff! No accountability for the people who wreak havoc, and lots of glitches within the app. People are constantly saying they're interested in stuff and never respond, or show up. Has definitely went downhill over the years! There are a handful of great people on here as well which is why I stick around!

The interface is very straightforward and self explanatory until you find an item that you want to purchase.  It's kind of awkward bc you have to post a comment and hope they reply,  then figure out the rest.  The option to buy should be readily available for those impulse sales.. And to create a stress free buying environment.

I enjoy varagesale very much. I've been using this app for about 8 years. I've found so many great deals, and I've sold a lot of items. I love how safe the meetups are. The app works great. Except, I have noticed if you want to change one of your pics to make it the "cover photo" for your item, that option has never worked. Otherwise, I love how organized everything is..especially how it keeps up with all your transactions.

I like VarageSale...it's a nice garage sale site. I like some of there rules. Not all. Most of the ppl on here are fair with price. But some ppl price stuff like u are shopping at a department store. I buy from of the same ppl . There is alot of very nice ppl u met. Over all its not a bad site. Sometime issues with the app. It is frustrating & 1 of the ppl I buy from has had issues for alil over a wk. And didn't get the notification of the items I want.

Couldn't sign up, couldn't log in, couldn't find a community for me.... Logistical nightmare. It's like they don't want me to actually be able to use their app. Nothing but slow loading screens and error messages. I *think* I was finally make an account after 30 minutes of trying, but I still can't get the app to work. Really annoying. Do not recommend.

I downloaded this app specifically to find and locally buy an entertainment center. The app requires you to be in a "community group" and you must be approved before being able to buy anything, including messages to seller or just saving an item in your favorites. The problem is that the "approval" takes days and the you're only allowed to sell/list items while you wait! I browsed other local buying apps and already purchased what I needed in the 4 days I've been waiting.

I use this ap every day to buy and sell everything! Easy to use too! Also easy to post yard/garage sales! I recommend this ap to friends all the time! Update: There have been some glitches in the app lately. Plus these new adds they added make loading the pages to bump your own items take much longer. I dropped my rating from 5 stars to 4 because of this, but I still love the app... Unlike regular facebook sales pages, there is accountability if people dont show up or if items arent as describ

Misleading...Can only create an acct by way of Facebook. I'm not a FB fan & keep social media activity to a minimum. Presents the premise that the other option in setting up is via email, I tried that route several times but it doesnt allow me to proceed. Bottom line they only want you and your contacts Facebook info. If that's the case then just say so.

I don't get notifications until I open the app which makes me miss messages for pick ups. There is no report feature for people that don't show up or stop responding, you have to talk to an admin or report the whole transaction. Items are left on there for years without being taken down, which floods the available items with stuff that does exist. Also, some ads just blast sound for minutes at a time, and you have to close and reopen the app or turn off your volume.

Love buying and selling on this app. I really like the way it organizes the items you are selling by category and the feature that allows you to reserve an item for a customer immediately. It helps secure the sale. I also like how it color codes items that are available, pending a sale, and no longer available. The only thing is I cant seem to get pictures in my gallery to show up on a listing so I have to take pictures of the items Im selling through the app camera. This app is the best.

I love this app for many reasons! 1) I can sell my unwanted items without leaving the house. 2) I can buy an item without having to wait in line at a store; too many times it took so long that I just put the item back and left. 3) Porch pick up (PPU) is great, especially if you have kids! 4) Last but not least, you get to meet great people and be part of a good community!

Great idea but too complex. I don't like having to join separate communities. It would be nice to enter a location and search within "X" amount of miles from my zip code. Instead I have to ask permission to join other communities to see what's in different areas. Marketplace and Craigslist are easier to navigate and I can search countrywide without having to join groups. Another feature this could use is animal sales, pets and/or livestock. Tried it but uninstalled shortly after downloading.

I would give this app zero Stars if I could. my friend recommended this app to help me sell a few things sell a few things. Even though it had a low rating, I thought it was worth a shot. It took almost a week and a half for the app to verify me and for it to allow me to post in a local group. I have been trying to delete my account for almost 3 days now and the app refuses can not only delete my account but to even send me a form confirming the deletion. so take my advice save your time!!

I look, look and look and have found many things that I would like to purchase. However the shipping charges are often too much when you add them both together the price of the item and the shipping it's just not worth it. I wish that there were more people on Long Island, New York State that were local that placed ads here. Then I can pick them up rather than pay shipping. Although, right now, the prices of gas has to be taken into consideration as well

Trying to get set up and join different groups is frustrating, seems to take a long time to get approved.I have tried messaging the admin but they seem to take their sweet time getting back to me. Overall I am very disappointed , I thought it would be easier than searching each group individually on Facebook, but I am ready to uninstall this app.

The AP works most of the time, but does quit working occasionally or can become super slow during peak use hours. I wish items sold would disappear in a week but some don't. People who have posted items for sale a year to two years ago still have them posted. Yet they no longer use the app. I wish these items would be removed by the site.

I enjoy selling and buying on VarageSale. I have met some really nice people. Most people respond quickly and show up to the " meet-ups". Some don't show up and that is very frustrating. Don't try to over price your items. People are looking for a bargain. Price things fairly, and keep in mind the lowest price you will go. Even if you have to wait a while for a response.

I signed up for this app 3 days ago and yet I am still unable to try selling anything because my account is still pending apporval. It's ridiculous and really discouraging me from wanting to use this app at all. I tried to send a message to administration to see how much longer my account was going to be pending, and I couldnt even do that.

This app works well, but..[-1 star] No feature to rate buyers. Other apps ive used do have that and unfortunately some people will even ghost you after agreeing to meet. [-1] Also the app seems to currently have extremely low traffic, would also love to see a view counter on listings to get a better idea of interest.[-1] no report user feature. Lots of scammers on here ask for your personal info or ask to send checks etc but i can't even report them. Have to message a community admin to report.

Complete fail. This app will not help you sell a thing unless you "bump" each individual items up. If you don't pay for that bump, none of your ads will get any traffic or traction. They just won't show up when buyers are looking for whatever you're selling. Only the items of those that pay for the bump will appear. And to top it off, they have to verify your identity before they let you sell anything. And for what? Just to be added to the pile of ignored sellers? No thanks. Uninstalling now!

I obviously didn't get how it worked because over many months I never sold 1 thing and only one person who called at 3am wanted to send me a cashier check from a bank in California after she received the item. I received a email 1 time at the beginning by a member about approval and never again. The system & rules are cumbersome and doesn't create a environment that is seller & buyer friendly. I was very disappointed. My inventory was all new & priced at 10% of current selling prices online.

Updated. Don't waste your time unless you love adds while you browse. App is terrible. Adds crammed between every few posts on main page, add banner at the bottom, and FORCED pop up adds while you surf. Absolutely terrible now. WAS a decent app once upon a time. Back to Facebook marketplace for me.

I just installed yesterday. Says because I didnt use a selfie photo, it can take longer. Approval still pending from admin. Its not as fast as other buy,sell,trade apps, even if email and phone is verified. The admin I got also used a landscape pic. If it takes this long to be approved...its gonna take longer to sell anything. The less convenient it is, less chances of anyone signing up just to buy something.

Unfortunately Varage Sale is no longer a reliable buy/sell platform after many years of success. The app is full of scammers with fake profiles and fake items asking for e-transfers. Theres no validation for new users. Must pay a monthly subscription fee to post more than 50 items. Notifications dont work (I tried working with tech support but no resolution after many back/forths & they stopped replying). Because notifications dont work buyers & sellers forget about meet ups or miss messages.

Would be better if I could post things for sale.. This app does not update it doesn't allow notifications to come through You never know if someone's looking at your stuff. it needs a better way of notifications like a bell or something. because I never know people are even looking at my stuff

great for the community 👍🏻 although the app has given me a lot of issues with notification issues. The help team helped me fix it already a couple times. also videos can't be posted on it and photos cannot be cropped in app. other than that great!

Great app. but the subscription is absolute Bs to post more than 50 items. not to mention invasive ads now that open while scrolling. also the amount of scammers and app crashes lately is out of hand. I miss the OG varagesale
I'm not getting any notifications but they're all set to on. sometimes I get a message notification but it's hours late. also when I tap on a group of new items posted it will just disappear.

I wish I could give it more than 5 stars. I always find something that I just can't live without. Lol. Makes shopping easier and saves a ton of money. I definitely spend more time on VS than shopping in stores.

This is no longer my go-to site since 2018 for buying or selling since I'm constantly unable to login for the last 4 months either via my FB or my Google accounts which used to work. I've reinstalled it repeatedly with no luck. VarageSale, goodbye and good luck!
I used to find varage sale very useful and productive, but lately there seems to be a lot less merchandise being advertised and alot less people looking. I hope it's not dying out.

This app is getting more and more problematic. I can view the items in watching. It keeps saying "no items" when I click on an item that I'm watching. I get a notification, but when I click it, it's not there. Fix this issue, or there'll be a lot of customers leaving this app. I've heard more people having this problem. Right now this app is useless.

This app has gone downhill. Nothing loads properly, you often don't get notifications - which means you miss out on messages from interested buyers. I hate that there are so few sub categories and filters for searching. "Furniture" is an entire category, so it's impossible to find what you need if your trying to furnish one room. You also cannot filter the search by price. If I want a cheap $5 shirt, I don't want to have to scroll through hundreds of items out of my price range. Disappointing

I love findings deals and selling on VarageSale because it's a community format where everyone has a profile, so it feels safe compared some other sites. I gave 4 stars because: A) I wish there was a list where you can easily review all the items you've marked with a heart. B) I wish that the button to request an item to be reserved said "request reserve" instead of "message seller". Doesn't make sense to me and took me ages to figure out. That feature could be made more user friendly.

As a concept, Varage sale is fabulous, but using it revels many technical difficulties. The fact that you can't take down your own items at any time, especially after they have sold is strange, and I cannot change my home community. Just now I had an issue with posting, where I lost everything I had written before posting an item because I briefly had to leave the site. I guess there is no "draft" function. I found that annoying.

This app has been going downhill over the last year. There is often problems with notifications not going through. Usually once a month I need to uninstall and reinstall. The ads they use to pay for the platform have gotten obnoxious (I get it they need to pay for stuff), but now if you are doing a clean out and you coss post stuff they want $15/month if you want to post lots/do a spring clear out...that's RIDICULOUS. Especially when you are posting $2 things. Go elsewhere.

VarageSale is great, but the app is even less than mediocre. Sometimes I'll see that I have notifications about followed categories, but I have to kill and reopen the app to read them. Sometimes, ads won't open. Other times, there's a huge lag between a person messaging me and the notification popping up. Despite these issues, the app hasn't been updated since January 2021. That shows exactly how much they care about it.

Every update breaks something, generally making the entire app useless. It takes days to weeks to fix even when it's a major issue. Imagine trying to buy or sell something when notifications are down. You have no way of knowing if someone wants something. Try looking to buy something when the thumbnail is all that's available and you can't see a description or full pic. The entire site is inaccessible with irritating frequency. These are not one off occurrences, they happen regularly.

Good site to sell your items. Wouldn't mind if you could swipe away items you don't want to see again just so you don't have to go through a bunch of pictures again to see items you haven't seen, so many problems with the app after updating, can't open pages you follow says " no items" when it says there is 20 some items posted.

This app doesn't work consistently. It usually fails to notify me of new messages. The app also now logs me out randomly, even while I am using it. It also shows notifications, but when I go to look at them there is nothing new. I have to shut down the app and go in again to see them. Now the app doesn't want to load anything most of the time. Everything is blank, have to close app several times and then I might get something to show up. This app has become very unreliable.

Since the update a few days ago, the app doesn't work for me at all. When I type in a search it says "oops, something went wrong, please try again"... When I look at notifications (even if it indicates I have some) it says "failed to fetch notifications", and the main feed doesn't load at all. I've had this app for almost 3 years now and it ONLY get worse.

Decent app for getting rid of things. Wish you could rate sellers/buyers so you can stay clear of the people who don't show or post things that aren't what they appear. New update. Now has pop up ads that randomly come out when scrolling at full volume when you're least expecting it. Nice jump scare. 👌 Also can't search multiple communities at once.

There are so many glitches. It keeps logging me out (by itself), and won't let me log back in and then when I finally get logged in again (usually takes days to get logged back in), a couple days later it logs me out again and the cycle repeats. I also don't always get message notifications even though notifications are turned on. It's now been over 6 weeks of being unable to log back in. I've now uninstalled and reinstalled countless times and still nothing.

Unreasonable, cannot add extra photos unless you download to your phone. Multistep process, Create post, add 1 photo, email other photos to your phone, download to your phone, open app and add photos. Extra steps if you need to edit photos. In just one posting, it will take at least 15 mins! Not to mention the freedom taken away from various tools and the speed of your computer or laptop to working with a tiny keyboard and limited tools on your phone. Choosing your communities also limits your search and the exposure of your product. You are miles away from any improvements.

App has gone downhill the last 3 months. Nothing is loading correctly, and notifications doesn't come up anymore, even though I have everything ticked off properly. My phone has notifications on as well, but nothing. I need to remember to open it so I can see if people messaged me or not. It's very frustrating!!!

Something happened and now I cannot login to the app anymore. The instructions on how to fix the error I receive don't apply to Android so that's useless. I've already reinstalled the app once and it let me use it for an hour before kicking me out and getting the Facebook permissions error AGAIN while trying to log back in. Fix your app, or at least have instructions on how to fix it ourselves that apply to Android users too!

This app loses stars as time goes on. Advertising is a bit much (it always is) and push notifications stopped working for messages. Not for about a year. Pretty hard to properly buy/sell when you don't know when you're being contacted. Update: they have jammed more ads in there. Quite disruptive while browsing items. Seeya never.

Absurdly legalistic for sellers. Admins will report you and delete your ad for minor 'infractions' which are pointless to enforce. I strongly disagree with the policy that you have to post individually for small items of the same variety if you want them priced separately. As a user this is spammy and annoying, it is simple to read an ad to verify whether things are priced individually or not and this is common practice. I would rather make sure I read an ad than have 100 ads for the same thing

Annoying but I use it. People's profiles say they have several items for sale so you click to see them and it says there's nothing for sale. Photos upload in a way that makes them extra large and hard to see properly in thumbnail form. When posting an ad you can fill all the info in and write a big description but if you click the back button you lose it all and have to start again. You can't be alerted when items come up for sale in your area only if you are subscribed to multiple areas.

Fine, but would really like to receive alerts on saved searches as I can do on craigslist. It would save a lot of time for me and sellers as there are specific things I am looking for. Also when you do a search there is no way to sort the search so that newest items appear first. Super annoying. Also annoying is that I often have to close and reopen the app to view new notifications.

The buying and selling aspect is great, fairly easy to list and look/search for what you want. Only downfall are having an easier way to report people for being no shows, people who dont take the app seriously, having a way for people to leave praise (not user friendly). Should be a rating percentage to rate on things like communication, showing up, friendliness. We can 100 praises but we dont see the 100 negatives people may have.

After trying to access my account for about 2 days, I found out that my account was deleted. Don't know why. Account has been re-instated but still can't log in with FB with permission already set up. Using a friend's account, we see me with 500+ praises, message button doesn't work and items listed is zero.If I ever get back on, I'll have to post back 500+ items. Will continue to evaluate as time goes on...

Constant pop up ads. Worst mods I have experienced as a seller, they change rules to suite their wants constantly and half don't bother even responding. Not to mention the glitches on the app, logs you out and won't allow you to log back in, or messages don't send. Always at the worst times, usually when you need to be around for a purchase/sale.

A great site for buying and selling stuff, but there are annoying glitches and shortcomings. I have to load it twice every time I go into it b/c my alerts don't load the first time. It would be nice to be able to set up a watch by keywords like other buy/sell sites have. It would also be great to have varagesale bank account from which things could be bought and sold without cash or etransfers.

About 80% of the time I don't get email or push notifications when I have a message. I have lost several sales because of this. There should be some guidelines on how to use the app. Some people use the 'interested' option to bookmark things they might like to buy while others use it to indicate they want to buy the item instead of messaging. This has caused some confusion and lost sales as well.

Overwhelming amount of advertisements. Urgh!!!🤨 And now for some reason, I'm also getting some sex dating advertising apps popping up all the time!?! I can understand having ads, but this is now ridiculous! Video ads and ads displaying on the bottom of the screen ALL THE TIME!!! I'm trying to scroll through the Varagesale posts..., NOT the commercial ads! But keep getting bombarded by the commercial ads EVERYWHERE. Really getting fustrated! I'm also getting notifications of past messages!!!🤨

Latley spinning blue wheel, search bar does not load--have to re-start, notifications link is frozen/dead or again spinning blue wheel, when out for pick up app does not load, have checked for updates etc -- nothing...seems to only get worse. This is my goto VS marketplace, dont make me rely on marketplace. OTHERWISE would be 5 star, great people with much success buying & selling.

Love love love VS! Took off one * because some minor flaws (when you remove an item from your watchlist, do it from the list. If done on the item's page, your watchlist doesn't refresh until you get out and reopen it). Also, pictures only appear in the order you upload. Wish we could change the order. There is a praise system, but no obvious way to give other buyers a heads up if you had a bad experience, although, it is community-based and so far I've had mostly good meetups.

I used to love this app, but it has become obnoxious by popup ads in addition to all the other ads. It is inyeruptive and really not worth the headache. I have started to sell more on other platforms instead that aren't as annoying. Stop the popups that cant be skipped and I will reconsider my rating. Used to be a great platform.

The app is just little bit of a problem when you are editing your post to show it on sale". You can't change the first one photo once you picked it. Also the searching of items doesn't come with Filters. So it's little of a hassle if you are looking for something in particular. But I'll recommend it for sure. You really can find amazing deals!

A pretty bad app. Since I've downloaded it all I've had were issues. The app shuts down and logs me out at least twice a day, in the last 15 minutes alone it has done it 8 times. It won't load all the items, I can see they have 120 items but only 25 items show up when I go on their page ( when I check on the website through a computer all 120 items are there ). If I am on the app and get a new notification I have to fully shut the app down to see it. There's more but I hit the word limit

Very simple and straightforward, great for selling things. However since I started on this app it has been buggy for 3 years. Messages come in delayed (up to an hour even), some days it is so slow you can't open anything, it logs you out randomly and sometimes you can't access notifications. This has been going on for a while and it is not just with me either. Oh, and try skipping these 30 second long ads that pop out at you with max volume...you can't.

The user interface is a bit clunky, and it has phases when notifications don't work or it goes offline, but overall it works okay and serves its purpose. Areas for improvement: When selecting images, you can choose up to 5 from your recent photos, but if you go through the lengthy and awkward navigation to choose an image from a specific folder, you can only choose one photo at a time. Message & meetup notifications are also inconsistently unreliable...sometimes late, sometimes nothing at all.

I would give it more stars, but , it needs a way to separate the towns / municipalities in the area. I have found things that I absolutely love, but it's unrealistic for either myself or the seller to drive 3 hours each way to make the transaction for a $20 item. Also, the " popular items " header is pretty much useless from a buying point of view, as those articles are already sold by the time they show up in that category.

Awful, especially lately. It's always been a little glitchy, but nothing worse than regular issues with retrieving info, viewing items, etc. When you set up meeting times with buyers or sellers, and then can't retrieve the info they messaged you, that makes the app pointless. I've been using this for years, but it's gotten so bad I'm likely going to switch to something else.

Great app for buying and selling. Easy to use, including posting items to sell. However, one thing this app needs is the option to save an incomplete post - waiting to be completed later. And what is wrong with notifications? No matter what notification settings I have turned on in app or phone settings, this app won't send me notifications! What's up with that?? PLEASE FIX THIS

Love the app. Has a lot of great features. Love how it is categorized in detail. For example the clothes are by size. No other app I have seen is that detailed. Love the seller/buyer profiles and how they have a little about us section for the seller. Very happy. One thing that would make it better is if they had a search local option or if you could see the location of the seller. Sometimes when you go into a 'city area' they have ads from outside the community.

This used to be a great app. An easy way to buy and sell items but, this last year, it has been abysmal. Crashing, failing to retrieve notifications, messages not getting through, etc. If you can get through to the helpdesk they continously say they're working on it and to try again later. Surely they would have come up with a fix within a year but no. It's frustrating and I imagine people, including myself, have lost out on a lot of sales due to this app working very intermittently.

Easy to use, enjoyable app for a fairly local shopping experience on mostly used items. Aside from some lack of clarity on exactly WHERE the item is being sold from/where the seller will meet u it is pretty straight forward. I would suggest the developers get rid of the pre-written, one button sentences (such as: "NO LONGER INTERESTED" & ""AVAILABLE") as they appear in odd spots and at times that lend confusion rather than clarification to the buyer's experience. All in all, it's easy & useful!

Somehow this app managed to get worse. Notifications have never worked. App is always slow and hard to load anything. Now it doesn't want to even open and if it does the search bar disappears and you can't search anything. If that's not bad enough they threw in annoying ads now. It's a popular app in my area but it works like garbage for all the years I've used it. Really too bad. Hopefully there is an update soon to fix it enough so I can at least use it somewhat again.

Giving this the lowest rating because the amount of ads is insane and there is no option to pay for an ad-free version. Updated 09/12/22: was just subjected to some full screen video ad for a some game after scrolling down the page for a few seconds. I'm deleting this app. Also, almost every time that I respond to an ad, the person messages me back days or even weeks later saying they never got a notification of my message. Their item is often sold in between or I have lost interest in buying

Really appreciate this app but I absolutely hate the ads! They pop up within 10-15 seconds, are LOUD (music & or someone talking) & fill the entire screen. I have to close the app to get away from it. Very frustrating & annoying. I would far prefer to pay for this app (assuming it's affordable) then have to put up with these horrible ads. I no longer scroll through listings to shop as a result. To the Varage Sale creators: pls offer a an option to pay for the app or free with ads.

Been using this app for years and it glitches out constantly. I've had great success using it in terms of finding buyers, but it's constantly crashing, failing to load, or failing to send me notifications, and then I find out someone has been waiting for me for half an hour, because I never got a notification for their message. I'll keep using it because there aren't many alternatives, but this app needs A LOT of work.

Usually I love using this app. But lately it has been nothing but a hassle. I can't access my messages or notifications despite uninstalling and reinstalling the app and logging back in (which is also super glitchy). If this doesn't get fixed soon I am going to switch where I buy and sell stuff from because how can I communicate with people when I can't open my messages.
Fabulous website to sell a variety of items and meet an overall, lovely clientele. Efficient and user-friendly format. Give it a try to both sell and purchase quality and niche items!
Great app. Always find great deals. Wish we could connect to other communities though. admin is very responsive to inquiries.

Update: December 14, 2022 caused majour issues for people to log into the App. They say the issue was fixed?? An awesome way to buy/sell in your local areas! Developers are usually quick to fix any bugs that develop in the app. I love the fact that I can list items for sale as I decide to sell instead of saving everything up to do an actual garage sale. Search engines work excellently to make it easy to find an item to purchase and they add catagories as neccessary to narrow down that search.
Not too happy with this app right now. i can't access my messages at the moment. Which means that i could be missing out on sales. No one is available to answer my inquiries.
The ads are getting annoying, every 5 seconds it just randomly opens amazon all the time.
It's very easy to use & has been great for me. I wish the search was more accurate to what I'm looking for when I use it though.

Nice to have a place to buy good used items. But it's very frustrating if you forget your password login. I did and clicked to send email to reset several times and didn't get email to reset. I finally figured out my password on my own. Now I have no notifications updating on the app. Nothing new showing in the last 24 hours?!

Lots of good deals sometimes it's a hit and others a miss. For the most part I have purchased some great items for a lower cost. However, I would like to see better categories. For example, under pet accessories divide the items by pet; cat/dog/fish/reptiles, ect. & a hair category under health and beauty.

I have found so much great stuff that I have needed or just wanted. The people that I've met are great and I've never felt scared or apprehensive about a meet. I've found many things my husband wanted as well as selling my things. Thank you for this great App Service!!

It is helpful to have ratings on sellers. Easy to post items and edit. It would be great to have push notifications for past buyers when you post new items that are similar to what they purchased before. This is definitely a way to "shop" for items before going to a store or shopping for new items. A great sustainable option!

I've had pretty good luck with meeting sellers and buying products, however I think that administration should be responsible to delete ads from sellers that are over 6 months old. It isn't until you make a comment and then read old comments that you become aware that they can be over a year old, and the seller never bothered to reply. It's disappointing after searching through all the items to find something that you are interested in, only to find out that it's very old and your not go to recei

New rating update. Found glitches in the app and can't figure out how to contact the app developer. Items marked as "SOLD" no longer have an edit button. I can no longer delete sold items from my list to make room for new listings. I accidentally marked an item as SOLD and have no way of making it available again without the Edit button or feature. I cannot find anything in the help pages and yes, I have uninstalled/reinstalled the app a d restarted my phone with no helpful results.

The app is not always in sync Many times the lag times can be over 4 -5 mins making pick up difficult. It's not my wi-fi other apps run perfectly. Another feature that would be nice is double the amount of items you can bump. If you have a fair amount of items you are very limited under the present parameters of this app. There you have it my 2 cents

This app will drain your phone battery very fast and overheat the phone. After 4 adds you get a big advertising. On top of that always it is advertising on the screen, it makes almost impossible to use it on the phone. The adds aren't in posting order, you get on the first page adds 9 months old. May be safer for transactions than kijiji which is full of spammers but it is not for a mobile device.

The new owners have got to remove the maxsold items from the feed. I'm in Montreal and I get maxsold items selling from Toronto. it's supposed to be regional so that I can physically pick-up the item I bought. Please remove the maxsold items.

My last phone died and never came back on so had to do a new email cuz I don't remember password. I downloaded vs again with new email. Been almost 2 weeks and still waiting for approval. I hate that it got sold now I will probably never get back on it.

maxsold took over and it's overrun with ads that take you to a different website. it shows you a different location than the actual location you live which is pointless. there are so many scammers on this site now and it's gone downhill

Love varage sale, the app is easy to use. Until a week or so ago it logged me out and now will not let me log back in with Facebook or email. I emailed the help line the said it's just a technical issue. I've downloaded and I downloaded it numerous times. I now I have to use the website which doesn't send you emails like the app did even with the settings on. Would really like to get back on the app as I'm missing out on alot of messages and sales for weeks now with no help from varage support

I've had the best luck selling on this site! Even more so than on kijiji or other Facebook groups. The people that I have come across have all been great. My only complaint is the App itself as there are glitches and is very slow at times with images, photo's to display. Otherwise it's a great selling platform.
